name.en: Cat5E Short-body 8p8c Industrial RJ Connector For Various Boot Types
name.zh: Cat5E Short-body 8p8c Industrial RJ Connector For Various Boot Types

brief.en: Create effortless connections with our Short-Body Cat5e Industrial RJ45 Connector. This shielded plug features 50μ gold contacts for stable gigabit speed.
brief.zh: Create effortless connections with our Short-Body Cat5e Industrial RJ45 Connector. This shielded plug features 50μ gold contacts for stable gigabit speed.

description.en:
Description

Cat5e Short-Body 8P8C Industrial RJ Connector
 

01. COMPACT POWERHOUSE: The Short-Body Advantage

 
Subheading Focus: Form Factor & Space Efficiency
Space is scarce in modern industrial cabinets. Standard connectors stick out too far. They get bumped. They break. Our Cat5e Short-Body Industrial RJ Connector solves this. We engineered a compact, "short-body" design that fits where others fail. This reduced length is critical for tight enclosures, robotics, and crowded patch panels.
Despite the smaller size, we sacrificed nothing. You get full Gigabit Transmission speed. The compact form factor allows for tighter bend radii behind equipment. It reduces leverage on the port, preventing damage to expensive switches and PLCs.
This isn't just a connector; it's a space-saving solution. It is Ideal for structured cabling projects where every millimeter counts. Whether you are wiring a dense server rack or a compact IoT device, this short-body plug delivers big performance in a small package.
 

02. INDUSTRIAL SHIELDING: Pure Copper Nickel-Plated Defense

 
Subheading Focus: Shielding & EMI Protection
Factories are noisy. Motors, welders, and drives create a storm of Electromagnetic Interference (EMI). Standard plastic plugs leave your data exposed. Our connector features a Pure Copper Nickel-Plated Housing. This metal shell acts as a fortress.
This shielding effectively blocks external electromagnetic interference. It creates a Faraday cage around your signal. It ensures more stable data transmission even in the harshest electrical environments. The nickel plating adds a second layer of defense. It resists corrosion. It stays conductive.
We built this for the real world. The metal body resists crushing. It provides a solid ground connection. This Shielded and Resist Interference design keeps your network running smooth when others fail. Don't let noise corrupt your data. Shield it with Cobtel.
 

03. GRIP OF STEEL: Integrated Strain-Relief Clamp

 
Subheading Focus: Mechanical Strength & Strain Relief
Cables get pulled. Vibration loosens connections. A standard crimp often isn't enough for industrial use. Our connector includes an Integrated Strain-Relief Clamp. This is a game-changer for reliability.
This metal tail wraps securely around the cable jacket. You crimp it down. It bites into the sheath. It locks the cable to the connector body. This Prevents cable loosening. It absorbs the pulling force. It protects the delicate wire terminations inside.
This feature is vital for machinery that moves. It ensures Grounding Continuity by connecting the cable shield to the connector shell. It stops the shake from reaching the contacts. Your connection stays solid. We engineered this for Industrial durability. You can install it on heavy-duty cables. You can install it in vibrating vehicles. The clamp holds tight.
 

04. GOLD STANDARD: 50μ Gold-Plated Triple-Fork Contacts

 
Subheading Focus: Conductivity & Contact Design
The heart of any connector is the contact point. If the contact fails, the network dies. We use 50μ (micron) thickened gold plating on our contacts. This is industry-leading thickness.
Gold is a noble metal. It doesn't rust. It conducts electricity perfectly. The thick 50μ Gold-Plated layer resists aging and oxidation. It ensures low contact resistance for the life of the installation. You get maximum speed. You get Gigabit Transmission without errors.
 
We also use a superior shape: Triple-Fork Contacts. Standard plugs use two prongs. We use three. These prongs bite into the copper wire from multiple angles. They create a gas-tight seal. This design works with both solid and stranded wire. It enhances conductivity. It ensures a solid link even if the wire moves slightly.
 

05. UNBREAKABLE LATCH: Reinforced Polycarbonate Design

 
Subheading Focus: Latch Durability & Materials
The plastic latch is the weak point of most RJ45 plugs. It snaps off. Then the cable falls out. We fixed this. We use a Reinforced Flexible Latch Arm. We engineered it to handle abuse.
We use superior materials. The latch is made from reinforced, eco-friendly flame-retardant PC material. Polycarbonate (PC) is tough. It is flexible. It is not brittle like cheap ABS.
We tested it to the extreme. It Passes 180-degree bend test. You can bend the latch flat backward. It springs back. It doesn't snap. This ensures the connector stays locked in the port. It provides superior bend resistance. Safety is also key. The material has a fire rating UL94-V0. It is safe for plenum spaces.
 

06. INSTALLATION SIMPLICITY: One-Piece Design for Speed

 
Subheading Focus: Ease of Use & Efficiency
Time is money. You need to terminate cables fast. Our One-piece RJ45 Gigabit Connector is designed for Quick, Easy Installation. There are no loose parts to lose. No complex load bars to fiddle with.
You strip the cable. You arrange the wires. You slide them in. The internal channels guide the wires into place. The Wire Hole OD of 1.0mm accommodates standard Cat5e conductors easily.
This simplicity reduces errors. It speeds up big jobs. A technician can terminate hundreds of these in a day. It is perfect for field repairs where you might not have a clean workbench. You get a professional termination every time, with less hassle. It is the efficient choice for high-volume installers.
 

07. PROVEN PERFORMANCE: Fluke Test Certified

 
Subheading Focus: Testing & Quality Assurance
You need speed. You need reliability. We guarantee it. All COBTEL connectors meet performance standards. We don't guess. We test.
Our connector Passes Fluke Testing. Fluke is the gold standard in network testing. A Fluke pass means the connector meets strict signal quality rules. It meets the NEXT (Near-End Crosstalk) limits. It meets the Return Loss limits.
 
This certification proves our quality. You can trust this connector for Gigabit Transmission. It handles high-speed data effortlessly. It supports PoE applications. When you install a Cobtel connector, you know the link will work. You avoid callbacks. You satisfy your clients. It is Standard Testing you can rely on.
 

08. WIDE COMPATIBILITY: Fits All Your Devices

 
Subheading Focus: Use Cases & Application
Who needs this connector? Everyone. It is Compatible with all RJ45 interface devices. It fits perfectly into the modern digital ecosystem.
Use it for Desktops and Laptops in the office. Use it for Routers and Switches in the server room. It connects Smart TVs and Set-top boxes at home. It terminates cables for Patch panels.
The industrial build makes it perfect for factories. The shielding makes it perfect for interference-heavy zones. The durability makes it perfect for schools. From ADSL devices to TV boxes, this connector delivers. It is the professional's choice for any Product Application Range.
 

Extended Educational Resource: Mastering Industrial Connectivity

 

Deep Dive: The Importance of Shielding in Industrial Environments

In the world of professional networking, Shielded cabling is not a luxury; it is a necessity. Our Cat5e Industrial RJ Connector is designed specifically for these demanding environments.
What is EMI/RFI? Electromagnetic Interference (EMI) and Radio Frequency Interference (RFI) are invisible forces. They come from heavy machinery, fluorescent lights, power lines, and wireless transmitters. In a factory or a crowded server room, this noise is everywhere. When this noise hits an unshielded ethernet cable, it creates data errors. The network slows down. It drops packets.
 
The Faraday Cage Solution Our connector uses a Pure Copper Nickel-Plated Housing. This metal shell creates a "Faraday Cage" around the signal wires.
Reflects Noise: External noise hits the metal and bounces off.
Absorbs Noise: Any noise that penetrates is absorbed by the metal and drained to the ground.
Contains Signal: It also keeps your high-speed data signals inside the cable, preventing them from interfering with other devices.
By using this Shielded Housing, you ensure stable data transmission regardless of the electrical environment.
The Science of Gold Plating: Why 50μ Matters
You will see many connectors advertised as "Gold Plated." But not all gold plating is equal. The industry standard varies from "Flash" plating (very thin) to 50μ (micron) plating. Our connector uses 50μ Gold-Plated Pure Copper Contacts.
Why Thickness Counts
Corrosion Resistance: Copper oxidizes (turns green). Oxidation blocks electricity. Gold does not oxidize. A thick layer of gold ensures the oxygen never reaches the copper underneath.
Mating Cycles: Every time you plug and unplug a cable, you scrape the contacts. Thin gold wears off quickly. 50μ plating withstands hundreds of mating cycles.
Contact Resistance: Thicker gold provides a flatter, smoother surface on a microscopic level. This reduces resistance. Lower resistance means better signal quality and less heat generation (crucial for PoE).
 
This thickened gold plating is why our connectors resist aging and maintain Gigabit Transmission for decades.
Triple-Fork Contacts: The Grip That Never Slips
Look closely at the contact blades in cheap connectors. They usually have two teeth (prongs). Our Industrial RJ45 Connector uses Triple-Fork Contacts.
 

The 3-Point Advantage

More Surface Area: Three points of contact provide better electrical conductivity than two.
Universal Fit:
Solid Wire: The prongs straddle the solid copper wire, creating a secure grip.
Stranded Wire: The prongs pierce the strands, ensuring contact with multiple filaments.
Vibration Resistance: With three points of contact, the wire is held firmly. Even if the cable vibrates, the electrical connection remains unbroken.
This design is a key part of our Anti-Oxidation strategy. It ensures a gas-tight seal that keeps corrosion out.
Short-Body Design: Why Smaller is Better
While standard RJ45 plugs are functional, they can be cumbersome in tight spaces.
Bend Radius: A long connector forces the cable to stick straight out for an inch or more before it can bend. In a shallow cabinet, this forces you to mash the door closed against the cable. This damages the cable and the port.
Leverage: A long connector acts as a lever. If the cable is pulled sideways, it puts massive torque on the jack.
Our Solution: The Short-Body design reduces this leverage. It allows the cable to bend sooner. It protects your equipment.
Strain Relief: The Forgotten Hero
Most connector failures happen at the back of the plug. The cable gets pulled. The jacket pulls out of the connector. The wires are exposed. The connection breaks. Standard connectors use a plastic wedge to push on the jacket. This often fails with thick, shielded Cat5e/6 cables.
Our connector uses an Integrated Strain-Relief Clamp. This is a metal extension of the shield.
How it works: After terminating the wires, you use pliers to wrap this metal tail around the cable jacket.
The Result: The cable is mechanically locked to the connector. Pulling on the cable pulls on the metal body, not the delicate wires.
Grounding: This clamp also connects the cable shield (foil/braid) to the connector shell, ensuring Grounding Continuity.
 

Understanding Fluke Certification

We claim our product Passes Fluke Testing. What does this mean? A Fluke Network Analyzer tests the physics of the connection.
NEXT (Near-End Crosstalk): Does the signal from Pair 1 bleed into Pair 2? Our precise wire alignment minimizes this.
Return Loss: Does the signal hit the connector and bounce back? Our impedance-matched design prevents this.
Insertion Loss: Does the signal lose power going through the plug? Our 50μ Gold contacts minimize this.
A passing Fluke test is the ultimate proof of quality. It means the connector effectively disappears electrically. It lets the full speed of the cable pass through.
 

The Durability of Polycarbonate (PC)

We use eco-friendly flame-retardant PC material for the plastic parts (specifically the latch). Cheap connectors use ABS plastic. ABS gets brittle. It snaps. It yellows in the sun. Polycarbonate is different.
Transparency: It is clear and strong.
Flexibility: It bends without breaking. This allows our Reinforced Flexible Latch Arm to pass the 180-degree bend test.
Safety: It is self-extinguishing (UL94-V0). If a fire starts, this connector will not spread it.
 

Application Scenarios

1. The Automated Factory
Robots move. Arms swing. Cables flex.
Need: A connector that handles vibration.
Solution: Our Integrated Strain-Relief Clamp locks the cable in place. The Shielding protects against motor noise.
2. The Outdoor Surveillance Camera
Cameras are mounted high up. Maintenance is difficult.
Need: A connector that resists corrosion and does not fail.
Solution: The Nickel-Plated Housing and Gold Contacts resist the humid outdoor air.
3. The High-Speed Office
Designers transfer massive files.
Need: Maximum speed.
Solution: The Cat5e Industrial rating guarantees Gigabit Transmission.
 

Boot Compatibility Guide

A "boot" is the rubber cover that goes over the connector. Our connector includes a Polycarbonate (PC) Boot.
Matched Design: It fits the short body perfectly.
Protection: It protects the release tab from snagging.
Strain Relief: It helps control the cable bend radius. The connector is also compatible with various other boot types, giving you flexibility.
 

Installation Best Practices

 
Slide the Boot On: Always put the boot on the cable before you strip it!
Strip Carefully: Remove the jacket. Fold back the shield (braid/foil).
Untwist: Untwist the pairs as little as possible (less than 0.5 inches).
Align: Flatten the wires in standard T568B order.
Trim Flush: Use flush cutters to cut the wire ends perfectly straight.
Insert and Crimp: Push the wires into the connector body until they hit the front. Crimp with a standard RJ45 tool.
Clamp: Squeeze the Strain Relief Clamp tightly around the cable jacket/shield.
Technical Specifications Summary
Product Name: Cat.5E 8P4C Industrial RJ45 Plug.
Interface: Standard RJ45 (8P8C/8P4C compatible).
Category: Cat 5e (Gigabit).
Shielding: Pure Copper Nickel-Plated Housing.
Contacts: 50μ Gold-Plated Phosphor Bronze.
Contact Type: Triple-Fork (3-Prong).
Latch Material: Polycarbonate (PC) UL94-V0.
Wire Hole OD: 1.0mm.
Strain Relief: Integrated Metal Clamp.
Compatibility: Solid and Stranded Cable.
Standards: Meets TIA/EIA-568, ISO/IEC 11801.
 

Why Choose Cobtel?

 
We are experts in physical layer connectivity. We engineer our products for the real world.
We Test: We use Fluke labs to verify performance.
We Build Strong: We use metal where others use plastic.
We Innovate: We use short-body designs to solve space problems.
When you buy the Cat5E Short-Body 8p8c Industrial RJ Connector, you are buying peace of mind. You are buying a network that works today, tomorrow, and ten years from now. Secure your connections. Shield your data. Choose Cobtel.

brief.en:
1. Simplified Cable Termination: Our CAT5E modular plug features a short body design for easy, tool-free wire termination, making network repairs and setups more efficient.
2. Enhanced Durability: Built with shrapnel reinforcement and high-quality PC material, our modular plug withstands bending and ensures long-term usage without breakage.
3. Premium Gold Pin Technology: Pure copper gold-plated pins provide anti-oxidation, anti-aging benefits for a connection that's not only reliable but also enduring.
4. Fluke Test Passed: COBTEL's commitment to quality means every modular plug meets stringent standards and passes the Fluke test for assured performance.
5. Broad Application Scope: Ideal for network cabling projects, compatible with all RJ45 interface devices including desktops, laptops, routers, and smart TVs.

description.en:
Description

Product Description:

 

Step into a world where connection and performance converge with COBTEL's UTP CAT5E Short Body Modular Plug. This plug is not just a component; it's the heart of a seamless network, pulsating with high-speed data and crystal-clear communication.

 

Our UTP CAT5E Modular Plug is a testament to our commitment to quality and innovation. Designed with a short body, it simplifies cable termination, making it a breeze for both seasoned technicians and novices alike. The plug's compact form factor ensures it fits comfortably in tight spaces, optimizing your network setup without compromising on quality.

 

The shrapnel reinforcement is a standout feature, crafted from brand new, environmentally friendly PC material. This not only makes our plug more resistant to bending but also ensures it is not easily broken. It's a plug designed for longevity, able to withstand the rigors of constant plugging and unplugging without losing its integrity.

 

We've integrated cutting-edge gold pin technology into our design. The bifurcated gold pins, made of pure copper and treated with nickel and gold plating, offer unparalleled anti-oxidation and anti-aging properties. This means your connections are not just secure; they're fortified against the elements, ensuring a stable and enduring signal.

 

Every COBTEL modular plug is rigorously tested and has passed the Fluke test, a benchmark for quality in the industry. This assures you that our plugs meet all performance standards, providing you with a reliable and consistent connection every time.

 

Our product's application scope is broad and versatile. Whether you're orchestrating a network cabling project or simply setting up your home office, our modular plug is compatible with all RJ45 interface devices. Desktops, laptops, routers, switches, smart TVs, and set-top boxes-all can benefit from the reliability and performance of our plug.

 

The transparent design of our modular plug isn't just for show; it's a symbol of our transparency as a brand. We believe in providing our customers with products that are not just effective but also safe and environmentally responsible. The sleek, transparent body of our plug allows you to see the precision engineering that goes into each piece, reflecting the clarity and quality of the connection it provides.

 

Choose COBTEL's UTP CAT5E Short Body Modular Plug for a networking experience that is as reliable as it is revolutionary. With COBTEL, you're not just making a connection; you're making a statement-a statement of quality, durability, and unparalleled performance. Connect with confidence, connect with COBTEL.

description.en:
Description

1. Engineering Grade Cat5E Modular Plug. Can pass the Fluke Testing

2. Stable Contact Close-fitting: Using a 3-fork gold pin, closely fitting with the wire core for stable and uninterrupted connection.

3. Gold-plated Contacts Stable Transmission: Thickened gold-plated contacts, good conductivity, ensuring stable network speed over time.

4. Transparent Crystal Eco-friendly Plastic Shell: Using new eco-friendly PC material, the rj45 connector is crystal clear, corrosion-resistant, has strong toughness, and a longer lifespan.

5. Thickened Pins For Faster Transmission: Thickened, widened, and lengthened 3-fork pins with a higher successful compressing rate, larger contact area, and faster and more stable transmission without disconnection.

6. High-toughness Shrapnel Resistant to Bending: The RJ45 plug's shrapnel undergoes reinforced treatment, with 180-degree bending without easy breakage, maintaining elasticity like new, and having strong durability.
7. Seamless Connection, stable transmission. suitable for RJ45 ports, ensuring a stable seamless connection.

9. Pass Fluke Testing: All COBTEL modular plugs meet the standard requirements and pass the Fluke testing.

brief.en: Create effortless connections with our Industrial Cat6 RJ45 Connector. This 8P8C shielded plug features a load bar and fits various boot types.

description.en:
Description

1. FULLY GOLD-PLATED SHIELDED COPPER SHELL. RJ45 Category 6 Gigabit modular plug.

2. FULLY GOLD-PLATED SHIELDED COPPER SHELL. The shell is made of gold-plated copper, effectively shielding electromagnetic interference from the outside, ensuring more stable information transmission.

3. 3-FORK GOLD-PLATED PINS. Made of pure copper, treated with nickel and gold plating process Stable 3-fork gold-plated pins, ensuring stable transmission. Anti-aging, more durable.

4. ENHANCED SHRAPNEL, RESISTANT TO BENDING. The Shrapnel is made of new environmentally friendly PC material, strengthened for durability. It can withstand over 20 times of 180-degree bending tests without breaking.

5. ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY PC MATERIAL. COBTEL rJ45 plugs are made of environmentally friendly PC material, strong and durable, with crystal clear transparency

6. TWO-PIECE RJ45 PLUG. Using a two-piece design helps lock the position of the cable core during the modular plugs crimping process.

7. PASSED FLUKE TESTING. All COBTEL RJ45 plugs meet the standard requirements and can pass Fluke testing.

8. RJ45 CONNECTOR PRODUCT APPLICATION RANGE. Suitable for comprehensive network cabling projects compatible with all RJ45 interface devices desktop computers, laptops, routers, switches, smart TVs, set-top boxes, TV boxes, hubs, ADSL...

description.en:
Description

 
8p8c Industrial Cat6 RJ Connector (Two-Piece Shielded Design)
 

01. INDUSTRIAL DOMINANCE: Armor Your Network Against Interference

 
Subheading Focus: Shielding & Durability
Data centers are noisy. Factories are worse. Electrical noise destroys data. Our Industrial Cat6 RJ45 Connector stops this. We built this connector with a Pure Copper Nickel-Plated Housing. This metal shell acts as a shield. It creates a barrier against Electromagnetic Interference (EMI). It blocks Radio Frequency Interference (RFI).
Standard plastic connectors let noise in. This causes packet loss. It causes network lag. Our Shielded Housing protects your signal. It grounds the unwanted energy. Your data travels safely inside.
We designed this for harsh environments. The metal casing is strong. It resists crushing. It resists corrosion. The Nickel-Plated finish ensures longevity. It stays shiny and conductive. You get stable data transmission. You get a connection that lasts for years. Do not use cheap plastic for critical links. Use the connector that acts like armor.
 

02. GRIP OF STEEL: Integrated Strain Relief Clamp

 
Subheading Focus: Mechanical Strength & Strain Relief
Cables move. They vibrate. They get pulled. A standard connector relies on a small plastic wedge to hold the cable. That is not enough for industrial use. Our connector features an Integrated Strain-Relief Clamp. This is a game-changer.
This metal tail wraps around the cable jacket. You crimp it down. It bites into the cable sheath. It locks the cable to the connector body. This Prevents cable loosening. It absorbs the pulling force. It protects the delicate wires inside.
Vibration is the enemy of connectivity. In a factory arm or a vehicle, cables shake. This clamp stops the shake from reaching the contacts. Your connection stays solid. We engineered this for Industrial reliability. You can install it on heavy-duty cables. You can install it in tight spaces. The clamp holds on tight. You never have to worry about a cable pulling out.
 

03. GOLD STANDARD: 50μ Gold-Plated Triple-Fork Contacts

 
Subheading Focus: Electrical Conductivity & Contact Design
Connectivity happens at the contact point. If the contact fails, the network fails. We use the best materials available. Our contacts feature 50μ (micron) thickened gold plating. This is much thicker than standard "flash" plating.
Gold is a noble metal. It does not rust. It conducts electricity perfectly. The thick 50μ Gold-Plated layer resists aging. It prevents oxidation. It ensures low contact resistance. You get maximum speed. You get Gigabit Transmission without errors.
 
We also upgraded the shape. We use Triple-Fork Contacts. Standard connectors use two prongs. We use three. These prongs bite into the copper wire. They touch the wire in more places. They create a gas-tight seal. This design works with both solid and stranded wire. It enhances conductivity. It ensures a solid link even if the wire moves.
 

04. EFFORTLESS ASSEMBLY: Two-Piece Design with Load Bar

 
Subheading Focus: Installation Speed & Ease of Use
Terminating cables is hard work. Aligning eight tiny wires inside a plug is frustrating. We solved this. We use a Two-Piece RJ45 Connector design. This system includes a separate wire holder (load bar).
You strip the cable. You insert the wires into the Single-row wire holder. This small bar holds the wires in order. You trim them flush. Then, you insert the bar into the connector body. It acts as a guide. It slides right in.
This design allows cable conductors to lock into position more easily. You do not have to guess. The Built-in alignment holes enable blind mating. The wires go exactly where they belong. It creates a secure wire insertion every time. Technicians love this. It saves time. It reduces wasted connectors. It makes the job Simple & Convenient.
 

05. UNBREAKABLE LATCH: 180-Degree Bend Tested

 
Subheading Focus: Latch Durability & Materials
The latch is the weak point of most connectors. It breaks. Then the cable falls out. We fixed this flaw. We use a Reinforced Flexible Latch Arm. We engineered it to handle abuse.
We use superior materials. The latch is made from reinforced, eco-friendly flame-retardant PC material. Polycarbonate (PC) is tough. It is flexible. It is not brittle like cheap ABS plastic.
We tested it rigorously. It Passes 180-degree bend test. You can bend the latch flat backward. It springs back. It does not snap. This ensures the connector stays locked in the port. It provides superior bend resistance. Safety is also key. The material has a fire rating UL94-V0. It is safe for plenum spaces. It is safe for commercial buildings.
 

06. ULTIMATE VERSATILITY: Fits Various Boot Types

 
Subheading Focus: Compatibility & Customization
Every installation is different. Sometimes you need a snag-less boot. Sometimes you need a short boot. Our connector is adaptable. It is Compatible with Multiple Boots.
You can use a Foldable Boot. This protects the latch. It prevents snagging when pulling cables through conduit. You can use a Snap-On Boot. This provides a clean, professional look. It color-codes your cables.
This versatility simplifies your inventory. You buy one connector. You stock different boots. You handle every job. Whether you are patching a server rack or wiring a desk, this connector fits. It allows for quick, easy installation regardless of the specific requirement. It is the universal solution for Cat 6 Industrial cabling.
 

07. PROVEN PERFORMANCE: Fluke Test Certified

 
Subheading Focus: Testing & Quality Assurance
You need speed. You need Gigabit performance. We guarantee it. All COBTEL connectors meet performance standards. We do not guess. We test.
Our connector Passes Fluke Testing. Fluke is the industry authority. A Fluke pass means the connector meets strict specifications. It meets the NEXT (Near-End Crosstalk) limits. It meets the Return Loss limits.
This certification proves our quality. You can trust this connector for Gigabit Transmission. It handles high-speed data effortlessly. It supports PoE (Power over Ethernet). It supports video streaming. When you install a Cobtel connector, you know the link will work. You avoid callbacks. You satisfy your clients. It is Standard Testing you can rely on.
 

08. WIDE APPLICATION: The Choice for Professionals

 
Subheading Focus: Use Cases & B2B Suitability
Who needs this connector? Everyone who demands quality. It is Ideal for structured cabling projects. It fits perfectly into the modern digital ecosystem.
It is Compatible with all RJ45 interface devices. Use it for Desktops and Laptops. Use it for Routers and Switches in the data center. It connects Smart TVs and Set-top boxes. It terminates cables for Patch panels.
The industrial build makes it perfect for factories. The shielding makes it perfect for hospitals. The durability makes it perfect for schools. From ADSL devices to TV boxes, this connector delivers. It is the professional's choice for any Product Application Range.
 

Extended Technical Guide: Mastering Industrial Connectivity

 

Deep Dive: The Importance of Shielding in Industrial Environments

In the world of professional networking, Shielded cabling is not a luxury; it is a necessity. Our Industrial Cat6 RJ45 Connector is designed specifically for these demanding environments.
What is EMI/RFI? Electromagnetic Interference (EMI) and Radio Frequency Interference (RFI) are invisible forces. They come from heavy machinery, fluorescent lights, power lines, and wireless transmitters. In a factory or a crowded server room, this noise is everywhere. When this noise hits an unshielded ethernet cable, it creates data errors. The network slows down. It drops packets.
The Faraday Cage Solution Our connector uses a Pure Copper Nickel-Plated Housing. This metal shell creates a "Faraday Cage" around the signal wires.
Reflects Noise: External noise hits the metal and bounces off.
Absorbs Noise: Any noise that penetrates is absorbed by the metal and drained to the ground.
Contains Signal: It also keeps your high-speed data signals inside the cable, preventing them from interfering with other devices.
By using this Shielded Housing, you ensure stable data transmission regardless of the electrical environment.
 

The Science of Gold Plating: Why 50μ Matters

You will see many connectors advertised as "Gold Plated." But not all gold plating is equal. The industry standard varies from "Flash" plating (very thin) to 50μ (micron) plating. Our connector uses 50μ Gold-Plated Pure Copper Contacts.
Why Thickness Counts
Corrosion Resistance: Copper oxidizes (turns green). Oxidation blocks electricity. Gold does not oxidize. A thick layer of gold ensures the oxygen never reaches the copper underneath.
Mating Cycles: Every time you plug and unplug a cable, you scrape the contacts. Thin gold wears off quickly. 50μ plating withstands hundreds of mating cycles.
 
Contact Resistance: Thicker gold provides a flatter, smoother surface on a microscopic level. This reduces resistance. Lower resistance means better signal quality and less heat generation (crucial for PoE).
This thickened gold plating is why our connectors resist aging and maintain Gigabit Transmission for decades.
 

Triple-Fork Contacts: The Grip That Never Slips

Look closely at the contact blades in cheap connectors. They usually have two teeth (prongs). Our Industrial RJ45 Connector uses Triple-Fork Contacts.
The 3-Point Advantage
More Surface Area: Three points of contact provide better electrical conductivity than two.
Universal Fit:
Solid Wire: The prongs straddle the solid copper wire, creating a secure grip.
Stranded Wire: The prongs pierce the strands, ensuring contact with multiple filaments.
Vibration Resistance: With three points of contact, the wire is held firmly. Even if the cable vibrates, the electrical connection remains unbroken.
This design is a key part of our Anti-Oxidation strategy. It ensures a gas-tight seal that keeps corrosion out.
 

Two-Piece Assembly: Solving the Technician's Headache

Ask any network technician what they hate most. They will say "assembling shielded Cat6 connectors." Why? Because the wires are thick. The shielding foil gets in the way. Aligning 8 stiff wires into a tiny plug is difficult.
The Load Bar Solution Our Two-Piece RJ45 Connector solves this with a "Load Bar" (or wire holder).
Pre-Alignment: You arrange the wires in the correct color code (T568B or T568A) outside of the connector.
Insertion: You slide the wires into the Single-row wire holder. This small piece holds them perfectly flat and spaced correctly.
Trim: You cut the excess wire flush with the holder.
Final Assembly: You slide the holder into the connector body. The Built-in alignment holes guide it perfectly to the contacts.
This system eliminates "cross-overs" inside the plug. It reduces the distance between the twist and the contact (which improves Fluke performance). It makes installation Simple & Convenient.
 

Strain Relief: The Forgotten Hero

Most connector failures happen at the back of the plug. The cable gets pulled. The jacket pulls out of the connector. The wires are exposed. The connection breaks. Standard connectors use a plastic wedge to push on the jacket. This often fails with thick, shielded Cat6 cables.
Our connector uses an Integrated Strain-Relief Clamp. This is a metal extension of the shield.
How it works: After terminating the wires, you use pliers to wrap this metal tail around the cable jacket.
The Result: The cable is mechanically locked to the connector. Pulling on the cable pulls on the metal body, not the delicate wires.
Grounding: This clamp also connects the cable shield (foil/braid) to the connector shell, ensuring Grounding Continuity.
 

Understanding Fluke Certification

We claim our product Passes Fluke Testing. What does this mean? A Fluke Network Analyzer tests the physics of the connection.
NEXT (Near-End Crosstalk): Does the signal from Pair 1 bleed into Pair 2? Our load bar keeps pairs separated to minimize this.
Return Loss: Does the signal hit the connector and bounce back? Our impedance-matched design prevents this.
Insertion Loss: Does the signal lose power going through the plug? Our 50μ Gold contacts minimize this.
A passing Fluke test is the ultimate proof of quality. It means the connector effectively disappears electrically. It lets the full speed of the cable pass through.
 

The Durability of Polycarbonate (PC)

We use eco-friendly flame-retardant PC material for the plastic parts (specifically the latch). Cheap connectors use ABS plastic. ABS gets brittle. It snaps. It yellows in the sun. Polycarbonate is different.
Transparency: It is clear and strong.
Flexibility: It bends without breaking. This allows our Reinforced Flexible Latch Arm to pass the 180-degree bend test.
Safety: It is self-extinguishing (UL94-V0). If a fire starts, this connector will not spread it.
 

Application Scenarios

1. The Automated Factory
Robots move. Arms swing. Cables flex.
Need: A connector that handles vibration.
Solution: Our Integrated Strain-Relief Clamp locks the cable in place. The Shielding protects against motor noise.
2. The Outdoor Surveillance Camera
Cameras are mounted high up. Maintenance is difficult.
Need: A connector that resists corrosion and does not fail.
Solution: The Nickel-Plated Housing and Gold Contacts resist the humid outdoor air.
3. The High-Speed Office
Designers transfer massive video files.
Need: Maximum speed.
Solution: The Cat 6 Industrial rating guarantees Gigabit Transmission.
 

Boot Compatibility Guide

A "boot" is the rubber cover that goes over the connector. Our connector is designed to be slim enough to accept various boots.
Snag-less Boots: Cover the latch. Great for pulling through crowded trays.
Strain Relief Boots: Extend down the cable. Help prevent sharp bends.
Color Coded Boots: Help you identify Voice vs. Data vs. Camera lines. The fact that it is Compatible with Multiple Boots gives you the freedom to customize your patch cords.
 

Installation Best Practices

 
Slide the Boot On: Always put the boot on the cable before you strip it!
Strip Carefully: Remove the jacket. Fold back the shield (braid/foil).
Untwist: Untwist the pairs as little as possible (less than 0.5 inches).
Insert into Load Bar: Follow the color code. Slide them into the wire holder.
Trim Flush: Use flush cutters to cut the wire ends perfectly even with the front of the load bar.
Insert and Crimp: Push the assembly into the connector body. Crimp with a standard RJ45 tool.
Clamp: Squeeze the Strain Relief Clamp tightly around the cable jacket/shield.
Technical Specifications Summary
Product Name: Cat.6 Industrial RJ45 Connector (Two-Piece).
Interface: Standard RJ45 (8P8C).
Category: Cat 6 (Gigabit).
Shielding: Pure Copper Nickel-Plated Housing.
Contacts: 50μ Gold-Plated Phosphor Bronze.
Contact Type: Triple-Fork (3-Prong).
Latch Material: Polycarbonate (PC) UL94-V0.
Assembly: Two-Piece (Includes Load Bar).
Strain Relief: Integrated Metal Clamp.
Compatibility: Solid and Stranded Cable.
Standards: Meets TIA/EIA-568, ISO/IEC 11801.
 

Why Choose Cobtel?

 
We are experts in physical layer connectivity. We engineer our products for the real world.
We Test: We use Fluke labs to verify performance.
We Build Strong: We use metal where others use plastic.
We Innovate: We use load bars to make your job easier.
When you buy the 8p8c Industrial Cat6 RJ Connector, you are buying peace of mind. You are buying a network that works today, tomorrow, and ten years from now. Secure your connections. Shield your data. Choose Cobtel.

description.en:
Description

COBTEL 2-Piece Cat6 Connector (6 Up 2 Down) is a commonly used modular interconnection device with an Ethernet cable and RJ45 jack to provide data communication. The highest 50-micron gold plating contact enables higher data speed with stable and secure networks such as a server, routers, modems, smart TV, gaming console, and other devices. This kind of standard RJ45 connector is 8 positions and 8 connections and non-shielded model, we have other different types of RJ45 connectors available for your different applications.


 Specification

Product Name

2 Piece Cat6 Connector

Gold Plating:

Flash, 1,3, 6, 15, 30, 50 micron

Plug Housing

94V0  

Color

Transparent or colorful

Interface

RJ45

Contacts

2-pin blade

Nickel Barrier Layer

99.5% pure nickel minimum,

Compatibility

Solid or Stranded Unshielded Twisted Pair 

Wire Gauge Supported

23AWG to 24 AWG

Operation Temperature Range

-10°C~60°C

Storage Temperature Range

-40°C~85°C

Humidity

10% to 90% RH(Non-condensing)

Insertion Life

750cycles

 

Features:


1. RJ45 modular connectors provide easy design-in, quick and easy installation, breadth of product and user accessibility.

2. There are two RJ45 pinout standards, T568A and T568B. Either will work in an ethernet network, T568A for backward compatibility with older wiring and T568B for better signal isolation and noise protection.

3. RJ45 connectors are also used for the newer applications such as factory automation, industrial process control and industrial robotics and so on.

 


Advantages of COBTEL RJ45 Connector


1.      ISO9001:2015

Cobtel Precision is strict with business procedure guidelines, as set by the International Standards Organization (ISO), and we are confident to provide the best service.

2.      UL Recognized

United Laboratories has determined that Cobtel is a manufacturer, and we can manufacture products for us in UL-compliant products.

3.      RoHS Compliant

Cobtel Cat6 connectors comply Restriction of Hazardous Substances(RoHS).

Description

COBTEL Cat6 Connector With Load Bar (6 Up 2 Down) uses 3 pins pierce the wire insulation and hold the copper wire tight for better conductivity. The highest 50 micron gold plating contact is high conductive and non-corrosive. Thicker gold plating better protects contact material from corrosion and for less resistance and better performance. The connectors used for Ethernet cable easily pass the component test and keeps stable Ethernet connection speed.

A modular plug is a standardized telecommunications network interface that provides interfaces for voice and data transmission. The modular plug was initially defined in the Universal Service Ordering Code (USOC) system of the Bell System in the United States and was used in the 1970s to provide computer-aided telephone equipment authorized by the Federal Communications Commission (FCC).

A modular plug is a type of plastic connector that can be inserted in a fixed direction and automatically prevents detachment. It is commonly referred to as an RJ-45 connector (RJ-45 is a network interface specification), and it is also known as a "crystal head." The modular plug is suitable for on-site termination between equipment or horizontal subsystems, and the housing material is made of high-density polyethylene. Each end of the twisted pair wire is connected to a network card and a hub (or switch) by installing a modular plug.

In a Category 6 modular plug, the 8 metal contacts (pins) are divided into two rows that are staggered, while in a Category 5 modular plug, the 8 contacts are arranged in a straight line. Category 6 cable has a transmission rate of 1000Mbps, while Category 5 cable has a transmission rate of 100Mbps, which depends on whether the router is 100Mbps or 1000Mbps.

Considerations for Category 6 modular plug:

It is not recommended for users to make their own modular plugs in Category 6 systems because the electrical performance stability of self-made jumpers cannot be guaranteed due to limitations in the equipment and professional level of construction personnel at the construction site. The electrical performance may also differ from that of professionally manufactured jumpers. Therefore, the following requirements should be noted to improve the success rate of manually making Category 6 modular plugs:

(1) Minimize the length of the untwisted portion of the wire that is not inserted into the modular plug. Do not untwist all the stripped wires, as it will degrade the electrical performance of the jumper.

(2) Pay attention to arranging the wiring sequence according to the standard when threading the cable, and minimize the crossing of cables.

(3) After threading the wires through the modular plug, cut off any excess cable to align with one end of the modular plug. Insert the wires all the way into the front end of the modular plug's housing to ensure reliable contact.

(4) Control the pressure applied during crimping. Excessive force can cause the spring contacts to be pressed too deeply, affecting the reliability of the contact with the socket. Insufficient force can result in unreliable contact between the spring contacts and the wires. A portion of the cable's outer sheath should be inside the modular plug's housing, with the housing securing the outer sheath to prevent movement of the cable inside the modular plug, which can affect the stability of the electrical performance.

A modular plug is a standardized telecommunications network interface that provides interfaces for voice and data transmission. The modular plug was initially defined in the Universal Service Ordering Code (USOC) system of the Bell System in the United States and was used in the 1970s to provide computer-aided telephone equipment authorized by the Federal Communications Commission (FCC).

A modular plug is a type of plastic connector that can be inserted in a fixed direction and automatically prevents detachment. It is commonly referred to as a "modular plug" or "RJ-45 connector" in professional terms (RJ-45 is a network interface specification). Similar to the RJ-11 interface commonly used for telephone connections, the modular plug is often called a "crystal head." It derives its nickname from its transparent and shiny appearance. The modular plug is suitable for on-site termination between equipment or horizontal subsystems, and its housing is made of high-density polyethylene. Each end of the twisted pair wire is connected to a network card and a hub (or switch) by installing a modular plug.

description.en:
Description

Revolutionize Your Network with the 10-Gigabit Cat6A Tool-free RJ45 Plug

Looking for the ultimate Ethernet connector that delivers blazing-fast speed, top-tier durability, and effortless installation? Say hello to the 10-Gigabit Cat6A Tool-free RJ45 Plug, the next-generation Ethernet plug that outshines every other connector in the market. Designed with precision, speed, and convenience in mind, this short-body rj45 connector is perfect for both professional installers and DIY enthusiasts seeking a high-performance solution to their networking needs.

No tools? No problem. This rj45 plug offers an innovative tool-free design, allowing anyone to achieve flawless connections with ease. Whether you're working with Cat5E, Cat6, or Cat6A cables, this modular connector offers universal compatibility, ensuring a secure and stable connection every time.

 

 

Key Features:

Ultra-fast 10-Gigabit Ethernet Performance
Experience top-tier network speeds with this Cat6A connector. Whether you're streaming 4K videos, gaming online, or transferring large data files, this rj45 modular connector supports 10-Gigabit Ethernet, ensuring high-performance data transmission with minimal interference.

Tool-free, Hassle-free Installation
Unlike traditional rj45 plugs, this tool-free Ethernet connector eliminates the need for crimping tools, saving you time and frustration. Simply insert the wires into the short-body rj45 plug, snap it shut, and enjoy a rock-solid connection. Perfect for anyone from network professionals to first-time installers.

Compact Short-Body Design
The short-body rj45 connector is specifically engineered to fit into tight spaces where standard connectors might fail. Its streamlined design ensures that it can be used in challenging environments without compromising on performance.

Backward Compatibility
While optimized for Cat6A cables, this modular plug is backward compatible with Cat5E and Cat6 cables. So, whether you're upgrading your current setup or building a new network, this Ethernet plug delivers flexibility and future-proofing in one package.

Superior Build Quality
Built with high-quality materials, this Ethernet plug is designed for longevity. The solid and reliable rj45 modular connector ensures stable connections, making it perfect for both residential and commercial applications. With its robust housing, this modular connector can withstand the rigors of daily use.

Supports Power over Ethernet (PoE)
The 10-Gigabit Cat6A Tool-free RJ45 Plugalso supports Power over Ethernet (PoE), making it an excellent choice for powering devices like IP cameras, VoIP phones, and wireless access points, all while maintaining excellent network performance.

 

 

Why Choose Our 10-Gigabit Cat6A Tool-free RJ45 Plug?

Unmatched Speed
The 10-Gigabit Cat6A Tool-free RJ45 Plug delivers lightning-fast speeds, making it the perfect solution for modern network environments that demand high performance. Whether you're installing it for home use or in a large-scale office, this Ethernet connector ensures you get the best performance out of your network.

Easy Installation, Zero Complications
Don't let complicated tools or messy cables slow you down. The innovative tool-free design of this rj45 plug makes it one of the easiest connectors to install. Perfect for those who value simplicity without sacrificing performance.

Versatile Compatibility
This short-body rj45 connector supports a wide range of Ethernet cables, including Cat5E, Cat6, and Cat6A. Its versatility ensures that no matter what your network demands are, you can rely on this modular plug to deliver.

Compact and Convenient
The short-body design of this rj45 connector makes it the perfect solution for tight spaces, such as network cabinets or crowded workspaces. It's compact but packed with power, providing the same high-speed data transfer in a smaller, more convenient form.

Built to Last
Durability is key when it comes to network components, and the 10-Gigabit Cat6A Tool-free RJ45 Plug is no exception. Built with premium materials, this modular connector offers long-lasting performance, ensuring that your network runs smoothly for years to come.

 

Key Applications:

Home Networking
Upgrade your home network with the 10-Gigabit Cat6A Tool-free RJ45 Plug, perfect for streaming, online gaming, and smart home device integration. Its high-speed performance and tool-free design make it ideal for quick home installations.

Commercial Installations
For businesses that demand high-speed internet connections, the 10-Gigabit Ethernet connector is an absolute must-have. It's reliable, fast, and built to handle high-volume data transfers, ensuring seamless operation for offices, data centers, and other professional environments.

PoE Device Integration
Need to power security cameras, VoIP phones, or wireless access points? The rj45 modular connector supports Power over Ethernet (PoE), making it a perfect fit for devices that require both power and data over a single Ethernet cable.

 

How It Works:

Prepare the Cable: Strip the Ethernet cable, exposing the inner wires.

Insert Wires: Align the color-coded wires with the slots inside the rj45 plug.

Snap Shut: Press the connector closed, securing the wires in place.

Connect: Insert the rj45 plug into your network device or Ethernet port, and you're good to go!

 

Final Thoughts

When you need a high-quality, fast, and easy-to-install Ethernet plug, the 10-Gigabit Cat6A Tool-free RJ45 Plug is the only choice that checks all the boxes. It delivers unmatched speed, hassle-free installation, superior build quality, and the flexibility to work with Cat5E, Cat6, and Cat6A cables. Its short-body design makes it ideal for tight spaces, and with support for Power over Ethernet, this rj45 modular connector is ready for any network application.

Don't settle for ordinary when you can have extraordinary. Elevate your network with the best rj45 connector on the market. Try the 10-Gigabit Cat6A Tool-free RJ45 Plug today and experience Ethernet like never before.

Versatile Compatibility
This short-body rj45 connector supports a wide range of Ethernet cables, including Cat5E, Cat6, and Cat6A. Its versatility ensures that no matter what your network demands are, you can rely on this modular plug to deliver.

Compact and Convenient
The short-body design of this rj45 connector makes it the perfect solution for tight spaces, such as network cabinets or crowded workspaces. It's compact but packed with power, providing the same high-speed data transfer in a smaller, more convenient form.

Built to Last
Durability is key when it comes to network components, and the 10-Gigabit Cat6A Tool-free RJ45 Plug is no exception. Built with premium materials, this modular connector offers long-lasting performance, ensuring that your network runs smoothly for years to come.

 

Key Applications:

Home Networking
Upgrade your home network with the 10-Gigabit Cat6A Tool-free RJ45 Plug, perfect for streaming, online gaming, and smart home device integration. Its high-speed performance and tool-free design make it ideal for quick home installations.

Commercial Installations
For businesses that demand high-speed internet connections, the 10-Gigabit Ethernet connector is an absolute must-have. It's reliable, fast, and built to handle high-volume data transfers, ensuring seamless operation for offices, data centers, and other professional environments.

PoE Device Integration
Need to power security cameras, VoIP phones, or wireless access points? The rj45 modular connector supports Power over Ethernet (PoE), making it a perfect fit for devices that require both power and data over a single Ethernet cable.

 

How It Works:

Prepare the Cable: Strip the Ethernet cable, exposing the inner wires.

Insert Wires: Align the color-coded wires with the slots inside the rj45 plug.

Snap Shut: Press the connector closed, securing the wires in place.

Connect: Insert the rj45 plug into your network device or Ethernet port, and you're good to go!

 

Final Thoughts

When you need a high-quality, fast, and easy-to-install Ethernet plug, the 10-Gigabit Cat6A Tool-free RJ45 Plug is the only choice that checks all the boxes. It delivers unmatched speed, hassle-free installation, superior build quality, and the flexibility to work with Cat5E, Cat6, and Cat6A cables. Its short-body design makes it ideal for tight spaces, and with support for Power over Ethernet, this rj45 modular connector is ready for any network application.

Don't settle for ordinary when you can have extraordinary. Elevate your network with the best rj45 connector on the market. Try the 10-Gigabit Cat6A Tool-free RJ45 Plug today and experience Ethernet like never before.

FTP CAT6A RJ45 modular plug 4up4down connector 8-position, 8-wire.

RJ45 Copper shield CAT6A three pieces design with conductive load bar ensure that wiring more stable and solid.

The modular is suitable for solid or stranded unshielded twisted pair patch cable with inner wire diameter of Ø1.1mm or Ø1.0mm.

description.en:
Description

Cat7 shielded RJ45 Plug, compatible with rj45 plug and keystone module functions. The complete set of products includes a zinc alloy metal shell crystal head, dust cover, gasket, separator cover, adjustable sleeve, and nylon cable tie. It is suitable for Cat7/6A shielded Ethernet cables, suitable for 23-24AWG wire gauge cables, or large diameter Ethernet cables with a single-strand copper conductor of 0.5-0.58mm diameter (1.3-1.5mm outer diameter of the core). Experience 10G Ethernet speed with high-speed transmission without packet loss.

1. Suitable for communication socket connections between equipment in the data center and work areas.

2. Compact design with clear universal wiring sequence labels on the module, enabling accurate termination.

3. The shielded housing adopts an integral die-casting process with a fully enclosed shielding structure, reducing electromagnetic interference.

4. Compliant with Category 7 transmission standards, achieving transmission performance of 10GB per second (ETL-tested with certification), and modules from the same series have passed Category 8 testing.

5. The housing material of the termination interface is made of PC material, and the IDC wire clamps are made of phosphor bronze. They support termination 300 times or more. The eight contact pins are made of phosphor bronze with a gold plating of 6-50U", rated for 1500 or more plug and unplug cycles.

6. Tool-free design for easy installation. The circular protective groove at the rear end protects the cable, reducing excessive bending and detachment after termination.

7. Backward compatible and can be used with lower category systems, reducing investment loss for users.

description.en:
Description

COBTEL Gold Shielded RJ45 CAT7 Connector has gold plated connector jacket, 50Micron gold-plated contacts, 2-piece design with a wire-loading bar to support the cable to be quickly locked into the position for easy installation. Compatible with solid and stranded CAT7 cable ethernet cables. When the shielded Cat7 connector is connected with Cat7 ethernet cables, will achieve better data transmission, and higher signal strength. Meanwhile, the UL94-2 PC plug housing makes the connectors outstanding for long-lasting network maintenance.



Specification


Product Name

Gold Shielded RJ45 CAT7 Connector

50Micron gold-plated

Features:


* Gold shielded RJ45 CAT7 Connector is suitable for wire 22~24AWG.

* Compatible with either solid or stranded wire

* Compatible with TIA/EIA568B.
* Excellent performance provides long-term life for your Ethernet cables.
* UL/RoHS/Reach/IEC/CE/ISO9001:2015.


Applications:


* Datacenter.

* Artificial intelligence (AI), Internet of Things (IoT)
* Suitable for connection and signal of hospitals, schools, commercial, etc.

name.zh: Tail Clamp CAT7 Shielded RJ45 Plug

brief.en: Streaming media, whether data, audio or video, is growing rapidly, and users need more bandwidth. This means that larger cables, commonly referred to as cat6e, cat6a,cat7 and cat8 are usually shielded. In order to obtain the best performance, the selection of connectors and crimping tools is very important. Cobtel cat7/10gig termination system not only meets but also exceeds these requirements.

description.en:
Description

COBTEL CAT8 RJ45 plug connector supports up to 40G speeds with CAT8 cable. True Cat8 speed is perfect for ultra-high-speed applications. It is compliant with Fluke Channel for double-shielded solid Lan cable 22AWG to 24AWG. Zinc die-casting with nickel-plated and phosphor bronze 50U" gold-plated. This tool-less plug has a variety of colors, no tool required to terminate, and has wide applications suitable for most of the devices with RJ45 interface.

Zinc Alloy, Nickel Plated

Contract Holder

PC, UL94V-0

RJ45

1.5Amps

100mΩ Maximum

* CAT8 RJ45 plug connector is suitable for wire 22~24AWG
* Cable jacket diameter 6.5mm ~ 9.0mm
* Compatible with solid or stranded wire
* No tool is required to terminate
* Supports 40Gbps ( 4 times faster than Cat.6A )
* Excellent performance with POE++ applications
* UL/RoHS

brief.en: Cat8 shielded tool-free rj45 connector for 40G networks. No need for a crimping tool, making installation more convenient. It is reusable and features a zinc alloy 360-degree shielded housing (surface plating + sandblasting treatment) with an industrial IP20 waterproof rating and corrosion-resistant properties. The 50U gold-plated three-pronged contact provides a compact size and easy plug-and-play. It is equipped with a waterproof and dustproof sleeve, and an integrated PCB board to enhance network speed and reduce latency during transmission, minimizing signal loss.

description.en:
Description

Cat8 shielded tool-free rj45 connector for 40G networks. No need for a crimping tool, making installation more convenient. It is reusable and features a zinc alloy 360-degree shielded housing (surface plating + sandblasting treatment) with an industrial IP20 waterproof rating and corrosion-resistant properties. The 50U gold-plated three-pronged contact provides a compact size and easy plug-and-play. It is equipped with a waterproof and dustproof sleeve, and an integrated PCB board to enhance network speed and reduce latency during transmission, minimizing signal loss.
1.  Compliant with the performance requirements of the Cat8 Cables network, providing a usable bandwidth of 600MHz or higher.
2.  RJ45 sockets support both T568A and T568B universal wiring sequences. Clear universal wiring sequence labels are marked on the module, enabling accurate and fast termination.
3.  The housing material of the termination interface is made of ABS/PC engineering plastic, complying with ROHS and REACH environmental requirements. It has stable color consistency and UV resistance.
4.   The IDC wire clamps are made of phosphor bronze (grade 8-03) and can withstand termination for 300 times or more. They are suitable for 22-26 AWG cables.
5.   The termination punch-down slots are designed with 110 and 45-degree angled fixed positions, providing good airtight protection and ensuring tight contact points.
6.   PCB wiring is designed for balanced lines and employs excellent manufacturing processes to reduce interference. With high margin compliance, it is backward compatible and can be used with CAT7 and lower category systems, reducing investment loss for users.
7.   The contact pins are designed with high and low pins to achieve maximum balance between wire pairs.
8.   The contact pins have a 50μm gold-plated layer on the contact points, rated for 1000 plug and unplug cycles.

FTP CAT8 RJ45 PLUG TWO-PIECE.

CAT8 RJ45 Plug connector, unshielded 8P8C modular plug has two pieces for cable wire gauge 22AWG to 26AWG.

Each connector is designed for solid or stranded unshielded twisted pair lan cable.

Modular plugs comply with RoHS and Reach, support ISO/IEC and ANSI/TIA, and comply with UL1863,IEC62321.

The cable to plug tensile strangth 20pound/min, and suitable for cable outlet diametar 6.0mm to 8.5mm.

brief.en:
FTP CAT8 RJ45 PLUG TWO-PIECE with boot

Shielded CAT8 RJ45 Plug connector, 8P8C modular plug two pieces for cable wire gauge 22AWG to 26AWG. Integrated strain reliefs and over-modeld strain reliefs.

This CAT8 UPT connector fits solid or stranded unshielded twisted pair wire with cable outlet diametar 6.0mm to 8.5mm.

50U“ gold plating over the RJ45 pins will improve signal conductivity.

This 8 pin 8 conductor RJ45 modular plug fits Ethernet cable with both solid and stranded conductors.

Ultimately the shileded RJ45 modular plug will save time and money through maximizing efficiency.

description.en:
Description

COBTEL Cat6 Pass Through RJ45 Connectors allows the push-pull method to hold the cable jacket in the plug as much as possible to minimize crosstalk. Triple-prong gold-plated contacts will improve the performance by 33% because the contact with the wire core is more sufficient, and the high-speed transmission is faster and more stable.

Suitable for conductor insulation diameters from Ø1.0mm-1.1mm(0.03937''-0.0433'')

Compatible with 23~26AWG stranded or solid conductors.

Suitable for max cable jacket diameter up to: 7.0mm(0.2756")

50U'', 30U'', 15U'', 6U'', 3U'', Flash


Specification


Product Name

Cat6 Pass Through RJ45 Connector

Gold Plating:

50U", 30U', 15U'', 6U", 3U", flash

Plug Housing

Polycarbonate, UL94V-0 or UL94V-2

Color

Transparent or another color

Interface

RJ45

Positions/Loaded Contacts

8/8

Contacts

3prongs brass

Contact Base Material

Brass

Conductor Type

Solid or Stranded cable

Contact Type

Triple prong

Cable Wire Guage

Compatible with 23AWG to 26 AWG

Max Cable Jacket OD

7.0mm(0.2756")

Conductor Insulation OD

Ø1.0mm-1.1mm(0.03937''-0.0433'')

Operation Temperature

-10°C~60°C

Storage Temperature

-40°C~85°C

Humidity

10% to 90% RH(Non-condensing)

Durability

750cycles min

Pulling Force

20N Max

Rated Current

125V AC, 1.5A

Insulation Resistance

500mΩ/at least 100V DC/min


Features:

  • The test results are compiled with RoHS and REACH;

  • 100 microns of nickel under plated and gold selected BSI EN60603-7/IEC60603-7;

  • 50 microns of 24ct gold plating on top of the nickel plating;

  • Safety Standard UL1863 NO.E137614(DUXR2);

  • CSA approval No.LR90513;


Package:

Packaging quantity: 2500pcs

Packaging Type: Bag/Box/Carton

brief.en:
UTP CAT5E RJ45 PLUG pass through plug.

UTP CAT5E RJ45 pass through plug, also called standard easy plug,

allows the wires to pass through the plug, then the twists in each pair can be pulled closer to the contacts and come with high performance but do not need a load bar.

One-piece design eliminates loading bar and liner, it is easy to verify the proper wiring order. Solid or stranded unshielded twisted pair patch cable 23~26AWG.

Standards Met IEC62321, CE, ISO 9001:2015, UL1863 and CAN/CSA-C22.2(UL File E508595),IEC

brief.en:

brief.en:
COBTEL CAT7 pass-through shielded RJ45 plug, also called CAT7 pass-through STP modular plug, allows the wires to pass through the plug. The one-piece design eliminates the loading bar and liner, it is easy to verify the proper wiring order.

Cat7 STP 8P8C modular plugs fit solid or stranded unshielded twisted pair LAN cables from 23 to 26AWG.

The twists in each pair can be pulled closer to the contacts and come with high performance but do not need a load bar.

brief.en:
Material made of Zinc alloy, stable transmission, shielded and anti-interference to protect internal cables from external interference.
Simple operation, convenient and fast without the need for crimping pliers, suitable for 22~24AWG wire diameter. The quick wiring port is reusable, with eight upper and lower sharp teeth that grip the cable to resist tension, and the metal spring sheet is more fatigue-resistant. The highest level of gold plating is 50U.

description.en:
Description

Material made of Zinc alloy, stable transmission, shielded and anti-interference to protect internal cables from external interference.

Simple operation, convenient and fast without the need for crimping pliers, suitable for 22~24AWG wire diameter. The quick wiring port is reusable, with eight upper and lower sharp teeth that grip the cable to resist tension, and the metal spring sheet is more fatigue-resistant. The highest level of gold plating is 50U.

The screwdriver card slot design allows the wire block to be locked tightly with the tool.

FC interface for industrial Ethernet cable. Four integrated insulation piercing contacts.

RJ45 interface device for industrial Ethernet. One RJ45 interface.

Transmission speed: 100Mbit/s.

TP cable length: 0-100m.

Operating temperature: -20°C to 70°C.

Transport/storage temperature: -40°C to 80°C.

Relative humidity during operation: <90%.

Dimensions (LxWxH): 54.0 x 13.7 x 16mm.

Weight: Approximately 25g.

description.en:
Description

COBTEL toolless modular connectors are made of PC, and the fire rating reaches UL 94V-0. The pin is made of high-quality copper, with 100u" nickel plated, and the contact surface is 50U gold plated.


Specification

Product Name

CAT6A toolless modular connector

Contact material

Copper Gold Plated

Material

Plastic

Type

RJ45

Brand

COBTEL/CNCOB/OEM/ODM

White/Blue

CN2020212238204

Place of Origin

Guangdong China

Packaging detail

1piece/PE Bag 400pcs/carton



Designing advantages


1. True Cat6A Performance: Cat6A 24K Gold Plated RJ45 Full Spec Connector supports 10G speeds at 500Mhz;

2. Toolless modular connector is perfect for ultra-high-speed applications such as HBase-T graphics. Backward compatible from 10GBase-T, 10 gigabit Ethernet.

3. Easy to Use: Open-hinged impact tool-free design for easy assembly, which is beautiful, safe, and stable! No need for network pliers.

4. Toolless modular connector has highly compatible: The tool-free RJ45 Connector support cable OD specification of 4.5~9.0mm or 22AWG~26AWG.

5. Stable: With double-row leads, assembling is simple and convenient.



How about COBTEL Precision?


A: Cobtel has nearly 3 decades of experience in manufacturing RJ45 connectors and Ethernet Cables etc. COBTEL production capacity for modular plugs is 5 million/day, the biggest in the world.

COBTEL are ODM and OEM for many world-famous big brands. Benefiting from our professional team, modern equipment, and advanced inspection instruments, our domestic and oversea customers speak highly of our efficiency and quality.

COBTEL products are UL, CE, CSA, SGS, and 3C certified, so customers are worry-free to import from us.

COBTEL has a self-owned industrial park in Dongguan, which is close to Hong Kong and Shenzhen China. It is very convenient for you to visit us during our further cooperation.

name.en: Cat7 10-Gigabit Ethernet SFTP Toolless Industrial Ethernet Connector
name.zh: Cat7 10-Gigabit Ethernet SFTP Toolless Industrial Ethernet Connector

brief.en: A. Produced in a quantity of 20,000, the pull ring design is more suitable for plugging and unplugging in tight spaces, featuring a compact and precise design. B. Meeting the performance requirements of Category 7 components, providing a usable bandwidth of up to 800MHz, suitable for...
brief.zh: A. Produced in a quantity of 20,000, the pull ring design is more suitable for plugging and unplugging in tight spaces, featuring a compact and precise design. B. Meeting the performance requirements of Category 7 components, providing a usable bandwidth of up to 800MHz, suitable for...

description.en:
Description

A. Produced in a quantity of 20,000, the pull ring design is more suitable for plugging and unplugging in tight spaces, featuring a compact and precise design.
B. Meeting the performance requirements of Category 7 components, providing a usable bandwidth of up to 800MHz, suitable for communication socket connections between equipment and work areas.
C. The shielded housing adopts an integral die-casting process, with a fully enclosed shielding structure, effectively preventing electromagnetic interference, in compliance with industry standards for shielding effectiveness.
D. The housing material of the termination interface is made of PC material, and the pull ring is made of custom material, capable of withstanding over 300 pulls. All materials meet the REACH certification standards.
E. The IDC wire clamps are made of phosphor bronze, with a termination capability of over 250 times, suitable for 22-26AWG cables.
F. The termination punch-down slot features a 45-degree angled toothed design, facilitating easy termination by piercing through the cable insulation.
G. PCB wiring is designed for balanced lines to reduce interference. With high margin compliance (through ETL individual testing), it is backward compatible and can be used with lower category systems to avoid user investment loss.
H. Spiral locking design with a circular protective groove at the rear end to prevent excessive bending and detachment of the cable after termination.
I. The contact pins are arranged in a three-layer design, achieving maximum balance between wire pairs. The contact pins have a choice of 6μm-50μm gold plating and can withstand 1000 plug and unplug cycles.
J. Fixed wiring, not easily detached.

name.en: Industrial Threaded Twist-on RJ45 Plug PC Boot
name.zh: Industrial Threaded Twist-on RJ45 Plug PC Boot

brief.en: After continuous efforts and innovation by our R&D personnel, a new type of threaded twist-on rj45 plug boot are finally being introduced to you. This new boot is designed to connect with M12 fine-toothed nuts and is primarily used for signal transmission in industrial robots, industrial cameras, and other equipment. It is suitable for industrial drag chains and the connection of flexible cables, effectively protecting against signal loss caused by cable dragging.
brief.zh: After continuous efforts and innovation by our R&D personnel, a new type of threaded twist-on rj45 plug boot are finally being introduced to you. This new boot is designed to connect with M12 fine-toothed nuts and is primarily used for signal transmission in industrial robots, industrial cameras, and other equipment. It is suitable for industrial drag chains and the connection of flexible cables, effectively protecting against signal loss caused by cable dragging.

description.en:
Description

Introducing COBTEL's New Industrial Threaded Knob Sheath for Signal Transmission

 

COBTEL's new industrial threaded knob sheath is finally here! This sheath is primarily used for signal transmission in industrial robots, industrial cameras, and other equipment. It is suitable for use in industrial drag chains and flexible cable connections. Let's unveil its mysteries.

 

I. Application Scenarios:

The threaded sleeve + nut, when assembled with a side-winged rj45 plug, can resist bending and increase the cable's tensile strength. It is suitable for the connection and signal transmission of high-end server rooms, high-definition surveillance, data centers, Internet+, the Internet of Things (IoT), artificial intelligence (AI), hospitals, schools, public places, and 5G equipment.

 

II. Product Design Advantages:

This product has an aesthetically pleasing appearance, in line with modern aesthetics. Both sides have reserved space for logo engraving, allowing for customized branding for customers. The sleeve is a new product independently developed by our company and possesses complete intellectual property rights.
After the sleeve is assembled with the nut and rj45 plug, it can withstand more than 3000 swing tests and meet the requirements of the tensile strength test at 89N/MIN., with no abnormal appearance.
The new sleeve can accommodate cable sizes ranging from OD6.0mm to 7.5mm. After the cable is assembled and tightened with the nut, it provides stable dragging, making it particularly suitable for drag chain cables used in industrial robotic arms.

 

III. Material Selection and Performance:

The material of the threaded sleeve is PA66, with a flame retardant rating of UL94V-0. This material has better elasticity and a longer lifespan in terms of the number of presses compared to PC material, nearly 7-8 times longer.
The surface of the sleeve adopts the VDI24 standard, providing a comfortable touch experience.
The rear end of the sleeve has good elasticity, and when secured with the nut through twisting, it ensures a firmer connection for jumper cables.
The material of the nut is PC, with a flame retardant rating of UL94V-0. Its surface is designed with a rotating strip pattern, making it easy to twist without slipping, and it can be well-matched with the sleeve, providing a secure connection for jumper cables.
Both the sleeve and nut are available in different colors to meet various customer preferences and requirements.

description.en:
Description

COBTEL RJ45 Modular Boot PVC is suitable for six types of crystal heads. The raw material is colorful PVC. It is beautiful and can effectively protect the crystal head. This sheath is thin, safe and waterproof.


Product Name

RJ45 Modular Boot PVC

Application

Ethernet connection

Connector Type

RJ45

Main Material

PVC

Color

clear

OD

6.5


Feature:


1. Dustproof and waterproof, guaranteed

The modular plug protective cover is made of environmentally friendly materials, which can effectively prevent dust and water from entering the crystal head and cause poor contact.


2. Thin and firm, more secure

There is a barb system under the sheath, which can completely bite the modular plug, not easy to fall off, more reliable, simple and safe.


Applications:


Home Improvement Wiring

Office Network Cabling

LAN wiring

Engineering room wiring


Method of use


1. Pass the cable through the modular plug sheath, and peel off the outer skin with a wire stripper at 2CM

2. Minus the cross frame and anti-drawing inside

3. Arrange the cables in the standard order and cut them flat

4. Insert the cable into the front end of the modular plugmodular plug

5. Fasten the sheath to the modular plug, put it into the crimping tool, and push it to the right position for crimping.


RJ45 Modular Boots are a crucial part of protecting your data network. It protects the connector from cable snags while providing strain relief as well.

description.en:
Description

RJ45 protective cover protect your network equipment, avoid network issues caused by dust, easy to install and remove. The surface should be smooth, without scratches, damage, deformation, and other effects on the appearance of the image. Materials and colors should be made according to the production sheet.


Product Information


Product Name

RJ45 Protective Cover

Brand Name

CNCOB/COBTEL/OEM/ODM

RJ45 modular jack, RJ45 female connector

Material

PC (PC materials pass UL )

Color

Black

94V-2

100pcs

Bag/Box

-10°C~60°C

Storage Temperature Range

-40°C~68°C

10% to 90% RH

ROHS and UL ( PC materials pass UL)

100pcs per bag, then 500pcs in a big bag


Features:

  • Protect Network Equipment: By blocking the port you can prevent dust from getting inside your switches, routers, servers, and media converters, preventing network errors and potential downtime caused by dust and debris in open slots.

  • Easy to Install and Remove: These port protectors are easy to insert and pull-out, out without disrupting adjacent ports or cables.

  • Avoid Network Issues Caused by Dust: ensure the open ports on the device are away from dust and debris. Stop the breakdown from the dirt and debris for open RJ45 ports and unused plugs.

  • These RJ45 protect covers are complied TTA, with free lifetime technical support.


Applications:

  • Cobtel RJ45 protective cover for cable maintenance.

  • Installed in the data center.

  • Equipment in the network closet

  • Protective caps for RJ45 plugs.

description.en:
Description

1.  The 6P4C voice module is suitable for installation in AMP interfaces, panels, desktop boxes, and other applications.
2.  Complies with the RJ11 port socket standard.
3.  The contact pins are made of phosphor bronze with a gold-plated layer, with durability for over 1000 insertions and removals. The IDC termination clamp is also made of phosphor bronze with over 250 terminations.
4.  The housing material of the interface is made of PC/ABS engineering material.
5.  It adopts a 110 tool with a 90-degree vertical termination method and has a dust-proof design.

description.en:
Description

• Material of plastic parts: PC UL94V-0

• Standard 110 and LSA dual-use punching tools make operation more convenient

• IDC clips with 45 degrees angled design to ensure the cable's reliable connection

• According to the standard of ISO/IEC 11801 & TIA/EIA 568-B.2 Cat.6A

• Golden plated Pins, IDC clips, and internal PCB board match well and provide the best performance

• Whole Pin nickel plated with connect pins golden plated prevent oxidation, lasting the service life

• IDC clips: Tinned phosphor bronze nickel plated with dependability 250 times

 

Electrical Characteristics • DC Resistance: ≤300mΩ

• Contact Resistance: ≤20mΩ

• Dielectric strength: 1000V(AC750V)1min 

• Insulation Resistance: ≥1000MΩ

 

Application

• Structured cabling transmitting data, voice, and video

• Applied for Cat.5E and lower Classes

• Suitable for working area, central room, managing room, equipment room, and subsystem applications

 

UTP toolless RJ45 cat6A keystone jack
 

Features:
1.100% passed the FLUKE DTX-1800 test.
2.15 years quality guarantee.
3. IDC fits for 22-26 AWG solid wire.
4. Insertion Life:1500 times MIN
5. Punching Life:500 times MIN
6.Meet TIA/EIA-T568A and T568B category 6A requirements.
7. It has been designed to exceed TIA/EIA specifications. The bandwidths of category 6A are up to 500 MHZ,10Gbps.

 

Material:
Housing Body: PC UL94V-2 (Customized UL94-V0)
IDC Housing: PC
IDC Contact: Phosphor Bronze with Nickel Plating 100u"
Contact Pin: Phosphor Bronze with Gold Plating 3u"-50u"
Gold Plating Thickness: Default 3u", customized 6u"-50u"
PCB: FR4 1.6mm(0.04u") thickness,2 layers
