description.en:
Description

COBTEL CAT5e RJ45 Toolless Keystone Jack is an significant part of networking applications such as high speed voice, data or video network. These femal connectors support to insert multi-conductor Ethernet cable into wall plates, patch panels, or surface mount boxes.

This keystone jacks are availale in over ten colors to fit your different projects.

With its tight form design, this unshielded CAT5E keystone jack is suitable for high density networking applications.


 Specification:

Product Name

CAT5e RJ45 Toolless Keystone Jack

Front Connection :

Copper Alloy with 50Uμ inch Gold over Nickel

Rear Connection

Copper Alloy with Nickel Plating IDC

Connetor Body

Plastic UL94V-0

Data Category

Category 5e

Plug/Jack Compatibility

RJ45

Conductor Type

Solid or Stranded cable

Suitable Conductor

23 to 26 AWG

Operating Temperature Range

-10°C~60°C

Storage Temperature Range

-40°C~70°C

Termination Front Connection

Mated Connection

Termination Rear Connection Durability

1000 cycles

RoHS

Compliant to the Restriction of Hazardous

TIA/EIA Comliance

Category 5, ISO/IEC 11801

Other Standards

IEC60603-7 and ANSI/TIA-1096-A,UL 1863

Suitable Application

IBDN System 1200, TIA Category 5E, ISO Class D

 

Features:


  • This CAT5e RJ45 Toolless Keystone Jack is intended for use with 23~26AWG solid or standred ethernet cable.

  • Easy to use, comes with 180° level for easy of installtion and retaining clip for secure connection.

  • Its small form factor make the most efficient usage of a limited networking space.

 

We are thankful that you have interst and thank you for coming our Cobtel website.

If you have any question or need any support, do not hesitate to call us at (00) 86 13829117062 or email us at info@cobtel.com.

This keystone jacks are availale in over ten colors to fit your different projects.

With its tight form design, this unshielded CAT5E keystone jack is suitable for high density networking applications.

description.en:
Description

COBTEL CAT5E RJ45 Shielded Jack 180-degree tool-free design provides maximum snap-shut confidence.

Compatible with 23 to 26 AWG solid or stranded copper conductors.

Component level rated, tested up to 250MHZ. Suitable for 1 Gigabit up to 328 feet.

UL, F.C.C, and RoHS compliant.

Supports 568A/B compliant insures compatibility and reliability in your application.


Specification


Product Name

CAT5E RJ45 Shielded Jack

Gold Plating:

50U”

IDC Housing Material

Polycarbonate

IDC Terminals

Nickel Plated Phosphor Bronze

Fire Safety

UL94V-0

Jack Housing Material

Nickel Plated Zinc

Interface Type

RJ45

Solid or Stranded cable

Suitable Conductor

23 to 26 AWG

-10°C~60°C

Storage Temperature

-40°C~70°C

Insertion Durability Rating

750cycles min

Compressive strength

DC1000V/1 min

Insulation Resistance

Min 500mΩ

Contact Resistance

Max 20mΩ



Features:

  • Easy installation without a wire cutter, the network cable can be easily fixed without tools and the disassembly is more convenient.

  • The connection is firm and can be repeatedly wired. The IDC segment is made of high-hardness phosphor bronze material, and the wire core clips are tightly fitted, and the contact is stable and continuous.

  • 50U" gold-plated contacts, resistant to plugging and anti-oxidation. The pins are gold-plated, resistant to plugging and anti-oxidation for a long time, and the network speed is stable as before.

  • Reject electromagnetic interference, and the transmission is faster and more stable. Zinc alloy shielding shell, effective anti-interference.

  • Compatible panels, compatible with 86 panels of various brands.

Packaging Type: Bag/Box/Carton 480*390*253mm

brief.en: Cobtel RJ45 keystone jack designed for use with a wall-plate for network connection. Simply insert the leads in the coloring order you wish and clamp them down. Category 5e Keystone Jacks are 8-Position 8-Conductor (8P8C) and use the same 110 Punch Down style that most patch panels use.The main benefit for keystone couplers is that patch cables can be plugged directly into both sides and requires no rear termination.

Features


* Ethernet Jacket RJ45 for Category 5e channel network, provides superior function and alleviates external crosstalk.

* Support Cat5e automatic negotiation to be compatible with hybrid network server bandwidth from 10Mhz to 100Mhz.

* IDC modules compatible with both T568A and T568B wiring patterns.

* Cat5e connectors female allow a cable diameter of 0.51mm (Positive Tolerance: +0.01mm; Negative Tolerance: -0.03mm).

* Keystone Jack will work with any keystone patch panel, wall plate, or surface-mount box.

* The number of plugging and unplugging cans is 750 times min.

* UL1863 and IEC60603-7 and ANSI/TIA-568C.2 are met.

COBTEL RJ45 CAT5E Keystone Jack has the feature of precise design, fitting all 86 face plate, and high quality material and best performance.

POE is accepted and adapting to shielded Ethernet cables from 26 to 23 AWG is met. COBTEL RJ45 CAT5E Keystone Jack RJ45 exceed all performance parameters specified in the Category 5E standard.

Our RJ45 CAT5E keystone jack shield, its shielding material or the housing is znic alloy.

Different from tin plated copper sheet or stainless steel as shielding material, zinc alloy has much better full shielding performance, structure reliability and service life.

description.en:
Description

The COBTEL CAT6 Shielded Keystone Jack is a component-level jack. It is suitable for shielded Ethernet cables from 26 to 23 AWG. It exceeds all performance parameters specified in the Category 6 standard.

It is a toolless RJ45 jack. The Assembly degree is 180. It is mainly made of zinc alloy, PC, and phosphor bronze. It also has a snap-in feature to enhance the stability of the connection.


Specification

Product Name

CAT6 Shielded Keystone Jack

Application

Ethernet connection

Connector Type

RJ45

Main Material

Zinc alloy, PC, phosphor bronze

Bandwidth Support

250Mhz

Color

Silver

Item Size

35.1x16.5x20.1cm

Wire cable

24~22awg solid or stranded

Storage Temperature

-40°C to +70°C

Working Temperature

-10°C to +60°C


Feature:

1. These Cat6 jacks allow you to connect two Cat5e/6 patch cables for use in Gigabit Ethernet networks or digital signage in outdoor applications and other areas that require protection from harsh environments. It inserts into an industrial-grade siding or surface mount box to create a watertight seal. The included dust cap protects the shielded RJ45 coupler from dust, debris, and moisture when not in use. Support Cat6 automatic negotiation to be compatible with hybrid network server bandwidth from 10Mhz to 250Mhz;

2. It resists EMI/RFI line noise that interferes with Ethernet or audio/video signals and can distort or corrupt data. Heavy machinery commonly found in motors, power cables, welding equipment, and other industrial applications generates EMI and RFI.Cat6 Jack allows cable diameter 0.57 0.01/-0.03MM;

3. Cat6 FTP Keystone Jack is used mainly to connect two RJ45 patch cords together in order to extend the whole cable link length. It has an RJ45 female socket on each side, compatible with the UTP/STP patch cords.



Click and browse more Cat6 keystone jack


To see our factory's production capacity and domestic and international certification. Click About Us

>Meet UL 94V-0 Flame Test

Company Introduction

COBTEL is located in Guangdong, China, starting from 2006, and it is a professional high-tech enterprise, that includes production, sales, and service. We mainly produce RJ45 Connectors, keystone jacks, patch cords, etc.

It has built an Integrated manufacturing value chain from R&D, mold design, mold fabrication, metal stamping, plastic injection, automatic assembling, to auto packing, thus a stable quality and fast delivery assured. Our molding machine and stamping machines are highly precise to 0.01mm, making sure each product meet customers' requirement.

COBTEL is the largest RJ45 Modular Plug factory in the world with daily output of 5 million pieces. This production capacity allows us to manufacture for the world's top structured cabling brands, and fulfill big orders efficiently at lower costs. With strong R&D, COBTEL build an integrated product line of connectors, keystone jacks, and patch cord that matches best to secure faster data transfer safely. 

Every year COBTEL invests 5% of its revenue in Research and Development so that our technology always leads ahead in the market.

Independent and sleek design, compact and aesthetically pleasing. 3. PCB board with a balanced wiring design,...
brief.zh: Product Description: 1. Meets the standards of Category 6A transmission, suitable for communication socket connections between devices and work areas in Gigabit Ethernet applications. 2. Independent and sleek design, compact and aesthetically pleasing. 3. PCB board with a balanced wiring design,...

description.en:
Description

Product Description:
1.  Meets the standards of Category 6A transmission, suitable for communication socket connections between devices and work areas in Gigabit Ethernet applications.
2.  Independent and sleek design, compact and aesthetically pleasing.
3.  PCB board with a balanced wiring design, reduces interference, high margin for compatibility, and is backward compatible with lower category systems to avoid investment loss for users.
4.  RJ45 sockets support both T568A and T568B universal wiring schemes, with clear labeling of the universal wiring scheme on the module for accurate and fast termination.
5.  The housing material of the interface is made of high-quality PC material, and the IDC termination clamp is made of phosphor bronze, ensuring more than 250 terminations and suitable for 23 AWG cables.
6.  The termination slot is designed at a 45-degree angle, making it easy to insert and terminate the cable.
7.  The rear termination cap has a locking design to protect the cable from excessive bending, disconnection, and contact point protection.
8.  The contact pins are designed with different heights to achieve maximum wire pair balance and ensure tight contact.
9.  The contact pins have a gold-plated layer ranging from 6μm to 50μm, with durability for up to 1000 insertions and removals.
10.  Can be used in conjunction with the Australian faceplates produced by our factory. This series offers four options: CAT6A, CAT6, CAT5E, and CAT3 for selection.

Description

2.  The IDC termination block is made of environmentally friendly phosphor bronze, with a termination life of 250 times or more, suitable for 23-26AWG cables.
3.  The termination jack features a 45-degree angled and toothed design, allowing for reliable contact and easy piercing of cable insulation without the need for tools.

6.  This specification offers three models for ordering: CAT5E, CAT6, and CAT6A.

description.en:
Description

COBTEL Cat6 Wall Jack has passed TIA/EIA and ISO standards and uses COBTEL network cables. The test value of permanent links exceeds the requirements of ANSI/TIA568-C.2, and the straightness is guaranteed, which is trustworthy.

Compared with the super five categories, all parameters have been greatly improved. It supports the construction of Gigabit Ethernet (1000Mbps) and supports the upcoming 2.5Gbps network requirements. In a specific wiring environment, it supports a maximum transmission rate of 10Gbps. Built-in crosstalk compensation PCB, improve the NEXT (near-end crosstalk) margin and increase the transmission frequency to 250MHz.


Specification

Product Name

Cat6 Wall Jack

Housing Material

ABS High-impact

RJ45 Contacts :

50U Micro-inch Gold Plating

Category

6A(IEC)

IDC Terminals

Nickel Plated Phosphor Bronze Alloy

Fire Safety

UL94V-0

Connector Type

RJ45 8(8)

Conductor Type

Solid or Stranded cable

Suitable Conductor

23 to 26 AWG

Operation Temperature

-10°C~60°C

Storage Temperature

-40°C~70°C

RJ45 Life

750cycles min


Features:

1. Using the phosphor bronze continuous gold plating process, the thickness of 24K gold plating is up to 50U, and the plugging life is more than 800 times. Corrosion resistance, plug resistance, and effectively prolong the service life of the module while ensuring the stability of data transmission; High hardness phosphor bronze shrapnel; 24K 50U gold-plated; plug life more than 800 times


2. High hardness phosphor bronze wire terminal, plated with soft nickel 100U", plated with matte tin 200U", can pierce the insulating layer strongly, and at the same time effectively prevent the contact surface of the terminal from oxidizing and reduce the contact resistance of the wire. The terminals are compatible with 22~26AWG cables, and the number of times of wiring is greater than 200.


3. New high-pressure flame retardant material, with good impact resistance and high-temperature resistance. Brand new environmentally friendly plastic, non-toxic and harmless. Safe and flame retardant, the fire rating reaches UL94V-0.

High hardness phosphor bronze wire terminal, plated with soft nickel 100U", plated with matte tin 200U", can pierce the insulating layer strongly, and at the same time effectively prevent the contact surface of the terminal from oxidizing and reduce the contact resistance of the wire. The terminals are compatible with 22~26AWG cables, and the number of times of wiring is greater than 200.


3. New high-pressure flame retardant material, with good impact resistance and high-temperature resistance. Brand new environmentally friendly plastic, non-toxic and harmless. Safe and flame retardant, the fire rating reaches UL94V-0.

brief.en:
​Trusted connections for your network

COBTEL CAT6 Keystone Shielded is a Component Level Jack. It can pass POE test of 60w and 100w, and adapt to shielded Ethernet cables from 26 to 23 AWG. COBTEL CAT6 Keystone Shielded Jacks RJ45 exceeds all performance parameters specified in the Category 6 standard.

CAT6 Keystone Shielded is a tool free RJ45 Jack. And the assembly degree is 180 degree. It is mainly made of zinc alloy, pc and phosphor bronze. It also has the feature of snap-in to enhance the stability of connection.

name.zh: Short Body Toolless CAT6A UTP RJ45 Jack 180° Keystone Module

brief.en:
1. Seamless Network Integration: Our CAT 6A keystone jack ensures a stable, high-speed RJ45 connection, perfect for seamless network integration in homes and offices.
2. Tool-Free Convenience: Experience the ease of plug-and-play with our tool-free termination, making installations and upgrades a breeze without a wire cutter.
3. Compact Design Excellence: With a 28mm short body, our keystone module fits snugly in any setup, providing ample space for wiring without compression.
4. Gold-Plated Durability: Featuring 50U gold-plated contacts for oxidation resistance, our keystone jack promises a durable, high-performance connection.
5. Fluke Tested Assurance: Rigorously Fluke tested, our keystone module meets stringent quality standards, ensuring reliable data transmission and network stability.

description.en:
Description

Introducing the CAT.6A Ultra-Short Mini Unshielded Tool-Free Network Module

 

In the development process of the CAT.6A ultra-short mini unshielded tool-free network module, we have poured considerable effort and intelligence, striving for perfection in details and excellence in quality. By deeply understanding consumer needs and pain points, we have used innovative technology and design to solve long-standing market issues, delivering an unprecedented new experience for our customers.

 

Product Description:


Dive into the world of impeccable networking with COBTEL's CAT 6A UTP Tool-Free Keystone Module, a masterpiece of connectivity designed for the discerning user. This compact powerhouse is the key to unlocking a world of high-speed, reliable internet that keeps pace with your demands.

 

Our keystone module is a marvel of engineering, boasting a 28mm ultra-short body that fits effortlessly into any space. The sleek, environmentally friendly PC material shell houses 50U gold-plated pins, ensuring not only a visually stunning connector but one that resists oxidation and maintains a pristine connection over time.

 

Installation is a dream with our tool-less termination method. Say goodbye to cumbersome wire cutters and hello to a swift, secure connection that clicks into place with ease. With more than 1500 insertion/extraction cycles, this keystone jack is built to last, ensuring your network remains robust and uninterrupted.

 

But it's not just about durability; it's about speed. Our module supports a 10 Gigabit transmission rate, banishing buffering to the past and delivering a smooth, seamless online experience. Whether you're gaming, streaming, or conferencing, our keystone jack ensures that your connection stays as fast and reliable as your lifestyle demands.

 

Perfect for a variety of scenarios, from home wiring to data center setups, our keystone module is compatible with standard 86 panels and suitable for 1U48-port patch panels. It's the versatile choice for any networking need, ensuring that your setup is not only efficient but also worry-free.

 

Each module undergoes rigorous Fluke testing before it leaves the factory, guaranteeing that its performance not only meets but exceeds the highest standards. This level of quality assurance means you can trust in a secure internet connection that stands the test of time.
 
Choose COBTEL's CAT 6A UTP Tool-Free Keystone Module for a networking solution and it's your gateway to a world where speed, reliability, and ease of use come together in perfect harmony.

description.en:
Description

COBTEL CAT6A UTP keystone Jack toolless for RJ45 network connections.

It is a reduced-size tool-less terminated RJ45 jack that allows multiple cable entry orientations when the jack is installed in a standard depth back box. It supports options for both flush shutters at the outlet and angled shutters often used with keystone jacks.

The low-profit design is suitable to install a 0.5U 24-port patch panel and a 1U 48 Port.

The housing is easy to be opened like a butterfly to reveal the IDC termination points.

description.en:
Description

Ultra-Short Mini Tool-Free CAT.6A Network RJ45 Module: An Efficient Solution for Structured Cabling:

﻿

A  Main Advantanges:

1: Network modules are essential devices for information exchange between endpoints in structured cabling. Today, we are introducing our newly developed and produced CAT.6A ultra-short mini tool-free network module. This innovative product (design patent number: 2023300049200) aims to provide a stable, efficient, convenient, and perfect solution for customers in structured cabling environments.

2: With a length of only 26.3mm, this module significantly saves space and makes operations more convenient. The patented push-button design allows users to open the module's cover by simply pressing it, eliminating the need for a screwdriver.

 

 

B Product Features

√. Compliant with the transmission standards of Category 6A, suitable for communication socket connections between equipment and work areas;
√. The shielded housing adopts an integral die-casting process, a fully enclosed shielding structure, effectively preventing electromagnetic interference, in line with industry standards for shielding effectiveness;
√. The RJ45 socket supports both T568A and T568B wiring schemes, with a compact design and clear labeling of universal wiring schemes on the module, facilitating accurate and rapid terminations;
√. The RJ45 interface housing is made of PC material, and the IDC wire clamps are made of phosphor bronze, suitable for 23-26 AWG cables with termination cycles of over 300 times;
√. The angled design of the termination clips promotes close contact with the contact points;
√. Tool-free design for convenient installation, with a rounded rear protective groove to prevent excessive bending and detachment of the cables after termination;
√. Backward compatibility allows compatibility with lower-category systems, avoiding investment losses for users;
√. High-low pin design for the contact pins, achieving maximum balance for the wire pairs; the contact pins are available with gold-plated layers ranging from 6μm to 50μm, with the durability of 1000 insertions (750 insertions according to national standards);
√. Balanced design for the PCB traces, reducing interference, with high margins and certified through authoritative individual testing by ETL (certificate attached);
√. It can be used in conjunction with shielded faceplates and shielded patch panels with 1-3 ports on the wall.

description.en:
Description

COBTEL Cat 6A Keystone Jack exceeds the requirements of ANSI/TIA 568-C.2, and the quality is guaranteed and trustworthy. It supports the construction of Gigabit Ethernet (1000Mbps) and supports the upcoming 2.5Gbps network requirements. In a specific wiring environment, it can support a maximum transmission rate of 10Gbps. The built-in crosstalk compensation PCB greatly improves the NEXT (near-end crosstalk) margin, and the transmission frequency is increased to 250MHz. Tool-free structure design, easy and fast installation without any wiring tools, installation can be completed with bare hands, and network wiring is simple and fast; universal standard design, supports T568A/B terminal wiring sequence, and the wiring terminal is compatible with 22-26AWG cables.

 

Specification

  

Product Name

Cat 6A Keystone Jack

Keystone Jack Housing

Zine Alloy, Nickel Plated

Bracket

Nickel Silver Alloy

Rear Housing

Zinc Alloy, Nickel Plated

Keystone Jack Latching

PC+ABS, UL94-0

Jack Contacts

Phosphor Bronze, 50U" Gold Painting

Data Category

Category 6a

Conductor Type

Solid or Stranded cable

Contact Compatibility

22 to 26 AWG

Operating Temperature Range

-10°C~60°C

Storage Temperature Range

-40°C~70°C

Humidity

10%~90% RH(Non-condensing)

Inserting Life

750 mating cycles with FCC-compliant 8P plug

Contact Force

100 Grams with FCC-compliant 8P plug

Plug Retention Force

11 LBF min

Durability

30 Termination Cycles

 

Features:

1. Using the phosphor bronze continuous gold plating process, the thickness of 24K gold plating is up to 50u〃, and the plugging life is more than 800 times. Corrosion-resistant and plug-resistant, while effectively extending the service life of the keystone jack, it ensures the stability of data transmission.

 

2. High-hardness phosphor bronze wire-bonding terminals, plated with soft nickel 100u〃 and plated with matte tin 200u〃, can pierce the insulating layer strongly, and at the same time effectively prevent the contact surface of the terminal from oxidizing and reduce the contact resistance of the wire. The terminal is compatible with 22-26AWG cables, and the number of wire-bonding is > 200 times.

3. The shell adopts a zinc alloy integral molding process, which is more tightly packaged and shielded more thoroughly. The interior is made of new high-pressure flame-retardant materials, which have good impact resistance, high and low-temperature resistance; safe and flame-retardant, with a fire rating of UL94V-0.

 

Effectively compatible

can be matched with 86 type panel and empty distribution frame,

with strong compatibility, stable and efficient

name.en: Cat 6A Shielded Snap-in Feed-Through Keystone Module Inline Coupler
name.zh: Cat 6A Shielded Snap-in Feed-Through Keystone Module Inline Coupler

brief.en: Get effortless 10Gbps speed with our Cat 6A Shielded Coupler. This snap-in module ensures stable, interference-free connections for your network.
brief.zh: Get effortless 10Gbps speed with our Cat 6A Shielded Coupler. This snap-in module ensures stable, interference-free connections for your network.

description.en:
Description

Cat 6A Shielded Snap-in Feed-Through Keystone Module Inline Coupler
 

01. UNLEASH 10 GIGABIT SPEED: Lightning-Fast Network Performance

 
Subheading Focus: Bandwidth & Speed
Speed drives the modern internet. Your network handles massive files daily. You stream 4K video. You transfer terabytes of data. Slow connections kill productivity. Our Cat 6A Shielded Coupler eliminates bottlenecks instantly. This device supports 10Gbps transmission speed. It pairs perfectly with 10 Gigabit cables for lightning-fast performance.
 
Standard couplers often slow you down. They act as speed bumps in your data highway. This coupler is different. We engineered it for 10 Gigabit network ready environments. You get the full bandwidth your ISP delivers. You get the maximum speed your servers can output. This is a theoretically rated 10Gbps transmission device.
Gamers love this performance. Creative professionals need this speed. Data centers rely on it. You can achieve stable, high-speed performance with no lag and no delay. Buffer-free viewing becomes your new normal. You click, and it plays. You upload, and it finishes. This coupler connects your computer, router, or switch with zero compromise. Upgrade your links to true 10G standards today.
 

02. METAL FORTRESS: Superior Shielding Blocks Interference

 
Subheading Focus: EMI Protection & Housing
Data corruption destroys networks. Electromagnetic interference (EMI) is the enemy. Power cables emit noise. Wireless signals create static. Our coupler fights back with a metal shielded housing. This full metal jacket blocks interference effectively.
Plastic couplers fail in noisy environments. They let the noise in. Your data packets get corrupted. Your network slows down as it resends data. Our Cat.6A Shielded design prevents this. It creates a Faraday cage around your connection. It ensures signal integrity. The metal shell acts as a barrier against external electronic noise.
 
This is critical for professional installs. You might run cables near power lines. You might have a crowded server rack. The metal shielded housing isolates your signal. It guarantees a clean path for your data. You get stable, high-speed, lossless transmission. Security systems need this stability. Financial trading desks demand this accuracy. Do not risk your data with cheap plastic. Choose the metal fortress.
 
 

03. SNAP-IN VERSATILITY: The Perfect Fit for Patch Panels

 
Subheading Focus: Installation & Compatibility
Installation should be simple. You do not have time for complex tools. You do not want to punch down wires. Our coupler features a snap-in design. It fits standard keystones. It works perfectly with blank port panels.
This snap-in pass-through connector changes how you manage cables. You simply click it into the patch panel. It locks in place. You connect your patch cords to the front and back. The snap-in design for patch panels simplifies cable management. You can rearrange ports in seconds. You can upgrade your rack without cutting wires.
It also works with network wall plates. You can plug-and-play to directly replace modular jacks. This Cat 6A shielded snap-in feed-through connector makes home networking easy. You snap it into the faceplate. You plug in your computer. You are done. The snap-in design ensures a secure fit. It will not push back into the wall. It creates a professional look for any office or home setup.
 

04. INTERIOR ENGINEERING: Gold Plating and Reinforced PCB

 
Subheading Focus: Component Quality & Signal Path
Exterior strength matters, but interior quality defines performance. We use premium components inside this coupler. The heart of the device is a reinforced PCB board. This thick board provides a stable platform for high-speed signals. It resists bending. It prevents micro-cracks that cause intermittent failures.
The contact points are critical. We use gold-plated contact pins. Gold is a noble metal. It does not rust. It conducts electricity perfectly. These gold-plated pins ensure a low-resistance connection. They resist oxidation over years of use. You get a reliable link from day one to day one thousand.
 
We also integrated signal compensation circuitry. High-speed signals degrade over distance. Our reinforced PCB board includes design elements to counter this. It balances the impedance. It minimizes crosstalk. This signal compensation design ensures stable transmission. You get the performance of a direct cable run. The gold pins and advanced circuitry work together to deliver data without loss.
 
 

05. COMPACT POWER: Space-Saving Design for Tight Spaces

 
Subheading Focus: Dimensions & Form Factor
Rack space is expensive. Wall boxes are cramped. You need hardware that fits. Our coupler features a compact and portable design. It is small but powerful. The space-saving design allows you to fit more connections in less space.
The dimensions are precise. It measures 31.2mm x 14.5mm x 16.1mm. This slim profile fits side-by-side in high-density patch panels. It does not take up space. You can carry a handful in your pocket. You can keep them in your tool bag. They are ready whenever you need to extend a line.
Being compact and portable does not mean fragile. The metal body is tough. The space-saving design makes it ideal for tight conduit boxes. It is perfect for behind-TV installations. You connect your devices without bulging wall plates. You keep your installation clean and tidy. It is the efficient choice for modern, crowded network environments.
 

06. LOSSLESS EXTENSION: Extend Your Reach up to 100 Meters

 
Subheading Focus: Distance & Signal Integrity
Cables are often too short. You need to reach the other side of the room. You need to connect a camera down the hall. Our coupler solves this problem. It acts as a lossless network transmission device. You connect two cables together. You extend your reach.
This coupler supports long-distance transmission. You can extend your network link up to 100 meters. Standard couplers introduce resistance. They weaken the signal. Our device ensures zero signal loss. The signal passes through as if the coupler were not there.
You get lossless transmission. Your ping times stay low. Your download speeds stay high. We engineered it for signal no attenuation. You can daisy-chain cables to reach remote devices. It functions to extend network cable interfaces. Whether it is a temporary fix or a permanent install, your signal remains strong. You get the distance you need without running new wires.
 

07. FLUKE CERTIFIED: Proven Reliability You Can Trust

 
Subheading Focus: Certification & Testing
Claims are easy. Proof is hard. We back our performance with data. This coupler is tested and certified by Fluke. Fluke Networks is the gold standard in cable testing. A Fluke pass means the product works. It meets the strict Cat 6A standards.
 
Our testing process uses LinkWare PC Cable Test Management Software. The test results show a clear "PASS". We verify the Next-Generation (NEXT) crosstalk. We check the return loss. We ensure the wire map is correct. This is a professionally certified product.
Many cheap couplers fail these tests. They cause network errors. They drop connections. Our Fluke tested coupler guarantees performance. You can install it in critical infrastructure. You can use it for enterprise clients. The authoritative test results give you peace of mind. You are buying a component that meets engineering specifications. You trust your tools. Trust your connectors.
 

08. UNIVERSAL COMPATIBILITY: Connects Every RJ45 Device

 
Subheading Focus: Device Support & Use Cases
Networks are diverse. You have desktops, laptops, and servers. You have smart TVs and consoles. Our coupler works with them all. It is compatible with RJ45 devices. The interface is the standard RJ45 type.
 
You can connect a desktop computer. You can extend the line to a router. It connects switches in the server room. It works with your TV for streaming. It connects projectors in the conference room.
This universal design makes it a versatile tool. It offers stable, high-speed performance for any connected device. You do not need different couplers for different brands. It works with Cat5e, Cat6, and Cat6A cables. It acts as a network extension solution. It keeps your computer connection stable and high-speed. It ensures smooth viewing on your media devices. One coupler solves many problems.
 

Extended Technical Guide: The Ultimate Resource for Cat 6A Shielding

 

Deep Dive: Why Cat 6A Shielding Matters

In the world of high-speed networking, 10 Gigabit speeds are becoming the standard. However, as speed increases, so does vulnerability. High-frequency signals are more susceptible to external noise. This is where Shielded Cat.6A technology becomes essential.
Understanding Crosstalk and EMI Crosstalk occurs when a signal from one cable bleeds into an adjacent cable. Alien Crosstalk (AXT) is a specific type of interference in 10G networks where bundled cables interfere with each other. EMI (Electromagnetic Interference) comes from external sources like fluorescent lights, motors, or power lines. Our metal shielded housing addresses both.
Internal Isolation: The metal shell contains the electromagnetic field of the signal inside the coupler, preventing it from leaking out.
External Protection: It reflects external EMI, preventing it from penetrating the coupler and corrupting the data stream. By using this shielded device, you effectively block interference. This ensures that your 10Gbps transmission remains pure and error-free.
The Physics of the PCB: Signal Compensation
You might wonder why a simple coupler needs a circuit board. A direct wire-to-wire connection sounds better, right? Wrong. When you cut a twisted pair cable and attach a connector, you disturb the precise twist of the wires. This disturbance changes the impedance of the line. This impedance mismatch causes signal reflection (Return Loss). Our reinforced PCB board is engineered with signal compensation circuitry.
Impedance Matching: The traces on the PCB are calculated to match the 100-ohm impedance of the Cat 6A cable perfectly.
Phase Adjustment: The board layout adjusts the path length of specific pairs to keep the signal phases aligned. This sophisticated engineering allows for zero signal loss. It is why we can claim network lossless transmission even when extending cables up to 100 meters.
Installation Tutorial: Using Snap-in Keystones
This product features a snap-in design compatible with standard keystone wall plates and patch panels. Here is how to install it correctly.
 

For Wall Plates:

Orient the Coupler: Look for the "UP" mark or the latch mechanism.
Insert Bottom First: Hook the bottom lip of the coupler into the bottom edge of the wall plate port.
Snap the Top: Push the top of the coupler forward until the flexible latch clicks into the top edge of the port.
Verify: Push gently from the front to ensure it is locked. The snap-in design ensures a firm hold.
For Patch Panels:
Check the Panel: Ensure you are using a "blank" or "unloaded" patch panel designed for keystone jacks.
Rear Loading: Most patch panels load from the rear. Insert the coupler from the back of the panel.
Click to Lock: Push until the latch engages.
Connect: Plug your solid-core infrastructure cable into the rear RJ45 port and your patch cord into the front.
This plug-and-play capability makes it easy to directly replace modular jacks without specialized punch-down tools.
Gold Plating: The Secret to Longevity
We specify gold-plated contact pins. Why gold? Why not silver or copper?
Oxidation: Copper oxidizes (turns green). Silver tarnishes (turns black). These oxides are insulators; they block electricity. Gold is a noble metal; it does not react with oxygen. It stays shiny and conductive forever.
 
Durability: The plating thickness matters. Our contact gold-plated pins withstand hundreds of insertion cycles.
Resistance: Gold has very low contact resistance. This keeps the voltage drop minimal, which is vital for PoE (Power over Ethernet) applications as well as data. By using gold-plated contacts, we ensure that the 10Gbps transmission capability does not degrade over time.
 

Application Scenario: The Home Office Upgrade

Imagine you are upgrading your home office for a new 10G NAS (Network Attached Storage).
The Problem: Your existing Cat 6A cable is too short to reach your new desk location.
The Wrong Fix: Buying a cheap plastic coupler from a generic bin. This introduces crosstalk and drops your speed to 1Gbps.
The Cobtel Fix: You use our Cat 6A Shielded Snap-in Coupler.
You connect the existing cable to one end.
You connect a new patch cord to the other.
The metal shielded housing protects the link from your power strip interference.
The signal compensation maintains the signal quality.
Result: You get the full 10Gbps speed at your new desk.
 

Application Scenario: Data Center Rack Management

In a data center, airflow is critical. Messy cabling blocks fans.
The Strategy: Use "Feed-Through" patch panels.
The Implementation: instead of punching down cables (which is permanent and messy), you install a blank patch panel. You pop in 24 of our Snap-in Feed-Through Keystone Modules.
The Benefit: You plug the rear server cables into the back. You plug the switch patch cords into the front.
Flexibility: If a server moves, you just unplug the cable. You do not have to cut wires. The snap-in design for patch panels makes the rack modular and future-proof.
 

Fluke Certification Explained

We mention that this product is tested and certified by Fluke. What does that actually mean for you? Fluke testers (like the DSX series) shoot high-frequency signals through the cable and coupler. They measure:
Insertion Loss: How much signal power is lost? (Our coupler has minimal loss).
NEXT (Near End Crosstalk): Does the signal jump between pairs at the connector? (Our PCB compensation prevents this).
Return Loss: Does the signal bounce back due to impedance mismatch? (Our design minimizes reflection). A "PASS" on a Fluke test is the industry's highest seal of approval. It proves the Shielded Cat.6A performance is real, not just marketing hype.
 

Why "Snap-in" is Superior to "Punch-down" for Couplers

Traditional keystone jacks require you to use a punch-down tool to terminate the wires individually.
Risk of Error: You might cross wires. You might nick the insulation.
Time Consuming: It takes minutes per jack.
Permanent: Once punched, it is hard to change. Our Snap-in Feed-Through coupler changes the game.
Risk Free: You use pre-terminated cables. The factory did the hard work.
Fast: It takes seconds to install. Plug and play.
Modular: You can reuse the coupler in a different location instantly. It effectively extends network cable interfaces without the labor cost of termination.
 

The Future of Networking is Shielded

As we move towards Wi-Fi 7 access points and 8K video streaming, the demand on the physical network layer increases. Cat 5e is dead. Cat 6 is struggling. Cat 6A is the baseline for the future. But Cat 6A operates at 500 MHz. At these frequencies, unshielded cables act like antennas. They pick up noise. Using shielded components like our coupler is an insurance policy. It protects your network against the noise pollution of the future. The metal shielded housing ensures your infrastructure is ready for whatever technology comes next.
 

Technical Specifications Summary

For the engineers and procurement managers, here are the hard facts:
Model: CN-2002P/6A-KK.
Type: RJ45 Inline Coupler / Keystone Jack.
Standard: Cat 6A (Class EA).
Shielding: Full Metal Die-Cast Housing.
Connector Plating: Gold-plated contact pins.
PCB: Reinforced with Impedance Matching.
Dimensions: 31.2mm x 14.5mm x 16.1mm.
Data Rate: 10 Gbps (10 Gigabit).
Certification: Fluke Tested.
Function: Feed-through, Extension, Patch Panel Interface.
Environment: Suitable for high-EMI environments.
 

Troubleshooting Common Network Issues

 
If you are experiencing slow speeds (e.g., stuck at 100Mbps or 1Gbps when you expect 10Gbps), check the following:
The Weakest Link: Are you using a Cat 5e coupler on a Cat 6A line? That kills the speed. Replace it with our Cat 6A Shielded Coupler.
Cable Length: Is the total run over 100 meters? Even with our 100m long-distance transmission support, physics has limits. Ensure the total length (Cable A + Coupler + Cable B) is under the limit.
Shield Continuity: Are you using shielded cables (STP/FTP)? If you use unshielded cables with a shielded coupler, it works, but you lose the EMI protection benefit. For best results, ensure the entire chain is shielded.
 

Buying Guide: Why Choose Cobtel?

 
We are not just a reseller; we are network experts.
Quality Control: We invest in Fluke testing. We verify our claims.
Material Science: We choose Zinc Alloy for shielding and Gold for contacts. We do not use cheap substitutes.
Innovation: Our signal compensation circuitry sets us apart from passive, dumb couplers.
Versatility: From desktop computers to routers and switches, our product fits every scenario.
Form Factor: The compact design respects your space.
 

Final Thoughts

 
Your network is the nervous system of your business or home. Do not let a $2 plastic coupler paralyze your $2000 server or $1000 laptop. The connector is the most critical point of failure. Invest in the Cat 6A Shielded Snap-in Feed-Through Keystone Module Inline Coupler. Invest in 10Gbps speed. Invest in Metal shielding. Invest in reliability.
This is not just a connector; it is a gateway to the future of high-speed connectivity. Whether you are extending a line across a warehouse or tidying up a server rack, this coupler delivers stable, high-speed, lossless performance every time.

description.en:
Description

 
 
 

 

Electrical
Current Rating: 1.5 Amps
Insulation Resistance: ≥ 500 MΩ
Contact Resistance: ≤ 20 mΩ
DC Resistance: ≤ 0.3Ω
DC/AC Volt Endurance: DC 1000V /AC 750V 1min
 
Mechanical
Mating Cycles: 1500 cycles minimum
IDC Mating Cycles: 400 cycles minimum
Operating Temperature: -10~60℃
Operating Humidity: 10%~90%RH
Storage Temperature: -40~68℃
 
 
Physical
Plastic Parts: High-quality engineering plastic
PCB: FR-4, 1.2mm thickness
Jack Wire: 0.35 mm phosphor bronze gold over nickel plating
IDC Conductor: 0.5 mm phosphor bronze, tin-plating
Contact Compatibility: Accommodate 23 to 26 AWG solid
TIA Cat.6A Perm.Link Test: Worst Pair NEXT Headroom ≥ 5.0 dB
 
Standards Verification
ANSI/TIA-568.2-D;
ISO/IEC TR 11801-9901-2014;
YD/T 926.3-2009;
ISO/IEC 60603-7-41;
RoHS directive 2002/95/EC compliant

brief.en:
​Trusted connections for your network

Cobtel CAT6A tooless keystone jack is one of the most economical and functional solution of Ethernet connection. The performance of Cobtel CAT6A toolless keystone jack fulfills your high-speed transmission requirements from the computer room to the work area.

This CAT6A tooless keystone jack accommodates solid and stranded cooper cable from 24awg to 22awg. Even though it can adapt to both shielded cable and non-shielded cable, we recommend non-shielded cable the most.

Cobtel produces all kinds of RJ45 jack and other related items, like modular plug, patch cord, face-plate, tools...We can provide you one-stop solution to save your time and keep you peace in mind.

brief.en:
Trusted connections for your network

COBTEL CAT8 RJ45 Shielded Keystone Jack supports Ethernet at rates up to 40 Gbps (40GBASE-T) over distances up to 30 meters, suitable for connecting server and switch at Data Center or industry application as well as at your office.

It is designed under extremely high standard for high durability,fast and stable and professional network transmission. This CAT8 RJ45 Shielded Keystone Jack adapts to shielded Ethernet cables from 22 to 24 AWG.
brief.zh:
Trusted connections for your network

COBTEL CAT8 RJ45 Shielded Keystone Jack supports Ethernet at rates up to 40 Gbps (40GBASE-T) over distances up to 30 meters, suitable for connecting server and switch at Data Center or industry application as well as at your office.

It is designed under extremely high standard for high durability,fast and stable and professional network transmission. This CAT8 RJ45 Shielded Keystone Jack adapts to shielded Ethernet cables from 22 to 24 AWG.

description.en:
Description

Specification


Product Name

CAT8 RJ45 Shielded Keystone Jack

Application

Ethernet connection

Connector Type

RJ45

Main Material

Zinc alloy, PC, phosphor bronze

Speed Support

Max 40Gpbs up to 30 meter

Color

Silver

Working Temperature

-10°C to +60°C



Cobtel Keystone Jack Advantages:



1. Used for 22-26AWG cable. Can be used repeatedly many times.  No need to use any crimping tools


2. The highest performance in the industry. Pass the component test(much harder to pass than Fluke Test). Pass the standard test of ISO/IEC (EU standards) and TIA/EIA(US Standards).


3. 50U gold-plated pinout. Premium phosphor pinout, being nickel-plated before the gold-plating process. Excellent conductivity and stable data transmission


4. Meta Shell protects the jack from external interference: Zinc alloy shielding shell protects inner wires from crosstalk and interference.


5. Copper steel alloy clamping terminals:  Pierce the out cover easily, ensuring the stable contact of the ethernet cable.


Features

●Designed to support Ethernet at rates up to 40 Gbps (40GBASE-T) over distances up to 30 meters, suitable for connecting server and switch at Data Center;

●Extreme performance design for Edge Data Center;

●PCB compensation design for further CAT8 component requirements;

●Easy field termination, T568A & B wiring;

●UL 1863 verified;

●Compact and high-density design, fits 1U 24 Port and 1U 48 Port

Passed fluke channel test;

●Pass PoE 60W and 100 watts test;

●IEC 60603-7, ANSI/TIA-5682-D;

●Wire Compatibility: 22 ~ 24 AWG.


Click and browse more Cat 8 Keystone Jack


To see our factory's production capacity and domestic and international certification. Click About Us

description.en:
Description

COBTEL Cat 8 Keystone Jack adopts imported high-performance flame-retardant polycarbonate material, all zinc alloy metal shell, 360-degree shielding, and the shielding effect is better. It meets the fire protection requirements of UL94-V2, and the number of terminations is guaranteed to exceed 250 times. It can be applied to data The high-end data line of the central integrated wiring is used in the EoR/ToR 40GBase-T application data center for the transmission of digital and analog voice, video and data signals, suitable for all applications up to 2000MHz ICT network, etc.


Specification


Product Name

Cat 8 Keystone Jack

Keystone Jack Housing

Zine Alloy, Nickel Plated

Bracket

Nickel Silver Alloy

Rear Housing

Zinc Alloy, Nickel Plated

Protective Cover:

Flame Retardant Polycarbonate UL 94V-0

Shielding layer

360 degree full zinc alloy nickel plated

Jack Contacts

Phosphor Bronze, 50U” Gold Painting

Data Category

Category 8

Conductor Type

Solid or Stranded cable

Contact Compatibility

22 to 24 AWG

Outside Jack OD

0.19-0.33inches (4.9-8.5mm)

Working temperature

-10°C~60°C

Storage Temperature Range

-40°C~70°C

Humidity

10%~90% RH(Non-condensing)

Inserting Life

750 mating cycles with FCC compliant 8P plug

DC resistance

≤300mΩ

Contact resistance

≤20mΩ

Withstand voltage

1000V (AC750V) 1min without breakdown

Insulation resistance

≥1000MΩ


Features:

  • Adopt full zinc alloy metal shell, 360 degree shielding, better shielding effect.

  • Now tool-free crimping makes the construction faster and ensures the versatility of the connection method and the reliability of the connection.

  • The protective cover of the wire terminal is convenient for maintenance, ensuring reliable termination of the core wire and preventing loosening.

  • Transmission performance parameters meet ISO/IEC 11801 and TIA/EIA 568-C.2-1 Category 8 standards.

  • Optimal impedance matching relationship through continuous impedance analysis of gold pins, terminals and printed circuits.

  • The gold needle is 50μ gold-plated as a whole to prevent surface oxidation, improve contact performance, and ensure performance and service life.

  • IDC termination springs, high quality phosphor bronze, nickel plated overall, guaranteed termination times over 250 times.


The Connection Application of Cat 8 Keystone Jack

Installation Method Video

name.en: Cat6A Feed-through Inline Coupler Ethernet Connection Extender
name.zh: Cat6A Feed-through Inline Coupler Ethernet Connection Extender

brief.en: The performance of the Cat6A RJ45 feed-through inline coupler supports a usable bandwidth of up to 500MHz. It is produced using high-low gold-plated pins and PCB wire immersion gold technology, following standardized inspection and testing processes to ensure your peace of mind.
brief.zh: The performance of the Cat6A RJ45 feed-through inline coupler supports a usable bandwidth of up to 500MHz. It is produced using high-low gold-plated pins and PCB wire immersion gold technology, following standardized inspection and testing processes to ensure your peace of mind.

description.en:
Description

The performance of the Category 6 RJ45 feed-through inline coupler supports a usable bandwidth of up to 500MHz. It is produced using high-low gold-plated pins and PCB wire immersion gold technology, following standardized inspection and testing processes to ensure your peace of mind.

A. The eight gold-plated pins have a selectable gold thickness ranging from 6 to 50 microns. The material used is phosphor bronze 8-03, with a plug-and-play lifespan of over 1000 times.

B. The IDC (Insulation Displacement Connector) is nickel-plated, made of phosphor bronze 8-03, and can be terminated over 300 times.

C. The RJ45 port is made of plastic produced by NISSAN PC.

D. The simple and elegant design features dual RJ45 pass-through ports, eliminating the need for cable termination. RJ45 finished patch cords can be directly inserted for use, allowing for extended distances.

E. This feed-through inline coupler can also be used for installation in modular patch panels and is suitable for empty patch panels.

A. The eight gold-plated pins have a selectable gold thickness ranging from 6 to 50 microns. The material used is phosphor bronze 8-03, with a plug-and-play lifespan of over 1000 times.

B. The IDC (Insulation Displacement Connector) is nickel-plated, made of phosphor bronze 8-03, and can be terminated over 300 times.

C. The RJ45 port is made of plastic produced by NISSAN PC.

D. The simple and elegant design features dual RJ45 pass-through ports, eliminating the need for cable termination. RJ45 finished patch cords can be directly inserted for use, allowing for extended distances.

E. This feed-through inline coupler can also be used for installation in modular patch panels and is suitable for empty patch panels.

Description

shielded Cat6a RJ45 In-Line Coupler Female Keystone Jack High Transmission Coupler Keystone

 
* Product Detail
FTP Cat6A RJ45-RJ45 Coupler Female
●The shielded RJ45 CAT6A Inline coupler allows you to plug high-speed network cables into both sides
●The jack is compatible with CAT6A patch cables with standard RJ45 connectors
●The shielded RJ45 coupler meets category 6A performance, and backwards with Cat5E and Cat6
●It can be mounted into RJ45 faceplate, surface box, and blank patch panel
 

Shielded Cat6a RJ45 In-Line Coupler Female Keystone Jack High Transmission Coupler Keystone

* Convenient to carry, easy installation;
* High-quality ABS housing resistant to hot or cold temperatures, environmentally friendly;
* Metal shielding and gold-plated phosphor bronze contacts ensure stable single, long-distance transmission;
* More mating cycles, applicable to a wide range of occasions;
* Applicable to shielded twisted pair (FTP) Cat6A cable, also compatible with Cat6, Cat5, CAT5e Ethernet cables;
* The 1-1 wiring configuration is compatible with both T568A and T568B wiring schemes; Cat6A performance is in compliance with
ANSI/TIA/EIA 568 B.2-1 standard.

Applications:

* 2 network cables pass through the connector to form a longer network cable;
* 8-wire RJ-45 T adapter, parallel wiring;
* Applicable to Cat5E, Cat6, Cat6A, Cat7 network cables;
* Widely used in large, medium, and small enterprises office decoration, home decoration, multimedia entertainment centers,

brief.en: Ignite your Starlink with COBTEL’s CAT5E Cable! Achieve blazing 1200Mbps Gigabit speeds via pure copper. IP67 waterproof & extreme-weather proof for unstoppable connection. Get yours today!
brief.zh: Ignite your Starlink with COBTEL’s CAT5E Cable! Achieve blazing 1200Mbps Gigabit speeds via pure copper. IP67 waterproof & extreme-weather proof for unstoppable connection. Get yours today!

description.en:
Description

 

The COBTEL Starlink CAT5E Cable – Your Gateway to Limitless Connectivity

 
Your Starlink system promises a revolution in internet access. This COBTEL Starlink CAT5E Network Patch Cable ensures that promise is delivered, flawlessly, powerfully, and without compromise. This is not just a cable; it is the vital artery for your digital life, engineered to perfection. It connects your world with unparalleled speed and unyielding reliability. You invested in Starlink for its groundbreaking satellite internet. Now, complete that investment with a cable built to match its ambition. This cable offers pure, unadulterated performance. It delivers every bit of data with speed and precision.

 

1. Unleash Unstoppable Starlink Speed: The Gigabit Connection You Crave!

 

Your Starlink service delivers internet from space. This COBTEL CAT5E Network Cable ensures that stellar speed reaches your devices on Earth. Experience true Gigabit transmission. This cable supports data rates up to an incredible 1200Mbps. This raw speed transforms your online activities. Downloads that once took minutes now complete in seconds. Upload large files for work or creative projects without frustrating delays. Stream multiple 4K videos simultaneously across different devices in your home. Your family can watch movies, attend online classes, and game online, all at the same time, without any single user experiencing slowdowns.
This Starlink CAT5E cable is specifically engineered to handle the high-bandwidth demands of modern internet usage. It eliminates the bottlenecks that older or inferior cables can create. You pay for high-speed Starlink service; this cable ensures you get every megabit you deserve. Online gamers will particularly appreciate the low-latency performance this cable facilitates. Faster data transmission means quicker response times in games. This gives you a competitive edge. Your actions register instantly. The frustration of lag becomes a distant memory. Video conferencing becomes a pleasure. Enjoy crystal-clear audio and smooth, high-definition video. Feel more connected with colleagues, clients, and loved ones. This cable provides the stable, high-speed foundation essential for professional remote work and meaningful personal connections. The sheer throughput capacity means your network is future-ready. As applications become more data-intensive, your COBTEL cable will continue to deliver optimal performance. It is an investment in today's needs and tomorrow's technological advancements. Feel the power of a truly fast internet connection. This cable unlocks the full potential of your Starlink system. It delivers a consistently exhilarating online experience.
The performance benefits extend beyond simple speed. This cable ensures signal integrity. This means the data that leaves your Starlink dish is the data that arrives at your router or computer, intact and without corruption. This integrity is crucial for tasks like financial transactions, secure data transfer, and accessing critical online services. The precise construction of this CAT5E cable minimizes data errors and retransmissions. This efficiency contributes to the overall speed and responsiveness of your connection. You can trust this cable to deliver your data accurately and swiftly. Forget about the days of buffering wheels and dropped connections during important moments. This COBTEL cable provides a robust and reliable pathway for your digital life. It allows you to focus on what you are doing online, not on whether your connection can keep up. Experience the internet without limits. This cable is your direct line to a faster, smoother, and more enjoyable digital world, powered by Starlink.
 

2. Built Like a Fortress: Extreme Weather, All-Terrain Domination.

 
This COBTEL Starlink CAT5E cable is engineered for the real world, in all its unpredictable glory. It features an IP67 waterproof rating. This is not just a light drizzle protection; this cable can withstand significant water exposure. Imagine a sudden downpour during your outdoor Starlink setup. This cable remains unfazed. Accidental spills near your connection points? No problem. The waterproof rubber seal at the connector and the outdoor-grade PVC waterproof cable jacket form an impenetrable barrier against moisture. This robust waterproofing ensures your internet connection remains stable and reliable, even when the elements are at their worst. It protects the delicate internal copper conductors from corrosion and short circuits caused by water ingress. This extends the lifespan of the cable significantly, especially in humid or wet environments.
The resilience of this cable extends beyond water. It is built to withstand harsh weather conditions including scorching heat, snow, hail, heavy rain, and even hurricanes. The high-temperature-resistant PVC jacket maintains its integrity and flexibility across a broad temperature spectrum, from a frigid -20°C to a blistering 75°C (-4°F to 167°F). This means you can confidently install this cable outdoors, knowing it will perform reliably year-round. Whether your Starlink dish is mounted on a roof exposed to direct summer sun or endures the icy grip of winter, this cable will continue to deliver peak performance. Its construction resists cracking from UV exposure and brittleness from cold. This all-weather capability makes it ideal for permanent installations in diverse climates.
This cable is perfect for users who need a dependable connection in less-than-ideal locations. RV enthusiasts can route this cable outside their vehicle without concern for rain or road spray. Campers can set up their Starlink system knowing this cable can handle morning dew or unexpected showers. For homes in areas prone to extreme weather, this cable provides an added layer of security for your critical internet connection. The robust construction also offers physical protection against minor impacts and abrasions. You can trust this COBTEL cable to maintain its performance integrity when facing challenging environmental conditions. It is built tough because your connection matters, regardless of the weather. This cable offers true peace of mind, allowing you to stay connected when you need it most. Its durable exterior protects the high-performance technology within, ensuring your Starlink connection is always ready for action. This is not just a cable; it is your all-weather, all-terrain link to the digital world.
 

3. The Heart of Purity: 26AWG Pure Copper for Flawless Signals.

 
The soul of any high-performance network cable lies in its conductors. This COBTEL Starlink CAT5E cable utilizes 26AWG pure copper conductors. Pure copper is the gold standard for data transmission. It offers significantly lower electrical resistance compared to copper-clad aluminum (CCA) or other inferior materials often found in cheaper cables. Lower resistance means a stronger, cleaner signal travels through the cable. This translates directly to faster data speeds, reduced signal loss over distance, and a more stable, reliable internet connection for your Starlink system. You will experience fewer dropped packets, less buffering, and a consistently smooth online experience.
Each wire core within this cable is composed of 7 twisted strands of this 26AWG pure copper. This stranded construction offers two key advantages over solid core wires. First, it provides enhanced flexibility. This makes the cable easier to install, route around corners, and manage without risking damage to the conductors. Second, stranded wires are more resistant to breakage from repeated flexing or vibration. This adds to the overall durability and longevity of the cable. The thicker diameter of these 26AWG conductors further contributes to their superior performance. A thicker wire inherently has less resistance, allowing for more efficient signal transmission. This design choice ensures that the maximum amount of data from your Starlink connection reaches your devices with minimal degradation.
The benefits of pure copper are tangible. Your video streams will be clearer and less prone to pixelation. Your online games will feel more responsive due to reduced latency. Large file transfers will complete more quickly. The overall quality of your internet connection will feel noticeably improved. This commitment to high-quality materials ensures that the cable itself does not become a limiting factor in your Starlink setup. It allows the full potential of your satellite internet service to shine through. The aluminum foil shielding complements the pure copper conductors by protecting the signals from external electromagnetic interference (EMI). This shielding prevents noise from nearby power lines, appliances, or other electronic devices from corrupting your data. The combination of pure copper conductors and effective shielding results in a signal path that is both highly conductive and exceptionally clean. This ensures stable and fast signal transmission, providing you with the reliable, high-speed internet you expect from Starlink. Investing in a cable with pure copper conductors is investing in the quality and consistency of your connection.
 

4. Golden Touch: 50U" Gold-Plated Connectors for Lasting Connections.

 
A network cable is only as strong as its weakest link. Often, that weak link can be the connector. This COBTEL Starlink CAT5E cable addresses this critical point with superior 50U" gold-plated contacts. "50U"" refers to 50 microinches of gold plating, a significantly thicker layer than what is found on many standard cables. Gold is prized in electronics for its excellent conductivity and exceptional resistance to corrosion and oxidation. Over time, lesser metals like tin or nickel can tarnish or corrode, especially in humid environments. This degradation creates higher resistance at the connection point, leading to signal loss, intermittent connectivity, and slower speeds. The thick 50U" gold plating on these COBTEL connectors prevents this. It ensures a pristine, low-resistance electrical pathway for years to come. Your connection remains strong and stable, preserving the high-speed performance of your Starlink system.
The connector housing itself features a metal shielding enclosure. This robust metal shell provides two key benefits. Firstly, it offers enhanced physical protection for the delicate pins and internal connections. This makes the connector more durable and less prone to damage from accidental impacts or strain. Secondly, the metal enclosure provides an additional layer of shielding against electromagnetic interference (EMI) right at the connection point. This is crucial because connectors can be vulnerable entry points for noise. By shielding the connector, this cable further ensures signal integrity and helps maintain optimal data transmission speeds. This attention to detail in connector design underscores the overall quality of the COBTEL cable.
Inside the connector, a precision-engineered three-fork structure for the contact pins ensures a secure and reliable connection to the core wires of the cable. This design creates multiple points of contact, improving electrical conductivity and mechanical stability. It grips the wires firmly, minimizing the chance of loose connections that can cause frustrating dropouts or performance issues. This close and stable connection improves overall transmission performance and contributes to the long-term reliability of the cable. When you plug this COBTEL cable into your Starlink equipment or router, you can feel the quality of the connection. It seats firmly and securely, giving you confidence that your link is solid. This meticulous approach to connector construction means you can set up your Starlink system and trust that the physical connections will hold up, delivering consistent, high-quality performance day after day. The gold-plated contacts are not just a feature; they are an assurance of lasting quality and uninterrupted connectivity.
 

5. Tough Enough for Anything: The 6mm Bend-Proof, Crack-Proof Jacket.

 
Durability is a hallmark of the COBTEL Starlink CAT5E cable. Its external protection begins with a specially constructed wear-resistant PVC (Polyvinyl Chloride) jacket. This is not ordinary PVC. It is formulated for enhanced toughness and resilience. This material is designed to withstand the rigors of daily use and challenging installation environments. The cable features a 6mm thickened cable diameter. This increased thickness provides an extra layer of physical protection for the delicate internal twisted pairs and conductors. It makes the cable more robust and less susceptible to damage from crushing, kinking, or abrasion. You can feel the substantial nature of this cable in your hands, a reassuring sign of its built-in durability.
A critical aspect of cable longevity is its ability to withstand bending. This COBTEL cable has been successfully tested for repeated bending, enduring an impressive 2000 bending cycles without any damage to the conductors or cracking of the outer jacket. This means you can confidently route the cable around corners, through tight spaces in walls or conduits, or manage excess length without worrying about compromising its performance or lifespan. This flexibility, combined with its strength, makes installation easier and safer. There is no skin breakage; the jacket remains intact, protecting the internal components from environmental factors and physical stress. This resilience is particularly important for portable applications, such as with RVs or camping setups, where the cable might be coiled and uncoiled frequently.
Furthermore, the PVC jacket material is flame-retardant. This adds an important safety dimension to your installation. In the unlikely event of exposure to fire, a flame-retardant jacket will resist combustion and limit the spread of flames. This feature provides peace of mind, especially for in-wall or concealed installations in homes and buildings. The combination of wear resistance, thickened diameter, exceptional bend performance, and flame retardancy makes this cable jacket a formidable defense for the high-performance technology it encases. It ensures that your investment in a high-quality Starlink connection is protected for the long term. This cable is designed not just to perform, but to endure. Its robust construction means fewer replacements, less downtime, and a consistently reliable internet experience, allowing you to enjoy your Starlink service without worrying about cable failure. This toughness delivers value through longevity and dependable operation.
 

6. Simplicity Redefined: Plug, Play, and Power Your World Instantly.

 
Connecting to your Starlink internet should be effortless. This COBTEL Starlink CAT5E cable embodies that principle with its true plug-and-play design. There is absolutely no complicated installation required. You do not need any special tools, software drivers, or technical expertise to get started. It is as simple as it sounds: just plug it in, and you are ready to go. One end of the cable connects to the standard port on your Starlink equipment, and the other end connects to the corresponding port on your router or directly to your computer's Ethernet port. The connectors are precisely engineered to fit snugly and securely, ensuring a reliable connection with a satisfying click.
This ease of use makes the COBTEL cable an ideal solution for everyone. If you are a tech enthusiast, you will appreciate the straightforward, no-fuss setup. If you are less familiar with networking hardware, you will love how intuitive and user-friendly it is. There are no settings to configure, no manuals to decipher for basic operation. The cable automatically negotiates the best possible connection speed with your devices, up to its Gigabit capacity. This simplicity saves you time and eliminates potential frustration. You can have your Starlink system up and running, delivering high-speed internet throughout your home or workspace, within minutes of unboxing the cable.
The clear labeling and standard RJ45 connectors remove any guesswork. Router ports and standard device ports are easily identifiable. The cable's flexibility, stemming from its stranded copper conductors, further aids in easy installation, allowing you to route it neatly without struggle. Whether you are setting up a new Starlink system, replacing an old or damaged cable, or extending your network, this COBTEL cable streamlines the process. This focus on user convenience means you spend less time troubleshooting connections and more time enjoying the benefits of your high-speed Starlink internet. It is about empowering you with seamless connectivity, effortlessly. The "plug and play" philosophy extends to its compatibility; this CAT5E cable works universally with devices that support Ethernet connections, ensuring broad usability beyond just the Starlink system if needed. Experience the satisfaction of a tech product that simply works, straight out of the package. This cable makes high-performance networking accessible to all.
 

7. Your Connection, Anywhere: Perfect for Homes, RVs, and Adventures.

 
The versatility of the COBTEL Starlink CAT5E cable makes it an indispensable accessory for a wide range of applications and lifestyles. Its robust design and high performance are perfectly suited for permanent installations in residential buildings. Connect your Starlink dish to your home router to distribute blazing-fast internet throughout every room. Enjoy seamless streaming, lag-free gaming, and reliable connectivity for all your smart home devices. The cable's durability ensures it can be routed through walls, attics, or basements, providing a discreet and long-lasting connection solution for your primary residence. Its flame-retardant properties offer additional peace of mind for in-home use.
This cable truly shines for those who embrace a mobile lifestyle. For RV owners, reliable internet is no longer a luxury but a necessity. The COBTEL Starlink CAT5E cable is your perfect travel companion. Its waterproof and weather-resistant features mean you can confidently run it from your externally mounted Starlink dish into your RV, regardless of the weather conditions you encounter on your journeys. The cable's toughness resists the vibrations and minor stresses associated with road travel. Stay connected for remote work, navigation, entertainment, or keeping in touch with loved ones, no matter where your wheels take you. Its plug-and-play simplicity means quick setup and takedown at each new destination.
Adventure seekers and campers can also leverage the power of this cable. Setting up a Starlink system at a remote campsite provides unparalleled access to communication and information. This COBTEL cable's outdoor-grade PVC jacket and waterproof design are built to handle the demands of the great outdoors. Whether you are dealing with morning dew, forest debris, or an unexpected rain shower, your connection remains secure. Its length options provide flexibility in positioning your dish for optimal sky view while keeping your router and devices conveniently located. Beyond these, consider its use in temporary worksites, cabins, or any location where reliable, high-speed internet is needed without the infrastructure of traditional wired broadband. The COBTEL Starlink CAT5E cable adapts to your needs, providing a dependable link to the digital world, wherever life or work may lead you. It is more than just a cable; it is an enabler of connectivity for modern life, in all its diverse forms.
 

8. Inside the Innovation: Unpacking the Starlink CAT5E Cable's Superior Design.

 
The exceptional performance of the COBTEL Starlink CAT5E cable stems from its advanced internal design and meticulous construction. At its core, the cable employs a multi-core twisted pair structure. This is a fundamental design principle for high-quality network cables. Inside the main jacket, there are four pairs of copper wires. Each pair is gently twisted together along its entire length. This twisting is not arbitrary; it is precisely engineered. The purpose of twisting the pairs is to cancel out electromagnetic interference (EMI). As signals travel through the wires, they generate small magnetic fields. In a twisted pair, the fields from each wire in the pair are in opposite directions, effectively neutralizing each other. This significantly reduces crosstalk, which is signal leakage between adjacent pairs. Reduced crosstalk means a cleaner signal, less data corruption, and ultimately, faster and more reliable data transmission.
Further enhancing this protection against interference is the cable's shielding. This COBTEL cable features aluminum foil shielding. This thin layer of aluminum is wrapped around the twisted pairs, creating an additional barrier against external EMI. Sources of EMI can include power lines, fluorescent lights, electric motors, and other electronic devices. The aluminum foil intercepts this external noise, preventing it from degrading the data signals traveling through the copper conductors. This shielding is particularly important for maintaining signal integrity over longer cable runs or in environments with high levels of electrical noise. The combination of twisted pairs and aluminum foil shielding makes this a Shielded Twisted Pair (STP) design, offering superior noise immunity compared to unshielded (UTP) cables, especially for sensitive applications like Starlink.
The wire cores themselves, as previously mentioned, are 26AWG pure copper with 7 twisted strands per core. This specific gauge (26AWG) offers an excellent balance between conductivity for high-speed data and flexibility for ease of installation. The 7-strand construction within each core wire adds to this flexibility and greatly enhances the cable's resistance to breakage from bending or physical stress. While the promotional images provide an illustration, the actual internal structure is engineered for optimal performance. Every component, from the purity of the copper to the precision of the twists and the effectiveness of the shielding, is chosen and implemented to contribute to the cable's overall goal: delivering your Starlink internet connection with maximum speed, clarity, and reliability. This thoughtful internal engineering is what sets a premium cable like COBTEL's apart. It is the science inside that powers your seamless online experience.

description.en:
Description

1. Ultra Category 6 double-bent, rotatable slim network cable, 10 Gigabit transmission, flexible and portable.

2. 360-degree free rotation, angle can be chosen freely, wiring without constraints.

3. Dual-elbow design, specifically designed for narrow spaces, flexible wiring without easy bending.

4. 2.8mm slim cable, soft and lightweight, easy to carry, suitable for narrow spaces.

5. Transmission speed up to 10Gbps, bandwidth up to 500MHz.

6. Oxygen-free copper wire core, using 32AWG oxygen-free copper wire core, low impedance, minimal loss, high-speed internet.

7. Eight-core twisted pair, stable anti-interference, resistant to electromagnetic interference, no signal attenuation during transmission.

8. Gold-plated contacts, triple-pronged chip, oxidation-resistant, rust-resistant, longer lifespan.

9. PVC cable body, soft and slim, resistant to pulling, and durable.

10. Passed FLUKE testing, meeting Ultra Category 6 network standards.

description.en:
Description

1. 360° rotatable elbow, freely adjustable angle, no more worries about direction. 360° adapts to various scenarios, wiring as you wish, neat and tidy.

2. Rotate freely for neat wiring. Rotatable design for the elbow.

3. 10Gbps ultra-high-speed transmission, download a 1GB file in 10 seconds.

4. Stable internet connection, composed of 8 strands of wire cores, each strand using 32AWG wire for low impedance and smooth transmission.

5. Smooth gaming and movie streaming, no lag.

6. Ultra-fine wire design, with a wire diameter of only 2.8mm, is suitable for extremely narrow spaces.

7. Suitable for computers, routers, switches, TVs, set-top boxes, and various devices.

8. Thickened gold-plated contacts with gold-plated three-pronged chips, anti-oxidation, and durable for plugging and unplugging. Tight fit with the network cable, enhancing conductivity for faster and more stable internet speed.

9. 32AWG pure copper thickened wire core for stable and no attenuation transmission, composed of 4 pairs of twisted wires to resist signal interference and loss during transmission, pass the FLUKE testing.
