description.en:
Description

Cobtel Cat 5e UTP Patch Cord adopts an imported oxygen-free copper core, which has high conductivity and low signal transmission attenuation. The quality of the copper core determines the transmission performance of the network cable. 8 core wires are twisted in pairs, and each core wire is twisted by 7 strands of copper wire. The diameter of the single-strand copper wire is 0.16mm. The thicker the wire diameter and the more strands, the smaller the resistance and the better the transmission performance.

  

Specification:

Product Name

Cat 5e UTP Patch Cord

Shielding Type

UTP

Connector

RJ45 Plug

Reference Standard

ISO/IEC 11801, ANSI/TIA-568-C.2

Conductor Type

Stranded

Conductor Material

Pure Bare Copper

Wire Gauge (AWG)

24AWG

Pairs Qty

4 Twisted Pairs

Jacket Type

PVC(CMR FT4 Riser-Rated)

Strain Relief

Molded

Compliance

RoHS/REACH compliant, UL, IEC




Features:


  • 24K gold-plated 3 prongs copper shrapnel for faster conduction

The COBTEL modular plugs are made of 24K gold-plated 3 prongs of copper shrapnel that is resistant to plugging and corrosion, with long contact life and good transmission stability.

  • Separate jacket design reduces near-end crosstalk

The separate sheath design rejects the one-piece injection molding process, protects the root lay from being scattered and damaged, and reduces near-end crosstalk. At the same time, a comfortable pressing experience is achieved, and every detail is carefully designed.

  • New high-toughness environmentally friendly PC, high-toughness is not easy to break

Both the modular plugs and the sheath are made of new high-toughness and environmentally friendly PC, which can be repeatedly bent many times and can also maintain toughness and is not easy to crack.

  • Flexible PVC material

The raw materials are directly supplied by the first-class original factory in the industry, have bright color, and no peculiar smell, is safe and flame retardant, flexible and resistant to bending, anti-aging, new environmental protection material, eliminate recycled materials, healthy and non-toxic. Adapt to a variety of harsh outdoor environments, waterproof and sunscreen, cold-resistant and pull-resistant.


 

Fluke Networks-Cable Testing

Comply with YD/T926.2-2009, ISO/IEC 11801, ANSI/TIA568-C, 2-2009 standard

Through the authoritative FLUKE test, the quality is guaranteed

description.en:
Description

Cobtel Shielded Cat5e Patch Cable will get the lowest noise when the gold extends from the contact points to the solder connections on the circuit board. It is designed with molded boots or snagless installation and has extra protection for the RJ45 connector and clip. Its individual conductors are 24AWG stranded pure copper and flexibility is improved a lot. It Supports POE/POE+/POE++ power supply (IEE802.3af/at/bt/15W/30W/60W). A single network cable can realize the dual technology of wire and network cable without rearranging the power cable.


Specification

Product Name

Shielded Cat5e Patch Cable

Shielding Type

FPT/ F/UTP

Connector

RJ45 Plug 50U"

Reference Standard

ISO/IEC 11801, ANSI/TIA-568-C.2

Conductor Type

Stranded

Conductor Material

Pure Bare Copper

Wire Gauge (AWG)

24AWG

Pairs Qty

4 Twisted Pairs

Jacket Type

LSZH

Strain Relief

Molded

Compliance

RoHS/REACH compliant, UL, IEC

Jacket Color

Blue (RAL5017)




Features:


  • This shielded Cat5e patch cable is adopted 24AWG 8-core 7-strand (7*0.2) 4N oxygen-free copper wire core, instead of copper-clad steel, copper-clad aluminum, providing stable transmission, low signal attenuation, and fast network speed.

  • RJ45 plug is a 3-prong structure and fully gold-plated materials contacts 50U". It is tightly engaged with the wire core to enhance the transmission performance and make the transmission more stable.

  • Double twisted pair structure and tight twist control will effectively cancel the signal crosstalk between the existing pairs and improve electromagnetic compatibility (EMC).



Fluke Networks-Cable Testing


Comply with YD/T926.2-2009, ISO/IEC 11801, ANSI/TIA568-C, 2-2009 standard

Through the authoritative FLUKE test, the quality is guaranteed

description.en:
Description

Cobtel UTP Cat5e Patch Cable supports faster transfer rates from 1000 Mbps and up to 1 Gbps (Gigabit Ethernet). Cat5e network cable has many performance improvements such as near-end crosstalk, attenuation crosstalk ratio, and return loss. Its transmission bandwidth is still 100MHz, has low attenuation and less crosstalk, and has higher ACR and structural return loss. The Cat5e line is marked with "Cat5e" and currently, it is the popular product and is mainly used for Gigabit Ethernet (1000Mbps).


Specification:

Product Name

UTP Cat5e Patch Cable

Shielding Type

UPT

Connector

RJ45 Plug

Reference Standard

ISO/IEC 11801, ANSI/TIA-568-C.2

Conductor Type

Stranded

Wire Gauge (AWG)

26AWG

Jacket Type

PVC(CMR FT4 Riser-Rated)

Strain Relief

Molded

Compliance

RoHS/REACH compliant, UL, IEC

Jacket Color

Yellow ( RAL1018 )




Features:


  • Refined 26AWG thickened conductor core reducing signal loss during transmission and ensuring the network is much smoother.

  • An 8-core twisted pair network is more stable, each two cores are twisted with each other to resist external electromagnetic wave interference and transmit network signals stably.

  • Apply 50 microns of 24ct gold plating on top of the nickel plating makes strong transmission and improves electrical performance.

  • Standard RJ45 plugs, easy to plug and unplug, comply with the IEC-60603-7-2 standard.

  • PVC material is durable and not easy to break. The soft PVC outer jacket is wear-resistant and stretch-resistant.

  • The length of the finished patch cable includes the RJ45 connector and the production is strictly in accordance with the standard length.




Fluke Networks-Cable Testing

description.zh:
Description

Cobtel Patch Cord UTP CAT5E is constructed of 4 twisted pairs of wire widely used with greater resistance to crosstalk. It refers to the super five network cable that we usually use and mark on the outer cable jacket CAT5e. Compared with Category 5, Category 5e improves the performance like near-end crosstalk, attenuation crosstalk ratio, return loss, etc., but its transmission bandwidth is still kept at 100Mhz. In structured cabling projects, an oxygen-free copper network cable is usually selected and it has a small resistance, long transmission distance, and stable transmission.

Why should you choose COBTEL as your partner?

description.en:
Description

Product Description:

 

In the realm of digital communication, the COBTEL UTP Cat6 Ethernet Cable emerges as a beacon of innovation, a testament to the relentless pursuit of excellence in the world of networking. This isn't just a cable; it's a lifeline to the digital pulse that powers businesses, connects individuals, and drives the endless flow of information that is the lifeblood of modern society.
 

The Backbone of Digital Infrastructure


The COBTEL UTP Cat6 Ethernet Cable is designed to be the backbone of your digital infrastructure. With its unparalleled ability to transmit data at speeds of up to 1 Gbps, it is the superhighway for information. In a world where time is currency, this cable is your assurance that every byte of data reaches its destination with speed and precision.
 

Technical Superiority


At the core of our Cat6 cable lies a meticulously engineered structure, composed of eight copper conductors, twisted into four pairs. Each conductor is crafted from high-grade copper, chosen for its superior electrical conductivity and its ability to reduce signal attenuation. The result is a cable that not only meets the rigorous TIA/EIA standards but exceeds them.
 

Unwavering Reliability


In the unforgiving landscape of networking, reliability is not just a feature-it is a cornerstone. The COBTEL UTP Cat6 Ethernet Cable is built with a robust PVC jacket, which not only protects the inner core from environmental hazards but also ensures that the cable remains flexible and durable over time. This durability is critical in both commercial and industrial environments where cables are frequently exposed to physical stress.
 

Electromagnetic Interference: A Silent Adversary


One of the greatest challenges in network connectivity is combating electromagnetic interference (EMI). Our modern world is awash with electronic devices, each emitting its own electromagnetic field. The COBTEL UTP Cat6 Ethernet Cable is designed to shield your data from these invisible waves of disruption. The twisted pair design cancels out EMI, ensuring that your data remains pure and uncorrupted from source to destination.
 

A Symphony of Compatibility


The beauty of the COBTEL UTP Cat6 Ethernet Cable lies in its universal compatibility. From the bustling data centers that form the nerve centers of corporations to the humble desktop in a small office, this cable is the common thread that connects a myriad of devices. Routers, switches, computers, and smart devices-all sing in harmony when connected by the COBTEL Cat6 cable.
 

The Green Cable


In an age where the environment is at the forefront of global discourse, COBTEL takes pride in offering a product that not only performs but also preserves. The PVC jacket of our Cat6 cable is not only durable but also environmentally friendly, ensuring that your network's footprint is as light as possible on our planet.
 

Fluke Tested, Performance Guaranteed


Every COBTEL UTP Cat6 Ethernet Cable is put through its paces with Fluke network analyzers, the gold standard in cable testing. This rigorous process ensures that when you deploy our cable in your network, you're deploying a product that has been tested for optimal performance and reliability.
 

The Art of Installation


The installation of network cabling is an art form, a delicate dance between functionality and aesthetics. The COBTEL UTP Cat6 Ethernet Cable is designed with both in mind. Its sleek, unobtrusive design allows it to blend seamlessly into any environment, while its flexibility ensures that it can navigate the complex pathways of any infrastructure.
 

The Future is Now


As we stand on the cusp of a new era in digital communication, with the advent of technologies like the Internet of Things (IoT) and 5G, the COBTEL UTP Cat6 Ethernet Cable is ready. It is a cable that not only serves the needs of today's networks but is also poised to support the technologies of tomorrow.
 

Your Trusted Partner in Connectivity


COBTEL is more than just a manufacturer; we are your trusted partner in connectivity. Our commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction is unwavering. When you choose the COBTEL UTP Cat6 Ethernet Cable, you're not just choosing a product; you're choosing a partner who will stand by you as your network grows and evolves.
 
In conclusion, the COBTEL UTP Cat6 Ethernet Cable is not just a conduit for data; it is the very fabric that weaves together the tapestry of our digital lives. It is a cable that offers unmatched speed, reliability, and quality, ensuring that your network is ready to meet the challenges of today and the opportunities of tomorrow.

description.en:
Description

Product Description:

 

Step into the world of unparalleled connectivity with COBTEL's Gigabit 15m/30m Cat6 Ethernet Cable, the quintessential networking powerhouse designed to catapult your business into the era of high-speed internet. With the digital landscape evolving at breakneck speeds, COBTEL ensures that your network infrastructure doesn't just keep up-it leads the charge. The 15m/30m length are sutable for indoor and outdoor long distance cabling requirments.

 

Unleashing Gigabit Speeds


Our Cat6 Ethernet cable is a marvel of engineering, optimized for Gigabit Ethernet applications. With a transmission speed of 1000Mbps, it's tailored to meet the bandwidth requirements of the most data-intensive operations. Whether you're streaming high-definition video, managing large databases, or engaging in high-frequency trading, this cable ensures that your data flows rapidly and reliably.

 

The Pinnacle of Quality


At COBTEL, we don't compromise on quality. Our Ethernet cable boasts eight-core, gold-plated conductors made from the purest copper, ensuring minimal resistance and maximum conductivity. The gold plating on the RJ45 connectors not only adds a touch of elegance but also provides an anti-corrosive shield, ensuring that your connections remain robust over time.

 

Durability That Endures


We understand that a network cable is more than just a conduit for data-it's the lifeline of your operation. That's why our Cat6 cable is encased in a 6mm thick, environmentally friendly PVC sheath. It's designed to withstand over 2000 bending tests, guaranteeing that it can endure the twists and turns of any installation environment without compromising performance.

 

Shielded From Interference


In today's world of dense electronic environments, electromagnetic interference can wreak havoc on network performance. Our twisted pair design is meticulously crafted to minimize crosstalk and external noise, ensuring that your signal remains pristine. This shielding is particularly crucial in settings with numerous competing signals, where maintaining signal integrity is paramount.

 

Compatibility and Versatility


The COBTEL Gigabit Cat6 Ethernet Cable is a testament to versatility. It seamlessly integrates into any existing network setup, supporting a wide array of devices including routers, switches, computers, and more. Whether you're upgrading an old network or building a new one from scratch, our cable is designed to fit right in without missing a beat.

 

Fluke Tested, Business Approved


Every COBTEL Ethernet cable undergoes rigorous testing with Fluke network analyzers, ensuring that each foot of cabling meets or exceeds industry standards. When you choose COBTEL, you're not just choosing a cable; you're choosing peace of mind, knowing that your network is equipped with cables that have been tested for optimal performance.

 

A Partner in Your Network's Journey


Our commitment to you goes beyond providing a superior product. We see ourselves as partners in your network's journey towards efficiency and excellence. Our customer service team is always on standby, ready to assist with any questions or support you might need.

 

Investing in Your Network's Future


Choosing COBTEL's 15m/30m Gigabit Cat6 Ethernet Cable is an investment in your network's future. It's an assurance that as your business grows and technology evolves, your networking infrastructure will not be left behind. It's a promise of scalability, reliability, and quality that COBTEL proudly stands behind.

 

In conclusion, the COBTEL Gigabit Cat6 Ethernet Cable isn't just another component in your network-it's the foundation upon which your digital operations can thrive. It's a blend of speed, quality, and durability that ensures your network is ready for whatever the future holds. Choose COBTEL, and connect with confidence.

description.en:
Description

Product Description:

 
Welcome to the pinnacle of networking excellence with COBTEL's Gigabit Category 6 Network Cable, a full upgrade engineered to propel your connectivity into the stratosphere of speed and reliability. This isn't just a cable; it's the superhighway for your data, crafted meticulously for those who won't settle for anything less than the best.
 

1. Unleash Lightning-Fast Speeds:
Our engineering-grade Gigabit network cable is your ticket to a world where slow downloads and buffering are a distant memory. Choose COBTEL for a faster speed that transforms your internet experience, making every click, every stream, and every game as smooth as silk.

 

2. Tool-Free, Hassle-Free:
With our innovative One-Piece Molding and Integrated Sheath design, you'll enjoy easy insertion with a press, integrated anti-slip, and sanded sheath that's convenient and easy to handle. It's not just a cable; it's a statement of simplicity and efficiency.

 

3. Durability Meets Design:
The robust PVC integrated molding and a 6mm thick wire diameter ensure that our cable's skin does not break after multiple bending tests. It's durable without cracking, offering longer-lasting use and peace of mind.

 

4. Gold-Plated Excellence:
Our 50U" gold-plated pins feature a three-fork structure that closely connects to the core wire, enhancing transmission performance and stability. It's the gold standard for your network, ensuring that every connection is not just secure, but golden.

 

5. Versatility at Its Core:
Whether it's a router, desktop computer, laptop, smart switch, digital printer, network set-top box, or smart TV, our cable is suitable for various devices and scenarios. It's the one cable to rule them all, providing the flexibility your devices crave.

 

6. Fluke Tested, Quality Assured:
Every COBTEL cable is tested with Fluke instruments, guaranteeing reliability through rigorous testing and ensuring a secure internet connection that stands the test of time.

 

7. Specifications That Speak Volumes:
Our UTP Cat6 Ethernet Cable is not just any cable; it's a testament to quality with an environmentally friendly PVC outer sheath, 24AWG internal conductor, and a sleek black color that exudes elegance. The 50U gold-plating and 1000Mbps transmission speed are not just features; they're promises of a network that's faster, stronger, and more reliable than ever before.

 
In a world where the internet is the lifeline of technology, COBTEL's Gigabit Category 6 Network Cable is your assurance of a connection that's not just powerful, but also an experience that redefines what it means to be connected. It's not just about being online; it's about being at the forefront of digital innovation with a cable that's engineered for excellence.
 
Choose COBTEL, where every wire, every connector, and every inch of cable is a pledge of performance. Connect with confidence, speed, and the power of a cable that's built not just for today, but for the future of networking.

With our innovative One-Piece Molding and Integrated Sheath design, you'll enjoy easy insertion with a press, integrated anti-slip, and sanded sheath that's convenient and easy to handle. It's not just a cable; it's a statement of simplicity and efficiency.

 

3. Durability Meets Design:
The robust PVC integrated molding and a 6mm thick wire diameter ensure that our cable's skin does not break after multiple bending tests. It's durable without cracking, offering longer-lasting use and peace of mind.

 

4. Gold-Plated Excellence:
Our 50U" gold-plated pins feature a three-fork structure that closely connects to the core wire, enhancing transmission performance and stability. It's the gold standard for your network, ensuring that every connection is not just secure, but golden.

 

5. Versatility at Its Core:
Whether it's a router, desktop computer, laptop, smart switch, digital printer, network set-top box, or smart TV, our cable is suitable for various devices and scenarios. It's the one cable to rule them all, providing the flexibility your devices crave.

 

6. Fluke Tested, Quality Assured:
Every COBTEL cable is tested with Fluke instruments, guaranteeing reliability through rigorous testing and ensuring a secure internet connection that stands the test of time.

 

7. Specifications That Speak Volumes:
Our UTP Cat6 Ethernet Cable is not just any cable; it's a testament to quality with an environmentally friendly PVC outer sheath, 24AWG internal conductor, and a sleek black color that exudes elegance. The 50U gold-plating and 1000Mbps transmission speed are not just features; they're promises of a network that's faster, stronger, and more reliable than ever before.

 
In a world where the internet is the lifeline of technology, COBTEL's Gigabit Category 6 Network Cable is your assurance of a connection that's not just powerful, but also an experience that redefines what it means to be connected. It's not just about being online; it's about being at the forefront of digital innovation with a cable that's engineered for excellence.
 
Choose COBTEL, where every wire, every connector, and every inch of cable is a pledge of performance. Connect with confidence, speed, and the power of a cable that's built not just for today, but for the future of networking.

description.en:
Description

Product Name: Flat Ethernet Cable, 8-core Ethernet Cable, Finished Ethernet Cable, RJ45 Network Cable, Flat Network Cable, Cat6 Flat Ethernet Cable, Cat6 Flat Cable
Cat6 Flat Cable (UTP - Unshielded Twisted Pair) is composed of multiple pairs of twisted-pair wires within a plastic outer sheath.
Conductor Size: 28AWG (70.12mm) / 30AWG (70.10mm) / 32AWG (7*0.08mm), 4 pairs, 8 cores twisted-pair wires.
Conductor Material: Oxygen-Free Copper (BC/BS), Multi-stranded.
Shape: Flat cable, OD: 1.5*6.0±0.2mm.
Outer Jacket: Conventional environmentally friendly flame-retardant PVC, Low Smoke Zero Halogen (LSZH) / VW-1 / CM / IEC60332-1-2, GB/T18380.12-2008.
Craftsmanship: Multi-stranded design (7*8 cores), flexible, slim and easy to carry, suitable for wiring in door seams, corners, and under carpets.
Connector: 24K gold-plated crystal head with 3 forks, machine-formed at the connection point with the network cable.
Plug and Unplug Cycles: ≥ 5000 times.
Product Performance:
Cat6 Ethernet Cable Transmission Speed and Bandwidth: The quality of twisted-pair wires is one of the key factors determining the local area network's bandwidth. Cat6 Ethernet Cable supports Gigabit Ethernet with a bandwidth of 250MHz.
Compatibility: Compatible with Cat5e, Cat5, Cat3, Cat4 Ethernet Cables.
Quality Inspection Requirement: Passed Fluke Channel Testing.
Product Specifications: Available in lengths of 0.5/1/1.5/2/3/5/8/10/15/20/25/30 meters.
Compliance Standards: ANSI/TIA 568 B.2, ISO/IEC 11801-1:2008, YD/T 926.3-2009.
Operating Temperature: -20°C to 60°C.
Product Certification: Certified by the Information Industry Data Communication Product Quality Supervision and Inspection Center, ROHS/CE/REACH.
Quality Assurance: 5-year warranty.
Application Range: Routers, switches, personal computers, structured cabling, home cabling, and more.

description.en:
Description

Cobtel Patch Cord Cat6 UTP compared with the CAT5E, the parameters have been greatly improved, providing 2.5 times the physical bandwidth, supporting higher transmission rates, high-speed transmission performance is more stable. The addition of insulating cross isolation belts and thicker copper cores can effectively reduce crosstalk and return loss, making it more suitable for building Gigabit Ethernet networks and stably supporting the upcoming 2.5Gbps/5Gbps network; Support 10Gbps transfer rate.


Specification

Product Name

Patch Cord Cat6 UTP

Shielding Type

Unhielded(UTP)

Connector

RJ45 Long Body plug

Reference Standard

ISO/IEC 11801, ANSI/TIA-568-C.2

Conductor Type

Stranded

Conductor Material

Pure Bare Copper

Wire Gauge (AWG)

28AWG/26AWG/24AWG

Pairs Qty

4 Twisted Pairs

Jacket Type

PVC(CMR FT4 Riser Rated)

Strain Relief

Assembled, Clear Boot

Compliance

RoHS/REACH comliant, UL, IEC

Jacket Color

White ( RAL9016)

Blue ( RAL5017 )

Grey ( RAL7042 )

Red ( RAL3020 )

Orange ( RAL 2003 )

Yellow ( RAL1018 )

Green ( RAL6016 )




Features:

  • 24K 50u″ gold-plated contacts for faster conduction


Signal transmission losses mostly occur at the contacts. The thicker and more uniform the gold plating of the modular plug contacts, the more resistant to plugging and unplugging, acid and alkali corrosion, the longer the contact life, and the better the transmission stability. The COBTEL modular plug adopts phosphor bronze continuous gold plating process, with a gold plating thickness of up to 50u〃, and the conduction is faster.


  • Three-piece combined RJ45 Plug head to reduce near-end crosstalk


The separate sheath design rejects the one-piece injection molding process and protects the twist of the root of the network cable from being scattered and damaged. With the distribution frame, the eight cables are evenly divided into upper and lower rows to further reduce near-end crosstalk and ensure stable data transmission.


  • Precise twisted pair technology, stable and anti-interference


Precise four-pair twisting technology controls the error to the millimeter level. The tight and precise twist control can effectively offset the signal crosstalk between the wire pairs, and at the same time better resist the external electromagnetic wave interference and ensure the stability of signal transmission.

Fluke Networks-Cable Testing


Cobtel UTP Patch Cord Cat6 100% Fluke test and comply with RoHS, REACH, UL,IEC.

description.en:
Description

Cobtel 28 AWG copper patch cords are manufactured with high-performance CAT6/CAT6A cable and RJ45 modular plugs. It is more suitable for the high-density data center than the traditional 24AWG jumper cable and can improve the data center wiring capacity. It's lighter and saves about 25%~30% storage space, improves freight and storage efficiency, and reduces the overall engineering cost.

Specification

Product Name

28 AWG copper patch cord

Brand

Neutral/Customized

Cable Guage

28AWG, stranded copper

Nominal Weight per 1000ft

6.5kg

Cable Jacket Material

Flame resistent, LSZH or PVC UL

Cable Outside Diameter

4.0mm

Operating Temperature Range

-20°C to +60°C(-4°F to 167°F)

High-Frequency Performance

ISO/IEC 11801

Power Over Ethernet

PoE (IEEE 802.3af) and PoEP (IEEE 802.3at)

Modular Plug Structure

IEC 60603-7,

Environmental Compliance

RoHS

Pulling Tension

Max. 50N

Bending Radium (without load)

Min. 8 x Cable Diameter


Features:


  1. Mini 28 AWG copper patch cords are designed to meet and exceed the ISO, and TIA.

  2. It could provide better cable management, saving 50~60% of the cable space, the same cable pipeline can accommodate more cables, reducing project costs.

  3. Slimmer conductors can achieve a smaller bending radius, optimizing cable management and convenient installation, and reducing later operation and maintenance costs.

  4. Transmission performance and mechanical properties are not inferior to 24AWG patch cord.

  5. The number of plugging and unplugging can reach 2500 times.

  6. Large headroom, excellent performance with standard TIA/EIA-568-C.2.

  7. Continuous 1-minute load 50N, outstanding performance with standard IEC60603-7.

  8. Support bandwidth up to 500MHz and up to 10Gbps data transmitting speed, PASS FLUKE CHANNEL TEST.

  9. 50 Micron Gold-plated 3prong contacts provide a fully contact wire conductor and ensure excellent conductivity.


Click and browse more Cat6A patch cords


To see our factory's production capacity and domestic and international certification. Click About Us


Don't hesitate to ask for a quote or request samples for project or quality evaluation, our professional expert team will be back to you within 8 hours. If you want to find an OEM factory for customized products, you can tell us your detailed requirements by submitting the Inquiry Form below or Contact by WhatsApp directly

description.en:
Description

Cobtel CAT6A Shielded Patch Cords significantly enhance a cord's alien performance. It uses the combination of RJ45 termination, strain relief boot, grounding assurance, and balance cabling to manufacture shielded patch cords that consistently support high performance. This performance is further enhanced when connected to Cobtel keystone jacks or patch panels. To achieve better performance, the plug termination must provide target transfer impedance with an optimal shield termination meanwhile not changing the LAN cable's impedance characteristics.


Specification:

Product Name

CAT6A Shielded Patch Cord

Shielding Type

Shielded (FTP)

Termination End

RJ45 plug

Reference Standard

ISO/IEC 11801, ANSI/TIA-568-C.2

Conductor Type

Stranded

Conductor Material

Pure Bare Copper

Wire Gauge (AWG)

28AWG 4-pair precision twisted cables.

Conductor Qty

4 Twisted Pairs

Connector Type

Strain Relief Boot

Jacket Materials

PVC(CM)/LSZH

Standard Compliance

RoHS/REACH compliant, UL, IEC

Core Color

A. White-Blue,

B. White-Orange,

C. White-Green,

D. White-Brown


Features:


  • Support 10Gbase-T Ethernet to get more reliable data transmission.

  • The patch cord speeds up to bandwidth 500MHz communications.

  • Mini Category 6A 28AWG patch cords are 100% tested for performance, reliability, and long life.

  • The 28AWG design improves LAN cable density with a reduced cross-sectional area, promoting increased air flow and rack ventilation.

  • RJ45 plugs with 50 microinches gold-plated connectors are ideal for high-density applications.

  • A variety of lengths for all CAT6A FTP cables.


Product Highlights:


RJ45 Modular Plug

The modular plugs apply 50" golding plating to provide the highest level of electrical signal performance.



Various Colors Jacket

White ( RAL9016)/Blue ( RAL5017 )/Grey ( RAL7042 )/Red ( RAL3020 )/Orange ( RAL 2003 )/Yellow ( RAL1018 )/Green ( RAL6016 )


Strain Relief Boot

The boot increases the friction for sliding


Fluke Networks-Cable Testing

CAT6A Shielded Patch Cord passes the Fluke patch cord test, for example, 100% Cat.6A Component Test, NEXT, PS NEXT, ACR-F, PS ACR-F, ACR-N, PS ACR-N as well as RL.

To see our factory's production capacity and domestic and international certification. Click About Us

description.en:
Description

Product Name: Cat7 Double Shielded Network Cable, Cat7 Patch Cable, 10G Ethernet Cable, Finished RJ45 Network Cable, Crystal Head Ethernet Cable, Home Network Cable, 8-Core Ethernet Cable

Cat7 Double Shielded Twisted Pair (S/FTP - Double shielded Twisted Pair) is composed of multiple pairs of twisted-pair wires + aluminum foil + braiding + a plastic outer sheath.

Conductor Size: 28AWG (70.12mm) / 26AWG (70.16mm), 4 pairs of 8-core twisted-pair wires.

Conductor Material: Oxygen-free copper (BC/BS) multi-strands.

Shape: Round cable, OD: 6.2±0.2mm.

Outer Jacket: Conventional environmentally friendly flame-retardant PVC, Low Smoke Zero Halogen (LSZH) / VW-1 / CM / IEC60332-1-2, GB/T18380.12-2008.

Technical Features: Multi-strand design (7*8 strands), flexible.

RJ45 Crystal Head: 24K gold-plated terminal, 3-pronged, machine-injected at the connection point of the network cable for enhanced durability.

Plug and Unplug Durability: ≥5000 times.

Product Performance:

Cat7 Network Cable Transmission Speed and Bandwidth: The quality of twisted-pair wires is one of the key factors determining the bandwidth of a local area network. Cat7 Network Cable can transmit 10 Gigabit Ethernet, with a bandwidth of 600MHz.

Compatibility: Compatible with Cat6a, Cat6, Cat5e, Cat5, Cat3, and Cat4 Network Cables.

Quality Inspection Requirement: Passed Fluke Channel Test.

Product Specifications: 0.5/1/1.5/2/3/5/8/10/15/20/25/30/40/50/60 meters.

Execution Standard: ANSI/TIA 568 B.2, ISO/IEC 11801-1:2008, YD/T 926.3-2009.

Operating Temperature: -20°C to 60°C.

Product Certification: Certified by the Information Industry Data Communication Product Quality Supervision and Inspection Center, ROHS/CE/REACH.

Quality Assurance: 5-year warranty.

Applicable Scope: Routers, switches, personal computers, data centers, monitoring, server rooms, integrated cabling, etc.

 

 

 

Hot Tags: Cat7 10-gigabit High Speed Flat Network Cable Assembly, suppliers, manufacturers, factory, wholesale, price, pricelist, quotation, bulk, cheap

description.en:
Description


Cobtel Cat7 Shielded Ethernet Cable 150ft (Highest Speed Cable) Round Ethernet Patch Cable Support Cat5/Cat6 Network,600Mhz,10Gbps -  Computer Cord + Free Clips and Straps for Router Xbox

✔High Quality: Made of 4 shielded twisted pairs (STP) of copper wire with gold-plated contact pins in each RJ45 Connector. This provides great resistance to crosstalk, noise, and interference.

✔High Speed: Supports 600MHz high-speed data transfer for server applications, cloud storage, video chatting, high-definition video streaming, and gaming. Cat7 cables are the best generation.

✔High Compatibility： The Class F channel and Cat7 cable are compatible with cat5, cat5e, and cat6. Class F has less cross-talk and system noise past than Class E thanks to intelligent shielding.

✔High Neatness: A Flat cable design helps improve the look of your home or office. Flat cables are super flexible and can be run under the carpet or bent through corners or into desks.

✔High Standards: The cable is compliant with ANSI/TIA/EIA 568-B, 2-1, with up to 10 Gbps data and meets all proposed CAT-7 Requirements; Supports:10GBASE-T; 1000 BASE-T; 100

Description


Cobtel Cat7 Shielded Ethernet Cable 150ft (Highest Speed Cable) Round Ethernet Patch Cable Support Cat5/Cat6 Network,600Mhz,10Gbps -  Computer Cord + Free Clips and Straps for Router Xbox

✔High Quality: Made of 4 shielded twisted pairs (STP) of copper wire with gold-plated contact pins in each RJ45 Connector. This provides great resistance to crosstalk, noise, and interference.

✔High Speed: Supports 600MHz high-speed data transfer for server applications, cloud storage, video chatting, high-definition video streaming, and gaming. Cat7 cables are the best generation.

✔High Compatibility： The Class F channel and Cat7 cable are compatible with cat5, cat5e, and cat6. Class F has less cross-talk and system noise past than Class E thanks to intelligent shielding.

✔High Neatness: A Flat cable design helps improve the look of your home or office. Flat cables are super flexible and can be run under the carpet or bent through corners or into desks.

✔High Standards: The cable is compliant with ANSI/TIA/EIA 568-B, 2-1, with up to 10 Gbps data and meets all proposed CAT-7 Requirements; Supports:10GBASE-T; 1000 BASE-T; 100

description.en:
Description

Cobtel Patch Cord Cat 8 is the latest generation of double-shielded SFTP network cable. It has two wire pairs, supports 2000Mhz broadband, and transmits up to 40Gb/s, but its maximum transmission distance is only 30M. Therefore now it is generally used for the connection of servers, switches, distribution frames, and other equipment over short distances.


Specification

Product Name

Patch Cord Cat 8

Shielding Type

Shielded

Connector

RJ45 Plug

Connector Type

Tool-free

Reference Standard

ISO/IEC 11801, ANSI/TIA-568-C.2

Conductor Type

Stranded

Conductor Material

Pure Bare Copper

Wire Gauge (AWG)

24AWG

Pairs Qty

4 Twisted Pairs

Jacket Type

PVC

Compliance

RoHS/REACH compliant, UL, IEC


Features:

  • Complying with the IEE802.3bq 25G/40GBASE-T standard, it specifies the minimum transmission rate of Cat8 network cables and can support 25Gbps and 40Gbps network wiring.

  • Complying with ANSI/TIA-568-C.2-1 standard, it specifies the channel and permanent link of Cat8 network cable and includes the limitation of resistance unbalanced TCL and ELTCTL.

  • Complying with the ANSI/TIA-1152-A standard, it specifies the measurement and accuracy requirements of the CAT8 category eight network cable field tester.

  • Complying with the ISO-IEC-11801 standard, it specifies the channel and permanent link of the I/II CAT8 eight-category network cable.

  • CAT8 network cable is the same as Cat7 network cable, it is a shielded twisted pair, which can be used in data centers, high-speed and bandwidth-intensive places, although the transmission distance of CAT8 network cable is not as far as 7/7 super network cable, but its speed and frequency are far more than CAT7 super network cables. The difference between CAT8 network cable and CAT5E/ CAT6/CAT6A network cable is mainly reflected in the speed, frequency, transmission distance, and application.


The difference between CAT7 vs Cat8 Ethernect cables.


Category

Cat 7

Cat 8

Frequency

600MHz

2,000MHz

Max Speed

40 Gbps at 10 meters

25 Gbps at 100 meters and 40 Gbps at 30 meters

Crosstalk

Twisted cables help eliminate crosstalk

Similar to Cat 7

Lifespan

15 years

15 years

TIA/EIA Recognition

No

Yes

Power over Ethernet

No

Yes

name.zh: Ethercat/IP Industrial High-flex Cat5e Shielded Towline Ethernet Cable

brief.en: Cat5e SF/UTP 4x2x26AWG/19 PUR polyurethane blue industrial high-flex shielded towline Ethernet cable. High-Flexibility Industrial Ethernet Towline Bus Cable, Category 5e (Cat5e) SF/UTP PUR, 4x2x26AWG/19, Blue Color. Industrial High-Flex Towline Ethernet Cable, Cat5e 4-Pair 26AWG/19 Towline Cable, Suitable For High-Flexibility And Frequent Motion Control Wiring In Towline Applications. It Has 4 Pairs Of 8-Core Shielded Wires And A PUR Outer Sheath In Clear Water Blue Color. The Cable Has A Cross-Sectional Area Of 0.14 Mm And An Approximate Outer Diameter Of 6.2mm.
brief.zh: Cat5e SF/UTP 4x2x26AWG/19 PUR polyurethane blue industrial high-flex shielded towline Ethernet cable. High-Flexibility Industrial Ethernet Towline Bus Cable, Category 5e (Cat5e) SF/UTP PUR, 4x2x26AWG/19, Blue Color. Industrial High-Flex Towline Ethernet Cable, Cat5e 4-Pair 26AWG/19 Towline Cable, Suitable For High-Flexibility And Frequent Motion Control Wiring In Towline Applications. It Has 4 Pairs Of 8-Core Shielded Wires And A PUR Outer Sheath In Clear Water Blue Color. The Cable Has A Cross-Sectional Area Of 0.14 Mm And An Approximate Outer Diameter Of 6.2mm.

description.en:
Description

Shielding: Braided Copper Mesh Certification: CE
Model: Cat5e (Category 5e) Specification: Sf/UTP 4*2*26AWG/19
Packaging: 100 meters, 200 meters, 500 meters Approx. OD of Industrial Towline Ethernet Cable: 6.2mm
The feature of Industrial Towline Ethernet Cable: Specialized for towline use, high flexibility, shielded, Cat5e Spec. of Industrial Towline Ethernet Cable: Sf/UTP 4*2*26AWG/19 pur
Transmission of Industrial Towline Ethernet Cable: 100 Mbit/s for Industrial Ethernet Jacket of Industrial Towline Ethernet Cable: Blue Polyurethane (PUR)
Application of Industrial Towline Ethernet Cable: Suitable for dynamic towline applications, compatible with EtherCAT and Ethernet/IP.  
Support OEM OEM Custom processing is available core conductor material bare copper
The number of cores: 8 Application: Suitable for frequent motion occasions, tow lines, tank chains, and servo drive occasions.

 

Other product names:

Cat5e SF/UTP 4x2x26AWG/19 PUR polyurethane blue industrial high-flex shielded towline Ethernet cable, towline cable, shielded towline cable, industrial towline cable, high-flexibility cable, high-flex cable, high-flex towline cable, 8-core towline cable, PUR towline cable, polyurethane towline cable, COBTEL towline cable, towline cable with RJ45 plug, high-flexibility industrial Ethernet cable.

 

 

 

Basic Description:

High-flexibility industrial Ethernet towline bus cable, Category 5e (Cat5e) SF/UTP PUR, 4x2x26AWG/19, blue color. Industrial high-flex towline Ethernet cable, Cat5e 4-pair 26AWG/19 towline cable, suitable for high-flexibility and frequent motion control wiring in towline applications. It has 4 pairs of 8-core shielded wires and a PUR outer sheath in clear water blue color. The cable has a cross-sectional area of 0.14 mm and an approximate outer diameter of 6.2mm.

 

 

 

Performance & Features:

High-flexibility industrial Ethernet communication shielded cable towline.

 

Industrial Ethernet high-flex CAT5e SF/UTP 4x2x26AWG/19 with PUR (Polyurethane) sheath in blue color, with an approximate outer diameter of 6.2mm.

Cable Structure:

Conductor: Multi-stranded copper conductors, 26AWG, 0.14mm (19/0.1).

Pairs: Four pairs of eight-core twisted wires.

Insulation: PE (Polyethylene).

Wire colors: 1. White/Blue, Blue color 2. White/Orange, Orange color 3. White/Green, Green color 4. White/Brown, Brown color.

SF/UTP: Aluminum foil shielded with tinned copper braid.

Sheath: PUR (Polyurethane).

Color: Blue, approximate RAL5021.

Approximate Outer Diameter: 6.2mm.

 

Technical Parameters:

Temperature Range:

Fixed Application: PUR: -40°C to 80°C

Mobile Application: PUR: -20°C to 60°C

 

Test Voltage:

1000V/min (DC)

 

Characteristic Impedance:

100±15Ω at 100MHz

 

Insulation Resistance:

≥5GΩ·km

 

Bending Radius:

Fixed Application: 5D (D= Cable Diameter)

Mobile Application: 10D (D= Cable Diameter)

 

Applications:

High-flexibility industrial Ethernet cables can be used in industrial automation settings. They are suitable for use in towline applications or scenarios with frequent movement, as well as in motion control wiring applications. They are also suitable for EtherCAT, EtherNet/IP, and CC-Link IE Field applications.

 

The packaging method：

100 meters per roll, 200 meters per roll, and 500 meters per roll of CAT5e SF/UTP 4x2x26awg/19 with PUR (Polyurethane) sheath.

Cat5e SF/UTP 4x2x26AWG/19 PUR polyurethane blue industrial high-flex shielded towline Ethernet cable, towline cable, shielded towline cable, industrial towline cable, high-flexibility cable, high-flex cable, high-flex towline cable, 8-core towline cable, PUR towline cable, polyurethane towline cable, COBTEL towline cable, towline cable with RJ45 plug, high-flexibility industrial Ethernet cable.

 

 

 

Basic Description:

High-flexibility industrial Ethernet towline bus cable, Category 5e (Cat5e) SF/UTP PUR, 4x2x26AWG/19, blue color. Industrial high-flex towline Ethernet cable, Cat5e 4-pair 26AWG/19 towline cable, suitable for high-flexibility and frequent motion control wiring in towline applications. It has 4 pairs of 8-core shielded wires and a PUR outer sheath in clear water blue color. The cable has a cross-sectional area of 0.14 mm and an approximate outer diameter of 6.2mm.

 

 

 

Performance & Features:

High-flexibility industrial Ethernet communication shielded cable towline.

 

Industrial Ethernet high-flex CAT5e SF/UTP 4x2x26AWG/19 with PUR (Polyurethane) sheath in blue color, with an approximate outer diameter of 6.2mm.

Cable Structure:

Conductor: Multi-stranded copper conductors, 26AWG, 0.14mm (19/0.1).

Pairs: Four pairs of eight-core twisted wires.

Insulation: PE (Polyethylene).

Wire colors: 1. White/Blue, Blue color 2. White/Orange, Orange color 3. White/Green, Green color 4. White/Brown, Brown color.

SF/UTP: Aluminum foil shielded with tinned copper braid.

Sheath: PUR (Polyurethane).

Color: Blue, approximate RAL5021.

Approximate Outer Diameter: 6.2mm.

 

Technical Parameters:

Temperature Range:

Fixed Application: PUR: -40°C to 80°C

Mobile Application: PUR: -20°C to 60°C

 

Test Voltage:

1000V/min (DC)

 

Characteristic Impedance:

100±15Ω at 100MHz

 

Insulation Resistance:

≥5GΩ·km

 

Bending Radius:

Fixed Application: 5D (D= Cable Diameter)

Mobile Application: 10D (D= Cable Diameter)

 

Applications:

High-flexibility industrial Ethernet cables can be used in industrial automation settings. They are suitable for use in towline applications or scenarios with frequent movement, as well as in motion control wiring applications. They are also suitable for EtherCAT, EtherNet/IP, and CC-Link IE Field applications.

 

The packaging method：

100 meters per roll, 200 meters per roll, and 500 meters per roll of CAT5e SF/UTP 4x2x26awg/19 with PUR (Polyurethane) sheath.

Description

Application Dynamic motion scenarios Number of cores: 4 cores
Protocol compatibility Industrial Ethernet Profinet protocol Temperature resistance: -20-70℃
Shielding: Aluminum foil with tin-plated copper shielding, double shielding, and anti-interference. Model

profinet type C 4*22awg/19 PUR

 

Dynamic towline cable, industrial Ethernet Profinet/PN communication cable with a temperature resistance range of -20 to 70℃. It is suitable for use in environments requiring higher temperature resistance, and its superior performance ensures stable communication. It is compatible with RJ45 pressure-free metal connectors, allowing for repeated use.

 

Other product names:

Dynamic towline industrial Ethernet Profinet/PN communication cable, dynamic towline industrial communication cable, dynamic Profinet communication cable, dynamic PN communication cable, towline Profinet cable, towline PN cable, 4-core industrial cable, 4-core industrial towline cable, dynamic high-flex industrial communication cable, dynamic towline high-flex communication cable, towline cable/communication cable, Profinet protocol towline cable, towline cable for Ethernet communication, green towline cable for Ethernet.

 

PROFINET Towline Cable, PROFINET Bus Cable, PROFINET Industrial Ethernet Cable, PROFINET Robot Cable, PROFINET Cable

Highly Flexible and Bending Resistant Towline Industrial Ethernet Communication Cable with Shielded Twisted Pair

ETHERNET PROFINET TYPE C 4X22AWG/19, 100ohm, Transfer Rate 100Mhz

 

Advantages and Parameters:

Suitable for towline applications, dynamic installations, frequent movement, wear, and torsion resistance. Compatible with Cat5e, EtherCAT, and Ethernet/IP.

It consists of 4 cores, each core is composed of 19 tinned copper conductors, with a total cross-sectional area of 0.34mm².

The inner sheath insulation material is low-smoke and halogen-free LSZH. To determine whether an insulation layer of a cable is made of low-smoke and halogen-free material, there is a simple identification method: strip off a small amount of insulation layer and place it in water. If the insulation layer sinks to the bottom due to the lower density of LSZH material than water, then it is LSZH; otherwise, it is not.

 

Product Application：

PROFINET protocol is widely used in industrial Ethernet applications, such as wiring for machines, equipment, instruments, and control cabinets. Its performance meets CAT5e standards. It is suitable for towline applications or frequent movement. It is applicable in motion control scenarios and can be used for EtherCAT and EtherNet/IP applications.

name.en: 4-in-1 Universal Fast Charging Data Cable, 65W High Power Output
name.zh: 4-in-1 Universal Fast Charging Data Cable, 65W High Power Output

brief.en:
1. Unmatched 65W High Power Output: Charge your devices at lightning speed with our 65W high power output, perfect for Type C, iPhone, and Android devices. Enjoy the thrill of fast, efficient charging.
2. Versatile 4-in-1 Design: Switch between USB to Lightning, USB to Type-C, Type-C to Type-C, and Type-C to Lightning effortlessly. This all-in-one charging cable meets all your mobile charger needs.
3. Durable Braided Cable Body: Constructed with a thick, high-density dual-color braided cable body, this charger cable offers exceptional durability and wear resistance, ensuring a long lifespan.
4. Premium Gold-Plated Connectors: Equipped with 18K gold-plated plugs, this charging cable guarantees a reliable, stable connection and superior conductivity, reducing the risk of corrosion.
5. Smart Magnetic Storage: Keep your cable organized and tangle-free with the innovative magnetic suction style storage, perfect for on-the-go convenience and hassle-free use.

1. Unmatched 65W High Power Output: Charge your devices at lightning speed with our 65W high power output, perfect for Type C, iPhone, and Android devices. Enjoy the thrill of fast, efficient charging.

3. Durable Braided Cable Body: Constructed with a thick, high-density dual-color braided cable body, this charger cable offers exceptional durability and wear resistance, ensuring a long lifespan.
4. Premium Gold-Plated Connectors: Equipped with 18K gold-plated plugs, this charging cable guarantees a reliable, stable connection and superior conductivity, reducing the risk of corrosion.

description.en:
Description

Product Description:

Introducing the Cobtel 4-in-1 Universal Fast Charging Data Cable, the ultimate solution for all your charging needs. This high-performance charging cable is designed to provide unmatched versatility and superior charging efficiency, making it the perfect companion for your Type C devices, iPhone, Android smartphones, and other gadgets.

 

Unmatched Power and Speed

Experience the thrill of rapid charging with our 65W high power output. This charging cable ensures your devices are powered up in no time, allowing you to stay connected and productive. Whether you're at home, in the office, or on the go, this fast-charging cable is your reliable partner.

Versatile 4-in-1 Design

Say goodbye to carrying multiple cables. The Cobtel 4-in-1 Universal Fast Charging Data Cable features an innovative design that supports four interchangeable interfaces: USB to Lightning, USB to Type-C, Type-C to Type-C, and Type-C to Lightning. This versatile charger cable is compatible with a wide range of devices, making it the perfect all-in-one solution for your charging needs.

Durable and Reliable

Crafted from high-density dual-color braided material, this charging cable is built to last. Its thickened cable body offers exceptional wear resistance and durability, ensuring it withstands the rigors of daily use. The premium 18K gold-plated connectors provide superior conductivity and reduce the risk of corrosion, guaranteeing a stable and reliable connection every time.

Smart Magnetic Storage

Tired of tangled cables? Our charging cable comes with a smart magnetic suction style storage solution, keeping your cable organized and tangle-free. This innovative feature is perfect for those who value convenience and neatness, making it easier than ever to carry your cable wherever you go.

Choose Cobtel With the Cobtel 4-in-1 Universal Fast Charging Data Cable, you're not just buying a cable; you're investing in a product designed for excellence. Our commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction sets us apart from the competition. Experience the difference with Cobtel and enjoy the convenience, efficiency, and durability of our premium charging cable.

Don't wait-enhance your charging experience today with the Cobtel 4-in-1 Universal Fast Charging Data Cable. Your devices deserve the best, and so do you.

brief.zh: Outdoor CAT6 UTP Solid cable,pure copper 0.55mm,23awg, Black PE jacket, 305m/wood drum.

description.en:
Description

Outdoor CAT6 UTP Solid cable,pure copper 0.55mm,23awg, Black PE jacket, 305m/wood drum.

DESCRIPTION

Cat6 Outdoor CNCOB brand cable is perfect for installations in outdoor conditions. This cable is built to withstand conditions such as the sun, wind and rain. This cable is 23AWG, unshielded and comes in bulk lengths for custom installations. 1000ft lengths come on a wooden reel for convenient pulls and an even cable lay over longer distances. Cat6 cable is built with a spline in the middle separating each twisted pair for better performance against near-end crosstalk. Cat6 cable is a great solution for 1 Gb networks and 10 Gb speeds at shorter distances. When your next install requires going outdoors this outdoor cable is up to the task.

Features

Get 1Gb (Gigabit) speeds up to 328 feet

10Gb (10 Gigabit) suitable up to 165 feet

Rated for outdoor installation

Single layer jacket for extra protection

UV resistant for protection from sunlight

Solid, pure copper wires for optimal signal strength

Our Advantages

1. 100% oxygen-free copper guarantees a super long service life.  Long-time use does not break, waterproof, sun protection, anti-freeze, and tensile resistant.
2. The diameter of the conductor supports customization. We can OEM the specified diameter according to the customers' needs.
3.  Good quality is more assured.  Our products don't cut corners.  The standard code for every line is convenient for construction.
4.  With thick sheath. Use the new environmental protective rainproof, anti-pull, and sun protection,  no casing or sleeve is needed, can be used directly on the construction site.
5.  Independent sheath:  Multiple compartments replace the traditional sleeve, and the condom can reduce interference. the independent sheath makes the signal transmission more stable.
6. The bold wire cores: after thickening the core wires and wire drawing are formed. Attenuation is around 0.01, every copper wire has the absolute same material component.

name.en: 100ft Stranded Cat6 Ethernet Wire Network Raw Cable
name.zh: 100ft Stranded Cat6 Ethernet Wire Network Raw Cable

brief.en:
1. Precision process, 8 core wires, and 4 twisted pairs. Faster and more stable single transmission speed.
2. Highest technical standards:  cross skeleton and a stable structure to reduce crosstalk. Use the oxygen-free copper wires to maximize the transmission distance, effectively decreasing the signal loss and making the transmission quality higher
brief.zh:
1. Precision process, 8 core wires, and 4 twisted pairs. Faster and more stable single transmission speed.
2. Highest technical standards:  cross skeleton and a stable structure to reduce crosstalk. Use the oxygen-free copper wires to maximize the transmission distance, effectively decreasing the signal loss and making the transmission quality higher

description.en:
Description

Product Description:

1. Precision process, 8 core wires, and 4 twisted pairs. Faster and more stable single transmission speed.
2.Highest technical standards:  cross skeleton and a stable structure to reduce crosstalk. Use the oxygen-free copper wires to maximize the transmission distance, effectively decreasing the signal loss and making the transmission quality higher
3. Premium quality: Thickened copper core wires. The conductors use standard pure bare copper wires.  The diameter of a single brass strand is 0.57mm. which has a much lower impedance and a much better Conductivity performance.
4. Safe and encrypted transmission.  the thickened aluminum foil shielding has a strong anti-interference ability.   The design(Aluminum + grounding wires+ PET membrane) greatly reduces the radiation, preventing the information from eavesdropping. More secure transmission.
5. The isolation layer uses high-density PE.  Lower attenuation and reduce signal loss.
6. Exquisite appearance： Clear label mark printing on the surface of the flame-retardant PVC jacket. We support customized mark printing(Models, Gauge, and meters .eg).
7. The thickened and durable PVC jacket. Flame-retardant PVC jacket: wear-resistant,  tensile-resistant,freeze-proof, and aging-resistant. Super long service life.
8. Power supply: Support POE power supply. One cable functions as the power cords and ethernet cables at the same time. Support applications in POE devices. Without the use of an extra power supply.
9. Widely applied in multiple scenarios:   Widely used in security monitoring systems, enterprise office wiring, construction engineering, and home decoration.

description.en:
Description

 

WALL MOUNT 86 TYPE SINGLE DUAL PORT NETWORK FACEPLATE CAT5E CAT6 RJ45 FACE PLATE



* It is widely used in Commercial, Residential, Hospital, Entertainment Venues, airports, stations, etc. 
* Single Brush Wall Plate Cable Pass Through Insert easily creates cable access from any wall.
* Smooth and clean HDTV Installations, perfect for HDTV cables and home theater installations.
* Easy to set up, installation can be finished in a few minutes. You must insert the brush into the outer casing and place it on the wall.
* Run your cables cleanly and neatly through the wall, the package is equipped with mounting screws.

 

 

Key Specifications/ Special Features:

 
1. Product name: Network RJ45 Single port Faceplate;
2. Materials: Faceplate made of ABS UL 94V-0 molded, White, and glossy;
3. The faceplate socket shall be an RJ45 telecommunication outlet supporting a 4-pair Category 5e UTP cable for connecting customer premises equipment to the network.
4. Size: The Faceplate of the socket unit is 85mm x 85mm, and can be fitted to an industry-standard electrical box(BS4662) concealed in the wall for flush-mounted, or to an ABS back box for surface-mounted installation.
5. The Faceplate is Compatible with 4-pair category 5e UTP cable;
6. The Faceplate Compliance with TIA/EIA-568-B specification.
7. The Faceplate is With RJ45(8PIN) modular jack.
8. Customized Printed with the logo;
9. With two M3.5 x 25mm Philip CSK head nickel plated brass screws for mounting on BS4662 Size UL1 electrical box.
10. Molded inserts to cover screw heads.
11. Cable tie as part of the moldering.
12. Beautiful: Works perfectly with HDMI cables, coaxial cables, standard AV audio video cables, and more, take those ugly cables and put them neatly out of sight.
13. Superior Construction: Home or commercial applications.Part of a complete in-wall installation.
14. Easy to Install: The package is equipped with mounting screws, Insert the brush into the outer casing and place it on the wall.
15. Cable Pass Through: Allows you to quickly, easily clean cable access from any wall in your home directly to your equipment.

 

 

Shipping Information

Description

1 Port Ethernet Wall Plate with standard-sized cable connector and easy snap-in retaining clip ensure a secure and corrosion-free connection. Network 86 panel is suitable for various scenarios, dust-proof and moisture-proof protection door, easy to disassemble and more convenient, flame retardant, fireproof and high-temperature resistance.

Features:


  • High quality 1 Port Ethernet Wall Plate with an RJ45 keystone jack insert, which is easily connected to cables, or use with a keystone jack and patch panels together.

  • The one-piece frame is more durable, the force is uniform, and the reinforcement is durable and does not deform.

  • The white design provides a professional-looking installation, and it is easy to install directly. No need to assemble the plate save your time and protect your fingers from getting hurt. Just use it without concern. A standard size and wall plate screws are included.

  • It gives any network installation a professional finish by covering up messy holes in walls and keeping your network organized and easily accessible. The mounting screw heads are also painted the same color as the wall plate so they blend in and provide a clean, professional look.

  • It fits flush to the wall and runs the Ethernet/network cable from one side to another end.It is the perfect solution for connecting a Router or computer and other Ethernet Channel-enabled devices to your other devices.

brief.en:
1. Ultimate Durability: Unlike inferior alternatives, our faceplate is crafted from premium, flame-retardant materials that offer unparalleled longevity and safety. You can trust it to protect your connections while maintaining a sleek appearance over time.

2. Unmatched Compatibility: Whether you're setting up a simple home network or managing a complex office system, our faceplate offers universal compatibility with all standard keystone jacks and telephone modules. This flexibility ensures that your network can evolve with your needs.

3. Effortless Installation: Don’t waste time with complicated installations. Our faceplate's tool-free design means you can get your network up and running in minutes. Simply snap it into place and enjoy a secure, professional finish.

4. Aesthetic Appeal: Say goodbye to unsightly, cluttered walls. Our faceplate’s sleek design not only conceals your network connections but also enhances the overall look of your space. It’s the perfect blend of function and style.

5. Enhanced Durability and Safety: Engineered for long-lasting performance, our wall jack faceplate is resistant to wear and tear, making it ideal for high-traffic areas. The fire-retardant PC material also ensures that your network remains safe, even in demanding environments.
brief.zh:
1. Ultimate Durability: Unlike inferior alternatives, our faceplate is crafted from premium, flame-retardant materials that offer unparalleled longevity and safety. You can trust it to protect your connections while maintaining a sleek appearance over time.

2. Unmatched Compatibility: Whether you're setting up a simple home network or managing a complex office system, our faceplate offers universal compatibility with all standard keystone jacks and telephone modules. This flexibility ensures that your network can evolve with your needs.

3. Effortless Installation: Don’t waste time with complicated installations. Our faceplate's tool-free design means you can get your network up and running in minutes. Simply snap it into place and enjoy a secure, professional finish.

4. Aesthetic Appeal: Say goodbye to unsightly, cluttered walls. Our faceplate’s sleek design not only conceals your network connections but also enhances the overall look of your space. It’s the perfect blend of function and style.

5. Enhanced Durability and Safety: Engineered for long-lasting performance, our wall jack faceplate is resistant to wear and tear, making it ideal for high-traffic areas. The fire-retardant PC material also ensures that your network remains safe, even in demanding environments.

description.en:
Description

1. Unleash the Power of Connectivity with Our Premium Faceplate Collection

Upgrade your network infrastructure with the 120-Type US Standard Faceplate, specifically designed to deliver seamless connectivity while enhancing the aesthetic appeal of any space. Perfectly crafted for enterprise environments, this keystone wall plate is an essential component for modern, high-performance networking solutions.

 

 

2. Top Features and Benefits:

Versatile Keystone Compatibility: Our keystone plate is engineered to support multiple module types, making it compatible with a wide range of keystone jacks including Ethernet jack, HDMI, voice, and more. Whether you're setting up a data center or upgrading your office, this wall plate offers the flexibility you need.
 
Sleek, Professional Design: The 115*70 mm faceplate boasts a clean, minimalist design that seamlessly blends into any environment. The smooth surface and pristine white finish ensure that this wall plate complements both contemporary and traditional decor, making it a perfect choice for any professional setting.
 
High-Quality Materials: Constructed from high-grade, flame-retardant PC material, this keystone plate is built to last. The robust design ensures durability, while the flame-retardant properties add an extra layer of safety, providing peace of mind in any installation.
 
Easy Installation with Tool-Free Assembly: Say goodbye to complicated setups. Our faceplate is designed for quick, tool-free installation, allowing you to snap it into place with minimal effort. This user-friendly feature ensures a hassle-free experience for both DIY enthusiasts and professional installers.
 
Multiple Port Configurations: Available in single-port, dual-port, triple-port, quadruple-port, and six-port configurations, our wall plate meets all your networking needs. Each port is precisely cut to ensure a perfect fit with your keystone jacks, guaranteeing a secure and stable connection every time.
 
Enhanced Durability and Safety: Engineered for long-lasting performance, our wall jack faceplate is resistant to wear and tear, making it ideal for high-traffic areas. The fire-retardant PC material also ensures that your network remains safe, even in demanding environments.

 

Perfect for High-Performance Networking: Whether you're installing Ethernet jacks for high-speed internet or setting up complex network configurations, this faceplate is designed to support the demands of modern technology. Its superior construction ensures reliable, uninterrupted connections, making it the perfect choice for enterprise-level applications.

 

3. Why Choose Our 120-Type Faceplate?

In today's fast-paced world, businesses can't afford to compromise on connectivity. Our 120-Type US Standard Faceplate is more than just a wall plate; it's a critical component of your network's backbone. Designed with the needs of modern enterprises in mind, this keystone plate offers unparalleled flexibility, durability, and ease of use.
When it comes to setting up a reliable network, the quality of your components matters. Our faceplate is meticulously crafted to meet the highest standards, ensuring that your network operates smoothly and efficiently. Whether you're an IT professional, a contractor, or a business owner, you'll appreciate the attention to detail that goes into every aspect of this product.
 
Optimize Your Workspace with Customizable Solutions

description.en:
Description

Product Description:


Elevate your networking infrastructure with COBTEL's 86 Type RJ45 Faceplate, a blend of functionality and style designed to meet the highest standards of safety and performance. Our faceplate is a statement piece that not only serves its purpose but also enhances the aesthetic of your space.
 
Crafted from premium flame-retardant PC plastic material, this faceplate stands up to the toughest conditions. It's built to withstand temperatures up to 100 degrees Celsius without deformation and offers a high flame retardant coefficient at 850 degrees Celsius, ensuring your network's integrity even in the most demanding environments.
 
Safety is paramount in our design. The faceplate comes equipped with a specialized safety door that acts as a safety chain, preventing foreign objects from entering and causing damage to the ports. This feature adds an extra layer of protection, safeguarding your connections against accidental impacts and ensuring your network remains uninterrupted.
 
The popular circular arc shape design of the faceplate, coupled with its high-quality white finish, provides an elegant touch that complements any interior. It's not just a faceplate; it's a design choice that reflects your commitment to quality and style.
 
Our innovative dust-proof cover automatically rebounds to shield your ports from dust and moisture. This antioxidant feature ensures that your connections remain clean and clear, providing stable transmission and extending the life of your network.
 
Installation is a breeze with our module buckle design. The one-piece disassembly and replacement process is straightforward, making it a convenient choice for both quick fixes and comprehensive upgrades. Whether you're a seasoned IT professional or a home user looking to enhance your network, our faceplate is designed for ease of use.
 
The COBTEL 86 Type RJ45 Faceplate is not just a product; it's a commitment to excellence. With its 4 port configuration, it's versatile enough to accommodate a range of networking needs, from simple home setups to complex office networks. Each faceplate comes in an exquisite bagged packaging, ensuring it arrives in pristine condition.
 
Choose COBTEL for a faceplate that offers the perfect combination of safety, performance, and elegance. With our product, you're not just installing a faceplate; you're investing in a future-proof solution that keeps you connected to the world.

Description

Product Description

A network face plate is a structural element ( typically wall mounted ) used to hold telecommunication connectors in the work area on which horizontal or outlet cable terminates.
Features a stylish, functional, and easy-to-install design suitable for data and voice applications.

Futures

●Quick and easy to install
Without the need for too many tools, all you need is a standard screwdriver.
●Help to organize cables
Now you can keep your home neat and clear, without cables running everywhere.
●Well Matched with the decoration style
The contemporary shiny design of these face plates provides professional visual enjoyment.
A gloss finish without recessed lines makes it easy to clean.
White matches your home decoration style.

description.en:
Description

Key Specifications/ Special Features:
 
 

86 type faceplate

 

1.   Faceplate suitable for keystone jack, blank insert, BNC coupler, F connector, RCA connector, and ST fiber optic connector
2.   Size: 86 x 86mm, materials: PC ABS, color: all colors, support OEM
3.   For better protection, the connection is totally enclosed in a plastic shell
4.   For the correct heading joint, you can do a test and maintenance in the front
5.   Color code and mark icon on every interface, easy to be distinguished and administered in the network
6.   Available in single, dual four port
7.   Faceplate with shutter
8.   Available in black and white colors
9.   US and UK styles are available
10. RJ11 and RJ45 are available
11. Used for the keystone of Cat5e and Cat6/Cat6a
12. Sizes:
    UK style: 86 x 86mm
    US style: 115 x 70mm
13. Materials: ABS and PVC
 
 

Specifications:

 

Meets ANSI/TIA/EIA-568-B.2 category 5e
Meets TIA/EIA TSB-40
Meets ISO/IEC generic cabling standard 11801
Meets CENELEC generic cabling standard EN50173
 


Materials:

 

Housing: ABS 94V-0/1/2
Labels space on the surface for convenience distinction
Reasonable designed, protecting the body from scuffing
Electrical characteristics
In accordance with UL 1863
Current rating: 1.5A max
Voltage rating: 150V
Construction features
The installation kit includes mounting screws.
 
 
 
 

Payment method accepted:

 

1) Paying with PayPal
2) Paying with Western Union
3) Paying with T/T bank

Shipping and delivery details:


1) Sample or trial order: 3 working days
2) Official order: 15 days after payment
3) Package: PE bag, customized with a blister or slide card or gift box and more.

name.en: L9 Head Unit Stainless Steel DDF Digital Patch Panel
name.zh: L9 Head Unit Stainless Steel DDF Digital Patch Panel

brief.en: DDF16 System Digital Distribution Frame The wiring unit of the DDF16 system digital distribution frame adopts a high-quality stainless steel plate overall structure that conforms to European design standards, featuring an aesthetic appearance, reasonable structure, and strong reliability.
brief.zh: DDF16 System Digital Distribution Frame The wiring unit of the DDF16 system digital distribution frame adopts a high-quality stainless steel plate overall structure that conforms to European design standards, featuring an aesthetic appearance, reasonable structure, and strong reliability.

description.en:
Description

DDF16 System Digital Distribution Frame The wiring unit of the DDF16 system digital distribution frame adopts a high-quality stainless steel plate overall structure that conforms to European design standards, featuring an aesthetic appearance, reasonable structure, and strong reliability.

 

Product Functions:

1. Wiring Function: Connects communication links between receivers and transmitters on the digital distribution frame with the same data rate, impedance, and direction.

2. Patch Cord Function: Allows mutual connection between any receiver and any transmitter on the digital distribution frame with the same data rate, impedance, and direction.

3. Conversion Function: Allows mutual connection between any receiver and any transmitter on the digital distribution frame with the same data rate and different directions.

4. Testing Function: Clearly displays line sequences, facilitating testing or loopback testing.

 

Product Specifications:

Operating Temperature: +5°C to 40°C
Relative Humidity: ≤85% (+30°C)
Atmospheric Pressure: 70KPa-106KPa
Characteristic Impedance: 75Ω
Operating Rates: 2Mb/s, 8Mb/s, 34Mb/s, 14Mb/s, 155Mb/s.
Contact Resistance: Outer Conductor ≤2.5mΩ, Inner Conductor ≤10mΩ
Insulation Resistance: >10000mΩ (500VDC for 1 minute), no breakdown, no arcing.
Cross-Talk Attenuation: ≥70dB (50KHz-233MHz).
Insertion Loss: ≤0.3dB (50KHz-233MHz).
Pull-Out Force: >50N
Connector Lifespan: ≥1000 times

 

Features:
■ Box material is made of high-quality stainless steel plate, with an attractive appearance.
■ Unit modular structure for convenient and fast configuration and installation.
■ The unit can be flipped downward by 90°, facilitating cable termination operations.

description.en:
Description

1. Product Model: SMT-3009D-100P
2. Material Name: 100-pair patch panel

3. Specification Model: 1U 100-pair 110 patch panel

4. Series Description: As a voice series product in the comprehensive cabling system, the 110 patch panel plays a role in flexible signal transfer, flexible distribution, and integrated unified management. The main characteristic of a comprehensive cabling system is the use of the same interface and transmission medium to transmit various types of information, which is achieved through jumper connections between different information patch panels.
5. Designed for 19-inch rack installation standards, sturdy, and easy to install, greatly improving work efficiency. Compatible with 19-inch equipment racks, cabinets, and wall mounts.

6. Performance is compliant with TIA/EIA/ISO standards.

7. Connection method: Supports enhanced 110 IDC termination.
8. Environmental requirements: Compliant with ROHS standards.
9. Material Introduction: The characteristic of a comprehensive cabling system is to use the same interface and transmission medium to transmit various types of information. By using jumper connections, the application functions of each desktop information point can be flexibly controlled. Therefore, for patch panels used to terminate horizontal twisted-pair cables from desktop information points, RJ45 interface patch panels should be used. For multi-pair voice cables from telephone equipment rooms, corresponding 110 patch panels can be used. Voice connectivity is achieved by jumpering between the 110 patch panel and RJ45 port.
10. Compatibility: Compatible for use with connectors of the same standard series.

11. Applicable Standards:

General Specification: YD/T 926.1-2009
Part Specification: YD/T 926.3-2009

12. Technical Parameters:

12.1  Electrical Characteristics:
Withstand Voltage: DC 1000V (AC 750V) for 1 minute without breakdown or arcing.
Insulation Resistance: Initial value ≥ 1000MΩ
12.2  Mechanical Characteristics:
IDC terminal accepts 23-26AWG twisted-pair cables.
12.3  Durability:
Wire Termination Cycles: 250 times

13.  Materials and Surface Treatment:

Metal Material:
Bracket: Cold-rolled steel with powder coating
IDC wire terminal: Nickel-plated phosphor bronze
Non-metal Material:
Plastic: PC polycarbonate

14. Environmental Performance:

Temperature: -25 to +70°C
Humidity: ≤85% (Temperature of 85°C ± 3°C)
Salt Spray Test:
pH value of the salt solution before atomization: 6.5 to 7.2 (35±2°C)
A salt solution prepared using sodium chloride (analytical grade) and distilled or deionized water, with a concentration of (5±0.1)% (mass percentage)
Continuous atomization is recommended for 24 hours
During atomization, precautions should be taken to prevent the influence of oil, dust, and other impurities, as well as the temperature and humidity of the spraying air on the working space.

name.en: High-density 1U 48 Port Cat6 UTP Patch Panel
name.zh: High-density 1U 48 Port Cat6 UTP Patch Panel

brief.en: 1. 24-port Category 6 RJ45 unshielded patch panel meets the requirements of gigabit Ethernet application systems, suitable for communication socket connections between equipment and work areas. 2. PCB wiring features a balanced design and refined manufacturing process, reducing interference. It...
brief.zh: 1. 24-port Category 6 RJ45 unshielded patch panel meets the requirements of gigabit Ethernet application systems, suitable for communication socket connections between equipment and work areas. 2. PCB wiring features a balanced design and refined manufacturing process, reducing interference. It...

description.en:
Description

1.  24-port Category 6 RJ45 unshielded patch panel meets the requirements of gigabit Ethernet application systems, suitable for communication socket connections between equipment and work areas.

2.  PCB wiring features a balanced design and refined manufacturing process, reducing interference. It has high margin and backward compatibility, supporting downward compatibility with CAT6 and lower category systems, minimizing investment loss for users.

3.  RJ45 sockets have two common wiring sequences, T568A, and T568B, with clear labeling on the module for accurate and fast termination.

4.  The shell material of the termination interface is made of PC engineering plastic, complying with ROHS and REACH environmental requirements. It has stable color difference and UV resistance.

5.  IDC wire clamps are made of phosphor bronze (Grade 8-03), supporting termination over 250 times. They are suitable for 23-26AWG cables.

6.  The card interface adopts a 45-degree inclined Corning fixation method, providing good airtight protection. It is used in conjunction with Corning termination tools.

7.  The contact pins adopt a high-low pin design, achieving maximum balance for wire pairs.

8.  The contact pin contact material has a 50μm gold-plated layer, with durability for 1000 plug and unplug cycles.

9. Thickened steel plate, equipped with a cable management rack and dust cover, compact in size, open-style wiring is more convenient for wire punching, with a wire management groove at the back for safer grounding.

The Category 6 1U 48-port high-density unshielded patch panel has been certified by the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology. It meets the performance requirements of Category 6 components, providing a usable bandwidth of up to 250MHz. It is the third-generation update optimization with a 45-degree angle termination port. It undergoes strict inspection and testing processes, making the product more refined.

brief.en:

brief.zh:

◆ Immersion gold PCB production process with backward compatibility, allowing downward compatibility with lower category systems and reducing user investment losses.

description.en:
Description

 

Description:

Product type: UTP Cat6 Gigabit patch panel/distribution frame (24 LED indicator light)
It adopts a dual-purpose design with 45-degree Keystone and 110, meets the C6 and 6A performance transmission standards, has a high margin, and is suitable for horizontal cabling between equipment.
Front-facing digital labeling for easy port management, compliant with installation standards for 19-inch racks, cabinets, wall cabinets, etc.
IDC wiring pillar clamp suitable for 22-26 AWG wire gauge, with a termination capacity of 300 times.
Contact pins with a nickel-plated underlayer and a gold-plated top layer of 100U, rated for 1000 insertions and withdrawals.
Sleek and aesthetic design, featuring a predominantly black color to blend with other data center equipment.
 

Product Performance:
