description.en:
Description

 

The Cat6 shielded patch panel has passed the product certification of the Ministry of Information Industry. It meets the performance requirements of Cat6 components and can provide a usable bandwidth of up to 300MHz. It adopts a new PCB circuit board design, optimized 45-degree angle termination slots, and undergoes strict inspection and testing processes, achieving a high level of quality.
1.  It is recommended to use Cat6 shielded twisted pair cables and Cat6 shielded patch cords in combination to achieve optimal network performance.
2.  The Cat6 shielded patch panel is compatible with Gigabit Ethernet application systems and suitable for communication socket connections between equipment and work areas.
3.  The newly designed PCB lines are balanced to reduce interference and provide high headroom.
4.  The RJ45 jacks support both T568A and T568B universal wiring schemes, and the universal wiring scheme labels are clearly marked on the modules, making termination accurate and fast.
5.  The housing material of the termination ports is made of ABS/PC engineering plastic, and the IDC wire clamps are made of phosphor bronze, allowing for more than 300 terminations. It is suitable for 22-26 AWG cables.
6.  The jack ports are fixed at a 45-degree angle, providing good airtight protection, and can be terminated using a single-pair Krone tool.
7.  It has backward compatibility and can be downward compatible with CAT6 and lower category systems, avoiding investment loss for users.
8.  The contact pins adopt a high-low pin design to achieve maximum pair balance.
9.  The contact pin's contact material has a gold-plated layer of 6-50μm thickness, allowing for durability and 1000 plug-insert cycles.
10.  It features a shielding structure that effectively prevents electromagnetic interference and complies with industry standards for shielding effectiveness.

description.en:
Description

This Cat 6 UTP Patch Panel meets all TIA/EIA-568-C.2 Category 6 and ISO 11801 2nd Edition Class E channel requirements at swept frequencies up to 250 MHz, Meets ANSI/TIA-568-C.2 and ISO11801 Category 6 component requirements at swept frequencies up to 250 MHz, Complies with ANSI/TIA-1096A (formerly FCC Part 68); Meets IEC 60603-7, Supports IEEE 802.3af/802.3 at and proposed 802.3bt type 3 and type 4 PoE applications, UL1863 approved, and RoHS Complaint.


Specification

Product Name

Patch Panel UTP Cat 6

Product Type

Patch Panel Kit

Termination Style

Punch down

Patch Panel Style

Flat

Performance Level

Category 6

Material

CRS

Wiring Scheme

T568A/T568B

Number of Ports

24

Module Type

RJ45

Number of Rack Units

1

Overall Width (In.)

19

Overall Width (mm)

482.6

Color

Black


Features:

1. For the keystone jack part of the patch panel, the phosphor bronze is first plated with nickel and then gold-plated, with a 24K gold-plated thickness of up to 50u〃, and the plugging life exceeds 800 times. Corrosion-resistant and plug-resistant, while effectively extending the service life of the module, it ensures the stability of data transmission.

2. New high-pressure flame retardant materials, UL94V-0 fire-rated wiring frame plastic parts, using new high-voltage flame retardant materials, with good impact resistance, and high and low-temperature resistance. Brand new environmentally friendly plastic, non-toxic and harmless. Safe and flame retardant, the fire rating reaches UL94V-0.


3. Cat6 Patch panel is a device used for terminating and managing end-user or trunk cables, allowing for their flexible connection and deployment. It is a crucial component in the management subsystem and serves as the hub for cross-connections between the vertical backbone and horizontal cabling subsystems. Patch panels are typically installed in racks or on walls. With the installation of accessories, patch panels can meet the requirements of UTP, STP, coaxial cables, fiber optics, and audio/video applications. The commonly used patch panels in network engineering include twisted-pair patch panels and fiber optic patch panels. They can be classified into main distribution frames (MDFs) and intermediate distribution frames (IDFs) based on their usage and location.

4. MDF, also known as the main distribution frame, is used to connect user lines, trunk lines, and special lines to the corresponding interface points of the telephone exchange for testing, distribution, and protection of equipment within the premises. MDFs are structured with both vertical and horizontal sections. The vertical section can accommodate protection arrangements, while the horizontal section is used for test arrangements or terminal blocks. For trunk lines or special lines that do not require protection, the vertical section can be equipped with test blocks or terminal blocks. MDFs of the same model can be combined to meet expansion needs. MDFs for user exchanges, due to their smaller capacity, are often box-shaped. In the early days, MDFs were large in size, with each vertical section capable of accommodating 303 lines. Protection arrangements used 20 or 21-line carbon lightning arresters with thermal coils to limit current. Test blocks consisted of 20 lines and were equipped with four-wire spring contacts that allowed for separate incoming and outgoing lines. The new generation of MDFs, designed to work with computer-controlled exchanges, have significantly reduced size and weight, with each vertical section able to accommodate 1,000 lines. Protection arrangements consist of blocks with 100 lines, using metal discharge tubes to prevent high voltage and overcurrent. Test blocks consist of blocks with 128 lines, allowing for easy separation of contacts to facilitate line testing. Each wire connected to the terminal has its own independent cable tray for easy installation and maintenance. The connection in the protection arrangement is made through card connection, eliminating the need to strip the insulation layer of the wire. The connection in the test arrangement is made through winding. Both connection methods are characterized by their simplicity, reliability, speed, and lack of pollution. Depending on the application, new types of patch panels are available in wall-mount, floor-standing, single-sided, and double-sided configurations.

5. MDFs primarily serve the following functions: 1) Protection: they provide protection against high voltage and excessive current for user lines. 2) Distribution: they allow any user to select a number within the premises, and trunk lines between different offices can be connected to the internal trunk modules. They also facilitate inter-office and user line connections based on the requirements of special lines.

6. IDF, also known as the intermediate distribution frame, is a patch panel that connects the internal line distribution within the telephone exchange. IDFs can be classified into two types based on their location: the intermediate distribution frame between the main distribution frame and exchange equipment, and the intra-room distribution frame.

IDFs are also structured with vertical and horizontal sections. The vertical section is used for outgoing lines from equipment, while the horizontal section is used for incoming lines to equipment. Both vertical and horizontal sections are equipped with terminal blocks. Improved terminal blocks have one side for winding and the other side for soldering. The main function of IDFs is to manage the incoming and outgoing lines between various levels of exchange equipment, enabling the full functionality of the exchange equipment.

description.en:
Description

Cat6 24-Port Straight-Through Network Patch Panel

 

1. Material of Straight-Through Modules: Port copper pins are plated with 15μ gold, featuring excellent anti-oxidation performance; superior transmission performance, and keystone modules securely and tightly connected.
2. Stable quality, passing test standards, interfaces firm and not loose, no need for tool wire termination, direct-insertion design, no need for cumbersome wiring, just plug in the RJ45 connectors on both ends.
3. Terminal Material: Phosphor bronze plated with nickel, insertion and extraction times, not less than 300 times
4. Eight-pin Material: Phosphor bronze plated with gold, insertion and extraction times, not less than 800 times
5. Contact Resistance: Not greater than 2.5 mΩ under normal atmospheric pressure conditions
6. Insulation Resistance: Not less than 1000 MΩ under normal atmospheric pressure conditions
7. Dielectric Strength: No breakdown or arcing phenomenon within 1 minute under DC 1000V (AC 750V)
8. Design Standard: Manufactured according to international standard ISO/IEC 11801; TIA/EIA 568 design and manufacturing Product
9. Certification: Passed FLUKE testing
10. Packing Information: 25 pieces per box, 17 kgs, 52*39*49 cM

Description

Information：


PP-3217SK24-C6A

CAT6A STP 24 PORTS PATCH PANEL

MAIN Electric Parameter:

CONTACT RESISTANCE:<20m ohms

INSULATION RESISTANCE : >500M ohms

DIELECTRIC STRENGHT: DC1000V(AC700V)No punctured and over flash phenomenon whithin one minute

Return loss : 100MHz , >8dB

Insertion loss : 100MHz , >49.8dB

Next loss : 100MHz , > 36.7dB

contact time：》250 times

allow cable diameter: 0.64 0.01/-0.03MM


1. What are COBTEL's differences and advantages compared with the competitors?


1): Integrated cabling production line from RJ45 Connector, patch cord, keystone jack, face plate, patch panel, and cabinets;

2): From mold development and manufacturing metal stamping, injection molding, terminal embedded, automatic machine manufacturing, to finished product assembly, integrated production process.

3): Connected with Global top 500 enterprises, developed and implemented products.

4): Negotiate the price of PC materials according to the purchased quantity of 1000 tons per year.

5): Copper uses the range price to lock the material.

6): Plating and suppliers adopt strategic cooperation mode and sign annual framework agreements.


2. How about COBTEL Precision?


Cobtel has nearly 3 decades of experience in manufacturing RJ45 connectors and Ethernet Cables etc. COBTEL production capacity for modular plugs is 5 million/day, the biggest in the world.

COBTEL are ODM and OEM for many world-famous big brands. Benefiting from our professional team, modern equipment, and advanced inspection instruments, our domestic and oversea customers speak highly of our efficiency and quality.

COBTEL products are UL, CE, CSA, SGS, and 3C certified, so customers are worry-free to import from us.

COBTEL has a self-owned industrial park in Dongguan, which is close to Hong Kong and Shenzhen China. It is very convenient for you to visit us during our further cooperation.

brief.en:
If you’re looking for a network patch panel that offers reliability, ease of installation, and the power to streamline your network like never before, then you’ve found the perfect solution. Our 48-port RJ45 patch panel is built to handle the most demanding network infrastructures, ensuring every connection is robust, secure, and lightning fast.
Engineered for both small and large network deployments, this 1U patch panel seamlessly fits into any distribution frame or server rack, whether in a high-powered data center or a sophisticated office environment. It's the network management tool that delivers superior performance, unmatched durability, and the kind of reliability that makes IT professionals smile.

description.en:
Description

1U 48-Port Network Patch Panel | COBTEL: Elevate Your Network with Unmatched Performance

 
Welcome to the pinnacle of network organization and efficiency-COBTEL's 1U 48-port patch panel. If you're looking for a network patch panel that offers reliability, ease of installation, and the power to streamline your network like never before, then you've found the perfect solution. Our 48-port RJ45 patch panel is built to handle the most demanding network infrastructures, ensuring every connection is robust, secure, and lightning fast.
Engineered for both small and large network deployments, this 1U patch panel seamlessly fits into any distribution frame or server rack, whether in a high-powered data center or a sophisticated office environment. It's the network management tool that delivers superior performance, unmatched durability, and the kind of reliability that makes IT professionals smile.
Key Features of Our 1U 48-Port Patch Panel
Ultimate Space Saver: The compact 1U patch panel design is perfect for network installations where space is at a premium. With 48 ports elegantly organized in a single unit, it optimizes every inch of your rack, making it easier than ever to manage high-density connections.
Cat6 & RJ45 Compatibility: With Cat6 support, this RJ45 patch panel ensures high-speed gigabit connections that are backward compatible with Cat6 cables and Cat5e cables. This guarantees your network is future-proof while staying flexible for legacy systems.
Cold-Rolled Steel Construction: Built from high-grade cold-rolled steel, this 1U patch panel provides enhanced durability and structural integrity. Whether in a high-traffic enterprise network or a cozy office setup, this distribution frame is designed to last.
Universal Installation: Install this 48-port network patch panel effortlessly in any standard 19-inch rack or cabinet. Its universal measurement and easy mounting options make the installation process quick and seamless, no matter your setup.
 

Perfect for Every Environment

 
From data centers to office environments, our 1U 48-port network patch panel is adaptable for various scenarios, providing optimal cable management and clean, organized installations.
Data Centers: With high-density connectivity, it's the ideal network patch panel for large server rooms where every inch of rack space counts.
Office & Commercial Installations: Whether you're installing it in a bustling corporate network or a smaller business, this RJ45 patch panel delivers organized, professional results.
Telecommunication Rooms: Perfect for organizing and maintaining vast arrays of cabling, keeping connections secure, labeled, and easy to troubleshoot.
 

Innovative Cable Management & Flexibility

 
Our 1U patch panel doesn't just organize your network connections-it revolutionizes your workspace with intuitive design features that keep your cabling neat and accessible.
Rear-Mounted Cable Management: Experience effortless cable organization with the integrated rear management bar. This unique feature helps you achieve impeccable cable alignment, maintaining airflow and preventing tangles. It's the professional-grade solution for any setup.
Pre-Labeled & Color-Coded Ports: Every RJ45 patch panel port is clearly labeled, so setup is fast, maintenance is simple, and troubleshooting becomes a breeze.
DIY Assembly Design: The DIY assembly design allows for easy insertion of cables and connectors, saving time during installation. Quickly make modifications and updates to your network without the need for advanced tools or expertise.
 

Effortless Network Maintenance

 
Managing your network infrastructure has never been easier, thanks to the user-friendly design of this 1U patch panel. Routine maintenance is simplified with easy access to every port, reducing downtime and ensuring your network runs efficiently.
 

Why Choose COBTEL's 1U 48-Port Patch Panel?

 
Our 1U 48-port network patch panel is more than just a tool-it's a statement. A statement of quality, durability, and professional-grade performance. COBTEL's products are crafted with the utmost attention to detail, designed to make your life easier while delivering industry-leading network solutions.
 

Technical Specifications:

 
Ports: 48 RJ45 Ports
Compatibility: Cat6, Cat5e, Cat5
Form Factor: 1U (fits standard 19-inch racks)
Material: Cold-Rolled Steel
Dimensions: Standard 1U size (height: 44.5mm)
Weight: Lightweight for easy installation but built tough for durability
 

Streamlined Network Infrastructure Starts Here

 
Your network deserves the best, and COBTEL's 1U 48-port network patch panel delivers on every front. Whether you're building a brand-new network or upgrading an existing one, this distribution frame ensures every connection is clean, organized, and fast. The sleek, compact design offers superior cable management, while the 48 RJ45 ports provide high-performance connectivity for a variety of setups.
 

Ideal for IT Professionals & Business Owners Alike

 
COBTEL understands that network infrastructure is critical, which is why we've crafted the ultimate solution in patch panel technology. Designed for both experts and newcomers, this 1U 48-port RJ45 patch panel is intuitive enough for fast, efficient setup, yet powerful enough to handle the most complex network configurations.
 

Order Yours Today

 
Don't wait to experience the next level of networking efficiency and reliability. Upgrade your infrastructure with COBTEL's 1U 48-port network patch panel, the ultimate solution for streamlining your connections and boosting your network's performance. Whether you're scaling up or maintaining an existing system, this RJ45 patch panel will keep your network running smoothly, providing the reliable backbone your business demands.

brief.en: This is the COBTEL New Released 0.5U 24-port UTP Patch Panel
brief.zh: This is the COBTEL New Released 0.5U 24-port UTP Patch Panel

description.en:
Description

Product Description for Cobtel's 0.5U 24-Port UTP Patch Panel

 

Unlock a new era of network efficiency and reliability with Cobtel's 0.5U 24-port UTP Patch Panel. Designed with precision, this unshielded patch panel caters to the most demanding network infrastructure needs, marrying superior design with unmatched functionality. Whether you're upgrading a data center or optimizing a small office, this RJ45 patch panelis your gateway to a streamlined, high-performance networking environment.

 

Exceptional Design Meets Supreme Efficiency

Our 0.5U 24-port RJ45 patch panel is not just any network patch panel; it's a testament to what modern engineering can achieve. Crafted from thickened cold-rolled steel, this robust yet compact frame guarantees longevity and resilience, protecting your connections against physical and environmental challenges. Its sleek, black finish not only looks professional but also acts as a shield against EMI/RFI interference, ensuring that your data transmits without a hitch.

High-Density, High-Efficiency

The 24-port patch panel is designed to fit into 0.5U of rack space, making it ideal for setups where space is at a premium. Each port is clearly numbered, facilitating easy identification and swift, error-free patching that saves time and eliminates frustration during critical operations. The high-density layout does not compromise on accessibility, offering ample room for both finger and tool access, which makes maintenance effortless.

Performance That Leads

Choose Cobtel's network patch panel and experience a product that speaks the language of speed and reliability. Each of the 24 ports on this RJ45 patch panel supports Cat6 connectivity, ready to handle high-speed data transmission requirements. Our advanced circuit design ensures minimal crosstalk and maximum performance, making your network faster and more reliable than ever.

Flexible & Versatile

Our UTP Patch Panel is a perfect fit for a variety of environments, from bustling data centers to dynamic office settings. The detachable cable management bar not only helps in maintaining a neat setup but also reduces signal interference, boosting the integrity and speed of your network. The versatility extends to its easy installation process-mount it on a standard 19-inch rack with the included hardware and integrate seamlessly with existing setups.

Trusted Expertise

At Cobtel, we are committed to providing products that not only meet but exceed industry standards. Our unshielded patch panel is rigorously tested to ensure reliability and performance under any circumstances. Backed by our deep industry knowledge and a commitment to excellence, this patch panel is more than a product-it's a promise of quality and reliability.
 

Why Choose Cobtel?

 

Space Efficiency:

Fits in 0.5U rack space for optimal use of your valuable real estate.

Durability:

Constructed with thickened cold-rolled steel for longevity.

High Performance:

Supports high-speed Cat6 specifications, reducing crosstalk and enhancing connection reliability.

Easy Identification:

Numbered ports for quick and error-free network changes.

Versatile Use:

Ideal for both new installations and upgrades in various environments.
Let Cobtel's 0.5U 24-port UTP Patch Panel be the cornerstone of your network strategy. Choose smart, work smarter-add this sleek, powerful patch panel to your setup today and propel your network's performance to new heights. Witness why so many professionals trust Cobtel for their critical networking needs. Dive into the future of networking where every connection is a step towards success.

description.en:
Description

Product Specification:

Cat5e Unshielded Tool-free LED Patch Panel with 24 Ports This product's transmission performance parameters exceed the ANSI/TIA568-C.2 Category 5e standard. Its contact pins are phosphor bronze wire with gold plating GP50M, effectively preventing surface oxidation and providing optimal contact performance. Sturdy and easy to install, it features LED lights for port identification, facilitating operation recognition and management. The plastic parts are made of flame-retardant polycarbonate material that meets UL94V-0 fire protection requirements. The rear cable holder controls the bending radius of the cables and comes with a patented wire management box, making the system more stable and visually appealing after installation.

Physical Characteristics:

Contact Pins: Phosphor Bronze, Overall GP15M INCH Gold Plated

Mating cycles of Plug and Jack ≥ 1000 times

IDC Terminal: Phosphor Bronze + Electroplating, for 22-26AWG conductors

Wire Termination cycles ≥ 300 times

Operating temperature range: -20°C to 60°C

Specifications:

19-inch (48.3CM) 1U 24-Port Unshielded Patch Panel with detachable rear cable management bracket

The patch panel includes a patented cable management box.

Tested against Fluke standards, it provides more reliable transmission equipment for data centers.

description.en:
Description

 

Introducing the 1U 24-Port Patch Panel – your ultimate solution for seamless, reliable, and efficient network management. Crafted to meet the evolving demands of modern data centers and enterprise setups, this 24-port RJ45 patch panel ensures your cables stay organized, secure, and future-proofed. With its sleek design and superior performance, this network patch panel is engineered for high-density environments while maintaining easy access to critical connections.

 

A. Why Choose Our 1U 24-Port Patch Panel?

 

1. Seamless Cable Management

Say goodbye to messy, tangled cables! Our 1U patch panel provides a clean and professional appearance, making it an essential component for anyone serious about their network. Whether you're managing an enterprise data center or a growing office setup, this RJ45 patch panel ensures everything stays in place, reducing downtime and simplifying troubleshooting. The precise labeling and structured design make it effortless to identify, plug, and unplug connections, improving overall efficiency.

2. Built to Last

Constructed with durable cold-rolled steel, this network patch panel stands up to the rigors of heavy use. The thickened material is corrosion-resistant, offering long-term reliability and strength, even in the most demanding environments. Built to withstand heavy use in high-traffic areas, this 24-port patch panel is designed to last, helping you save on maintenance costs and frequent replacements.

3. Versatility & Adaptability

Our patch panel is engineered to accommodate various applications, making it the perfect fit for data centers, server rooms, large enterprise networks, and even smaller office setups. The universal 1U form factor allows it to fit in any standard 19-inch rack, and its 24 ports ensure ample capacity for expanding networks. Whether you're upgrading an existing setup or starting from scratch, this RJ45 patch panel will integrate seamlessly into your infrastructure.

4. High-Performance Connectivity

This 24-port RJ45 patch panel ensures optimal network performance with shielded keystone modules that protect against interference, signal loss, and crosstalk. Whether you're running high-speed internet connections, VoIP services, or other bandwidth-heavy applications, this network patch panel supports reliable, high-performance data transmission, ensuring your devices are always connected without a hitch.

5. Easy Installation & Maintenance

Designed with a DIY assembly in mind, installing the 1U patch panel is quick and straightforward. The panel features clear, sequential numbering for easy identification of ports, helping you set up or expand your network with minimal effort. Its modular design also makes it easy to replace individual components without disrupting your entire network, allowing for faster maintenance and less downtime.

6. Future-Proof Your Network

As technology advances, so should your infrastructure. This patch panel is future-proofed to support the latest networking standards, ensuring compatibility with Cat 6A cables and beyond. Whether you're working with legacy systems or planning for future upgrades, our 24-port patch panel has the capacity to support your evolving needs.
 

B. Key Features:

 

24 Ports for Maximum Capacity:

This 24-port RJ45 patch panel offers sufficient connections to handle a large number of devices, making it ideal for growing networks.

1U Standard Size:

Fits perfectly into any 19-inch rack or cabinet, providing flexibility for various installation setups.

Shielded Design:

The panel comes equipped with shielded modules that protect against interference, crosstalk, and signal loss, ensuring a stable and reliable connection.

Durable Build:

Made from cold-rolled steel for maximum durability, the panel resists corrosion and maintains structural integrity even in challenging environments.

Easy Port Identification:

Clearly labeled ports and sequential numbering help you easily manage and maintain your connections.

DIY-Friendly:

Simple to install and expand, even for those without specialized training. The modular design allows you to make changes without overhauling your entire system.

Multi-Application Use:

Perfect for data centers, office networks, large server rooms, and high-performance enterprise environments.
 

C. Suitable For:

 
Data Centers: Keep your high-density server setups organized and efficient with a patch panel designed to handle the complexities of modern data infrastructure.
Office Networks: Perfect for medium to large offices looking to upgrade their networking capacity while maintaining a clean and professional installation.

description.en:
Description

Product Feature:


1. Cat6 3-50μ gold plated 21 port patch panel for 100/1000 Mbps networking, Cat6/Cat5e/Cat5 compatible, accept 22-26 AWG solid and stranded UTP cables.
2. T568 A&B Wiring color coding, written-on label, and numbered ports on the back and front for easy Installation and identification.
3. 110 type&Krone dual IDC punch down termination, and can be mounted in standard EIA 19" Racks.
4. Passing 4 nodes link test and short link test.
5. Space Saving Design
6. Made of sturdy, rolled-edge, anodized steel
7. Fully enclosed design for protection of printed circuitry during termination.
8. Constructed from UL94-V-0 high-impact, fire-retardant ABS or PC material.
9. Pair punch sequence enables a pair twist within 1/2, of termination.
10. Beryllium copper contacts: 50,µ gold-plated pins over 100,µ nickel layer.
11. Insertion life cycle: 750 cycles (minimum) / I.D.C. 250 cycles (minimum).
12.Operating temperature: -40,°C to +68,°C.
13. 1xEIA Unit 19(W)x1.3/4(H)x1.1/4(D)
14. CE Listed, RoHS Compliant
Products Description
Product Model
P-24B Blank
Product Color
Black
Product Material
Metal:1.5mm Cold rolled steel sheet Plastic: PC/ABS, UL94V-0
Product Name
21 Ports UTP Blank Patch Panel
Packing
1pc/neutral box; 25pcs/carton(could be customized)
Product Description
Application
Certification: ISO9001, RoHS, Fluke.CE, UL, FCC
Standard:ISO/IEC-11801;ANSI/TIA-568-C.2; EN50173-1 ;ANSI/TIA–1096-A (FCC Part68);IEC 60603-7
Wiring Standards：T568A/T568B
Application: for home, hotel, office, and buildings network wiring
Specification
Material: *Panel:SPCC 1.5mm 
*Housing: PC/ABS 
*Spring Wire: Phosphor Bronze with Gold-plated 3u-50u 
*IDC Contact: Phosphor Bronze with tinned
Working life: 750 times Min for RJ45 jack; 200times min for IDC
Current Rating：1.5 Amps
Contact Resistance:2.5mΩ max
Insulation Resistance：500mΩ minimum
Dielectric Strength:1000V RMS at 60Hz for 1 minute
Flammability rating: UL 94V-0
QC:100% broken circuit testing
Humidity:10% ~ 90%RH
Temperature:-20℃~ 60℃
OEM / ODM: Available
Package Size:  51 * 10.3 * 5.5 cm
Feature
STURDY METAL DESIGN: The 1U Blank Patch Panel is made from SPCC steel for long-lasting use and has the ability to withstand the weight and torque when used together with cables and keystone jacks
Stable Performance: Once connected, the blank keystone patch panel ensures that all the keystone jacks offer maximum performance for enhanced and solid networking. Its solid steel build and easy connectivity make it the perfect empty patch panel that offers stable performance no matter what the conditions are.
Numbered ports with labeling for quick reference, allow for easy recognition of the cables being used.
CABLE MANAGEMENT: Included support bar for cable relief & strategically placed keyholes for cable organization.
The independent module can be disassembled and replaced, which is more convenient and quick.
Designed to be used with 19" racks, cabinets, or wall mount brackets with 1U (1.75") standard height.

description.en:
Description

A. Utilizing a dual-use wiring design with 45-degree Krone and 110, compliant with Cat6 transmission standards, suitable for horizontal cabling between devices.

B. Front-facing digital labeling for easy port management, compliant with a 19-inch rack, cabinet, and installation standards.

C. IDC wire clamps suitable for 22-26AWG wire gauges, with a termination capability of 250 times.

D. Contact pins with a nickel-plated base of 100U" and a gold-plated surface coating of 6-50U", rated for 750 plugs and unplug cycles.

E. Sleek and aesthetic integrated design, featuring a predominantly black color that matches with the appearance of server room equipment.

F. Third-generation PCB wiring design, minimizing interference, with high margin compliance to Cat6 transmission standards.

G. Contact pins are designed with high and low pins to achieve an optimal balance between wire pairs, with high margin compliance.

This series offers multiple options to choose from 24-port, 48-port, CAT5E, and CAT6.

description.en:
Description

1.  Compliant with Category 6 transmission standards, suitable for communication socket connections between equipment and work areas.
2.  RJ45 sockets support both T568A and T568B universal wiring sequences. They have a compact design with clear universal wiring sequence labels on the module, enabling accurate and quick termination.
3.  The RJ45 interface shell is made of PC material, and the IDC wire clamps are made of environmentally friendly phosphor bronze. They support termination for 300 times or more and are suitable for 23-26AWG cables.
4.  The IDC termination features a 45-degree angled tool-free design, ensuring tighter contact.
5.  Two options for IDC termination: punch-down and rotating styles are available for selection.
6.  The PCB wiring design and manufacturing process ensures balanced lines and reduces interference. With high margin compliance, they are backward compatible and can be used with lower category systems, avoiding investment loss for users.
7.  The contact pins are designed with high and low pins, achieving maximum balance between wire pairs. The contact pins have a 50μm gold-plated layer and are durable for 1000 or more plug and unplug cycles.
8.  With a novel appearance and convenient operation, it stands out among numerous patch panels and is an excellent choice for OEM customization styles.

D. Contact pins with a nickel-plated base of 100U" and a gold-plated surface coating of 6-50U", rated for 750 plugging and unplugging cycles.

E. Sleek and aesthetic integrated design, featuring a predominantly black color that matches with the appearance of server room equipment.

F. Third-generation PCB wiring design, minimizing interference, with high margin compliance to Category 6 transmission standards.

G. Contact pins designed with high and low pins to achieve an optimal balance between wire pairs, with high margin compliance allowing for backward compatibility with CAT6 and lower category systems, reducing user losses.

This series offers six options to choose from: 24-port CAT5E, CAT6, CAT6A, and 48-port CAT5E, CAT6, CAT6A.

description.en:
Description

Front Pulling 24-port Unshielded Blank Patch Panel With Rear Cable Management Tray
1. The 24-port patch panel allows for quick installation with different RJ45 modules according to customer needs, making it convenient for assembly and disassembly.
2. The rear cable management tray effectively guides the cables to the termination points, avoiding detachment at the cable and module junctions due to external forces during installation.
3. The RJ45 network modules, cable TV modules, and fiber adapters (for fiber optic products, an additional small plastic piece is required) are interchangeable. And they can all be used with this kind of patch panel.
4. The front-access design allows for precise alignment and maintenance of the cable ends, eliminating the need to search for cables behind the cluttered cabinet in traditional data center wiring.
5. Specifically designed for use in 19-inch standard cabinets, this blank patch panel is mainly used for high-density cabling in data centers, ensuring accurate cable routing and identification.

product description

 
Product name: Modular distribution frame, empty frame
Product type: 16-port patch panel, unshielded (without modules)
Specifications: 19 "installation size, 16 ports

Color: Black
 

Main technical parameters

 
*IDC: Phosphor bronze, silver plated (20~50uiLZh), the applicable cable is 22, 24, and 26AWG (0.64, 0.5, and 0.4mm), and lifespan is more than 550 times.

description.en:
Description

Cobtel UTP Cat6 Patch Panel 24 Port is ideal for unshielded Cat6 applications. The rear cable management bar at the back keeps all cables neat, tidy, and efficiently organized on the back of the panel. The numbers on each port help you identify connections. This unshielded 24 port patch panel is designed to be used with unshielded jacks and unshielded Ethernet cable.


Specification


Product Name

UTP Cat6 Patch Panel 24 Port

Product Type

Patch Panel Kit

Termination Style

Punchdown

Patch Panel Style

Flat

Performance Level

Category 6

Material

CRS

Wiring Scheme

T568A/T568B

Number of Ports

24

Module Type

RJ45

Number of Rack Units

1

Overall Width (In.)

19

Overall Width (mm)

482.6

Color

Black


Features:

1. High hardness phosphor bronze wire terminal, strong pierce insulation layer

High-hardness phosphor bronze wire-bonding terminals, plated with soft nickel 100 u〃 and plated with matte tin 200 u〃, can pierce the insulating layer strongly, and at the same time effectively prevent the contact surface of the terminal from oxidizing and reduce the contact resistance of the wire. The terminal is compatible with 22-26AWG cables, and the number of wire-bonding is > 200 times.


2. Thickened steel plate, with its own cable management frame

It adopts an all-metal frame structure and thickened steel plate, which is durable and suitable for all kinds of network engineering wiring. The self-contained snap-on cable management frame not only facilitates the installation and fixation of cables but also facilitates the maintenance and cleaning of cables in the entire cabinet.


3. Universal standard design, easy and fast installation

Support T568A/B terminal wiring sequence, the terminal is compatible with 22-26AWG cable and is compatible with 110. The KRONE wire-bonding tool is simple and quick to install. Clamshell label design for easy centralized management.

description.en:
Description

Product NameBlank unloaded panel unshield
StyleStandard 1U 24 ports
MaterialCarbon Steel, powder, SPCC 1.5MM
CoatingCoating in black color
Origin
China
CompatibleAll categories of unshielded keystone jacks

The patch panel is the most important component in the floor distribution system, serving as the hub for cross-connections between the vertical backbone and horizontal cabling subsystems. The patch panel is typically installed in a rack or on a wall. Category 5e patch panels specifically meet the requirements for gigabit transmission performance.

Category 5e patch panels are mainly used in gigabit networks and are now commonly used in local area networks (LANs). The price difference between Category 5e and Category 5 cables is not significant. As for Category 6 patch panels, they are generally used in ATM networks, and it is not currently recommended for use in corporate LANs. The most common patch panels in general LANs are Category 5e and Category 6, with the ability to easily provide a communication bandwidth of 155Mbps and the potential for upgrading to gigabit bandwidth, making them the choice for horizontal cabling. Patch panels can be further divided into shielded and unshielded types, with most LANs using unshielded twisted pair (UTP) as the transmission medium for cabling.

Usage:

The patch panel is a modular device used for managing the information outlets at the termination points. The front-end information cables (Category 5e or Category 6) enter the patch panel in the equipment room, where they are terminated on the panel modules. Then, jumper cables (RJ45 connectors) are used to connect the patch panel to the switch. In general, the patch panel is used for management. Without a patch panel, if the front-end information outlets are directly connected to the switch, any cable problems would require rewiring. Additionally, the management would be more chaotic and repeated plugging and unplugging could damage the switch ports. The presence of the patch panel solves these problems, allowing for better management through the replacement of jumper cables.

The usage and quantity of patch panels mainly depend on the total number of network points or the number of network points on a specific floor (and adjacent floors, depending on how the system is designed). Different buildings and system designs will require different patch panels in the main equipment room. For example, in a four-story building with the main equipment room located on the first floor, and all floors' network points entering that equipment room, the number of patch panels would be equal to the total number of network points in the building divided by the number of ports on each patch panel (e.g., 24 ports, 48 ports), plus some additional capacity. In another scenario, a nine-story building with the main equipment room on the fourth floor may have sub-equipment rooms on each floor to avoid excessive cable length, with switches in each sub-equipment room. In this case, the number of patch panels in the main equipment room would be equal to the number of network points on the four floors divided by the number of ports on each patch panel (e.g., 24 ports, 48 ports).


Click and browse more Patch Panels


To see our factory's production capacity and domestic and international certification. Click About Us

description.en:
Description

Introducing the Ultimate 2U 48-Port Network Patch Panel – Your Go-To Solution for Flawless Network Organization and Maintenance!

In the digital age, every second counts. Whether you're managing a state-of-the-art data center or an enterprise office, speed, reliability, and ease of use are non-negotiable. That's where our premium 2U 48-Port Patch Panel comes in. Designed with precision, durability, and flexibility in mind, this network patch panelis the backbone of any efficient data communication system. Perfect for high-density networking environments, this RJ45 patch panel is the epitome of sleek functionality and robust performance.

 

1. Key Features of Our 2U 48-Port Patch Panel:

 

High-Capacity Connectivity: The 48-port patch panel is ideal for larger data environments, offering a total of 48 individual ports to ensure seamless network connectivity. No more fumbling around with multiple smaller units-this comprehensive solution gives you everything you need in one sleek, 2U patch panel frame.

Universal Compatibility: This RJ45 patch panel supports CAT6, CAT6A, and CAT5e Ethernet cables, making it a versatile solution for a wide range of networking setups. Whether you're revamping an existing distribution frame or building an E-panel from scratch, this network patch panel is ready for the challenge.

Professional-Grade Material: Constructed from heavy-duty cold-rolled steel, this 2U patch panel is built to last. The steel frame offers increased durability while ensuring the ports remain secure over years of continuous use.

Rear-Mounted Cable Management: Forget the nightmare of tangled cables. Our 48-port patch panel features an efficient rear-mounted cable management system, making it easier than ever to keep things tidy and accessible. The intuitive cable management bar ensures a smooth installation process and future maintenance.

DIY-Friendly Design: This patch panel is engineered for easy assembly, even for first-time users. Each port is clearly labeled and ready for immediate installation, allowing even non-experts to confidently manage complex network systems.

Sleek Aesthetic with Practical Functionality: The black matte finish of this RJ45 patch panel blends perfectly with modern server room designs, providing a sleek yet professional look. It doesn't just look great-its form factor makes it extremely functional for professional use, in spaces ranging from small offices to large data centers.

Effortless Network Maintenance: Gone are the days of complicated troubleshooting. This 48-port patch panel is meticulously labeled with port numbers to ensure quick identification and resolution of network issues. Streamline your workflow by installing a distribution frame that lets you stay ahead of potential connectivity problems.

 

2. Why Choose Our Network Patch Panel?

 

Maximized Cable Organization: With 48 neatly arranged ports and a rear cable management system, you'll never struggle with tangled cables again. Each port is labeled for convenience, making setup and troubleshooting a breeze. Get ready to enjoy the benefits of a fully optimized network with this all-in-one patch panel solution.

Unbeatable Durability: Built from the finest materials, including cold-rolled steel, this RJ45 patch panel is designed to stand up to even the harshest networking environments. When reliability matters, you can count on this 2U patch panel to deliver uninterrupted performance day after day.

Ready for High-Performance Networks: This patch panel is designed to meet the demands of the modern IT landscape. It ensures optimal network performance with minimal interference, supporting faster data speeds and higher bandwidth with ease.

Ideal for Multiple Scenarios: Whether you're installing it in a data center, corporate office, or industrial hub, this 48-port network patch panel is versatile enough to handle any setup. It's ideal for those looking to streamline their network infrastructure with a single, powerful distribution frame.

 

3. Technical Specifications:

 

Type: 2U 48-Port Patch Panel

Material: Cold-rolled steel

Compatibility: Supports CAT5e, CAT6, and CAT6A Ethernet cables

Size: 19 inches (standard EIA 19" rack)

Ports: 48 RJ45 ports, clearly labeled for easy identification

Cable Management: Rear-mounted cable management bar included

Installation: Rack-mountable, fits into standard 19" racks

 

4. How the 48-Port Patch Panel Elevates Your Network Performance:

 

Improved Cable Management: As any IT professional will tell you, cable management is the key to efficient network performance. This network patch panel ensures that your cabling remains neat, organized, and easily accessible.

Versatile Application: Whether you're managing a single office floor or an entire data center, this 2U patch panel is designed to meet the needs of diverse environments. The universal design makes it compatible with multiple types of Ethernet cables, adding another layer of flexibility to your infrastructure.

Hassle-Free Installation: You don't need a whole team of engineers to get this patch panel up and running. With clear labeling and an intuitive design, even those new to networking can successfully install this 48-port patch panel in no time.

Future-Proof Your Network: As businesses grow and evolve, so do their networking requirements. This RJ45 patch panel is built to accommodate the needs of scaling operations. Whether you're adding new devices or replacing old infrastructure, this patch panel ensures you're prepared for whatever comes next.

 

5. Don't Settle for Subpar Network Infrastructure

 

Why waste time with poorly made network patch panels when you can invest in a product that's designed for long-term performance? This 48-port patch panel isn't just an accessory-it's an essential part of any serious networking setup. Our 2U patch panel is engineered to last, ensuring that your network infrastructure remains organized, accessible, and efficient. From smoother data flow to faster troubleshooting, this RJ45 patch panel empowers you to keep your operations running at full throttle.

 

6. Ready to Upgrade Your Network Setup?

 

There's no time to waste when it comes to efficient network management. Install the 2U 48-port Network Patch Panel today and take the first step toward a more organized, efficient, and future-proof network system. Whether you're upgrading an existing setup or building from the ground up, this distribution frame provides the robust, scalable, and reliable solution you need.

Order your 48-port patch panel today and experience the next level of network organization and performance!

High-Capacity Connectivity: The 48-port patch panel is ideal for larger data environments, offering a total of 48 individual ports to ensure seamless network connectivity. No more fumbling around with multiple smaller units-this comprehensive solution gives you everything you need in one sleek, 2U patch panel frame.

Universal Compatibility: This RJ45 patch panel supports CAT6, CAT6A, and CAT5e Ethernet cables, making it a versatile solution for a wide range of networking setups. Whether you're revamping an existing distribution frame or building an E-panel from scratch, this network patch panel is ready for the challenge.

Professional-Grade Material: Constructed from heavy-duty cold-rolled steel, this 2U patch panel is built to last. The steel frame offers increased durability while ensuring the ports remain secure over years of continuous use.

Rear-Mounted Cable Management: Forget the nightmare of tangled cables. Our 48-port patch panel features an efficient rear-mounted cable management system, making it easier than ever to keep things tidy and accessible. The intuitive cable management bar ensures a smooth installation process and future maintenance.

DIY-Friendly Design: This patch panel is engineered for easy assembly, even for first-time users. Each port is clearly labeled and ready for immediate installation, allowing even non-experts to confidently manage complex network systems.

Sleek Aesthetic with Practical Functionality: The black matte finish of this RJ45 patch panel blends perfectly with modern server room designs, providing a sleek yet professional look. It doesn't just look great-its form factor makes it extremely functional for professional use, in spaces ranging from small offices to large data centers.

Effortless Network Maintenance: Gone are the days of complicated troubleshooting. This 48-port patch panel is meticulously labeled with port numbers to ensure quick identification and resolution of network issues. Streamline your workflow by installing a distribution frame that lets you stay ahead of potential connectivity problems.

 

2. Why Choose Our Network Patch Panel?

 

Maximized Cable Organization: With 48 neatly arranged ports and a rear cable management system, you'll never struggle with tangled cables again. Each port is labeled for convenience, making setup and troubleshooting a breeze. Get ready to enjoy the benefits of a fully optimized network with this all-in-one patch panel solution.

Unbeatable Durability: Built from the finest materials, including cold-rolled steel, this RJ45 patch panel is designed to stand up to even the harshest networking environments. When reliability matters, you can count on this 2U patch panel to deliver uninterrupted performance day after day.

Ready for High-Performance Networks: This patch panel is designed to meet the demands of the modern IT landscape. It ensures optimal network performance with minimal interference, supporting faster data speeds and higher bandwidth with ease.

Ideal for Multiple Scenarios: Whether you're installing it in a data center, corporate office, or industrial hub, this 48-port network patch panel is versatile enough to handle any setup. It's ideal for those looking to streamline their network infrastructure with a single, powerful distribution frame.

 

3. Technical Specifications:

4. How the 48-Port Patch Panel Elevates Your Network Performance:

 

Improved Cable Management: As any IT professional will tell you, cable management is the key to efficient network performance. This network patch panel ensures that your cabling remains neat, organized, and easily accessible.

Versatile Application: Whether you're managing a single office floor or an entire data center, this 2U patch panel is designed to meet the needs of diverse environments. Whether you're adding new devices or replacing old infrastructure, this patch panel ensures you're prepared for whatever comes next.

 

5. Don't Settle for Subpar Network Infrastructure

Our 2U patch panel is engineered to last, ensuring that your network infrastructure remains organized, accessible, and efficient. brief.en: 1U Pull-out Optic Distribution Frame(ODF), used for fiber backbone connection and distribution in the wiring area of data centers. It is installed in 19-inch racks and cabinets, equipped with LC adapter panels, and can accommodate a maximum of 1U 96-core fusion splicing solution.
brief.zh: 1U Pull-out Optic Distribution Frame(ODF), used for fiber backbone connection and distribution in the wiring area of data centers. It is installed in 19-inch racks and cabinets, equipped with LC adapter panels, and can accommodate a maximum of 1U 96-core fusion splicing solution.

description.en:
Description

Product Description

1U Pull-out Optic Distribution Frame(ODF), used for fiber backbone connection and distribution in the wiring area of data centers. It is installed in 19-inch racks and cabinets, equipped with LC adapter panels, and can accommodate a maximum of 1U 96-core fusion splicing solution.
 

Technical Features

Drawer-style design with three smooth sliding rails for flexible and smooth operation. Can accommodate 4 fiber adapter panels, managing up to 96 fiber cores. The standard configuration includes 2 layers of fusion splicing trays with ears, supporting a 48-core fusion splicing solution. It can be pre-installed with 4 sets of slim fusion splicing trays to achieve 96 cores as per requirements. Made of high-quality cold-rolled steel plate, with a main body thickness of 1.2mm. Comes with a cable management tray and supports multiple wiring methods.
 

Specifications

Material: Iron
Dimensions: Outer dimensions are 430mm in length, 363mm in depth, and 44mm in height.
Iron Plate Thickness: 1.2mm
Internal Interface: 12 cores
Manufacturing Process: Crimping molding
Usage Scope: Indoor
Plug and Unplug Times: 1000 times
Appearance: Glossy black iron surface, consistent and uniform color, free from impurities
Packaging: Cardboard packaging, suitable for general transportation requirements

Description

1.  ODF Fiber Patch Panel 12 cores / 24 cores / 48 cores / 72 cores / 96 cores / 144 cores, made of cold-rolled steel, is sturdy and durable.

2.  With a brand-new modular design, it offers quick and convenient installation, integrating fiber fusion, disk storage, and distribution functions into one unit.

3.  Equipped with storage and protection functions, it features optical cable entry, fixation, and protection. It also provides capabilities for fusion splicing of optical cable terminations and pigtails, along with storage and protection of optical cable fibers and pigtails.

4.  The fiber patch panel is crafted from robust cold-rolled steel, and the surface is coated with impact-resistant and pressure-resistant spray paint, ensuring minimal deformation.

5.  The new environmentally-friendly ABS fusion tray is molded from high-strength ABS engineering plastic, exhibiting high strength, rich color, substantial material, and long-lasting durability.

6.  The pull-out design includes smooth sliding guide rails, providing a more convenient and user-friendly experience.

brief.zh: Product Introduction: Mainly used for termination, protection, connection, and management of optical cables and fibers in optical communication networks. It can achieve functions such as fixing, stripping, and grounding protection of optical cables, as well as fusion splicing, patching, excess...

description.en:
Description

Product Introduction:

This optical distribution cabinet is mainly used for termination, protection, connection, and management of optical cables and fibers in optical communication networks. It can achieve functions such as fixing, stripping, and grounding protection of optical cables, as well as fusion splicing, patching, excess fiber winding, and distribution scheduling of various optical fibers. It is a supporting device between transmission media and transmission equipment. It features flexible configuration, easy installation and use, easy maintenance, and convenient management. This equipment is suitable for FTTZ, FTTB, remote modules, and small and medium-sized distribution systems for wireless base stations.

Product Features:

1. Easy Construction. The optical distribution cabinet adopts a front and rear double-opening door removable design, supporting front and rear cabinet installation, with simple operation. The top and bottom of the distribution cabinet have inlet holes to meet different inlet requirements of users.
2. Standard Design. The optical distribution cabinet adopts the 19-inch international standard installation interface and can house a 19-inch distribution box internally.
3. Large Capacity. The dimensions of the optical distribution cabinet are 220 (height) * 90 (width) * 30 (depth) cm, with maximum support of 42U storage space.
4. Convenient Storage Function. The optical distribution cabinet has built-in fiber storage and cable management devices, optimizing the wiring layout. The front door of the optical distribution cabinet has a built-in document storage device for convenient file storage.

description.en:
Description

Product Description:

Framework (welded frame ring, top panel, bottom panel, side beams, angle ruler)
Front Door: Single-open mesh steel door
Back Door: Double-open mesh steel door
Cable management panel
 

Product Features:

Patented profile frame with a static load-bearing capacity of 2000 kg, including brackets.
Bulk structure with smaller packaging volume and lower transportation costs.
Convenient and fast assembly.
Embedded side panels, can be installed with side panels for cabinet integration.
Multiple closable cable routing holes for convenient cable management.
Angle ruler with scale for quick equipment positioning, installation, and grounding.
Front single-open and back double-open high-density mesh doors with a ventilation rate of over 75%.
Front and rear isolation inside the cabinet effectively prevents turbulence between cold and hot airflow.
A rich selection of optional accessories to address distribution, wiring, sealing, and other issues.

description.en:
Description

Product Description:

Specialized server cabinets for data centers and precision computer rooms, designed and manufactured with international cabinet quality standards, showcasing the image of the computer room. The double-port patented sectional profile assembly frame only requires 8 screws to complete the entire frame assembly. The frame has extremely high strength and comes with a standard high-density hexagonal single-open mesh front door and a high-density hexagonal double-open mesh rear door. It features a luxurious anti-theft external hinge and a flat hexagonal hole design, providing an 80% ventilation rate.

Product Features:

Eight-fold double-port sectional profile with a static load-bearing capacity of 1600 kg, including brackets.
The frame can be selected in welded or assembled structure based on requirements.
Small-spacing modular holes provide a wide range of installation positions.
Multiple closable cable routing holes for convenient cable management.
Angle ruler with scale for quick equipment positioning, installation, and grounding.
High-density mesh front door with single-open design and high-density mesh rear door with double-open design, with a mesh ventilation rate of over 75%.
Front and rear isolation inside the cabinet effectively prevents turbulence between cold and hot airflow.
A rich selection of optional accessories to address distribution, wiring, sealing, and other issues.
Technical Specifications:

Physical Performance:

Protection Level: IP2X
Main Material: High-quality SPCC cold-rolled steel plate/fingerprint-resistant aluminum-zinc coated steel plate
Material Thickness: Angle ruler - 2.0mm, Side beams - 1.5mm, others ≥ 1.0mm
Load Capacity: Static load-bearing capacity of 1600kg
Colors: RAL9005, RAL7035
Surface Treatment: Degreasing, cleaning, phosphating, electrostatic spraying

Description

Product Description:

The high-density hexagonal flat single-open mesh front door and high-density hexagonal flat double-open mesh rear door feature a flat hexagonal hole design with a ventilation rate of over 80%. This effectively solves issues related to server heat dissipation, mechanical protection, and external observation of machine operation status.

Product Features:

Sixteen-fold steel frame sectional welded frame with a static load-bearing capacity of 1600KG, equipped with brackets.
Symmetrical section design of the steel frame for increased flexibility.
Built-in three-way ground connection for easy fixation with the base.
Convenient adjustment of the height of the support feet from the inside of the cabinet during installation.
Multiple closable cable routing holes for easy cable management.
Angle ruler with scale for quick equipment positioning, installation, and grounding.
High-density mesh front door with single-open design and high-density mesh rear door with double-open design, with a mesh ventilation rate of over 75%.
Front and rear isolation inside the cabinet to effectively prevent air turbulence between cold and hot airflow.
A rich selection of optional accessories to address distribution, wiring, sealing, and other issues.

brief.zh: A6 Server Cabinet Compliant with ANSI/EIA RS-310-D, IEC297-2, DIN41494, PART1, PART7, GB/T3047.2-92 standards, compatible with ETSI standard.

description.en:
Description

Product Description:

The product features a transparent tempered glass front door with ventilation slots on the door edge and a high-density flat hexagonal mesh rear door. It effectively maintains natural ventilation, making it particularly suitable for installing servers and other active equipment. It provides a comprehensive solution for server cooling, mechanical protection, and external observation of machine operation status, among other requirements.
 

Product Features:

Front and rear welded frame assembly, with a static load-bearing capacity of up to 1000 kg.
Front and rear doors feature an elastic latch structure, allowing for interchangeable left and right openings.
Quick-release side panels for easy and flexible access.
Multiple closable cable routing channels at the top and bottom, offering flexible wiring positions.
Anti-static and fingerprint-resistant galvanized (or optional spray-coated) corner fittings.
The main components are equipped with pre-installed grounding copper pillars to ensure the electrical grounding of the cabinet.
Fan units are installed on the top of the cabinet for convenient maintenance.
Convenient installation of vertical PDU (Power Distribution Unit) and cable management panels.
They are designed for the installation of active equipment, providing a comprehensive solution for server cooling, mechanical protection, and external observation of machine operation status, among other requirements.
 

Technical Specifications:

Protection Level: IP2X
Main Material: High-quality SPCC cold-rolled steel plate / fingerprint-resistant coated aluminum-zinc steel plate
Material Thickness:
Corner fittings: 2.0mm
Side beams: 1.5mm
Other parts: ≥1.0mm
Load Capacity:
With casters: 600kg
With leveling feet: 800kg
Floor-standing static load capacity: 1000kg
Surface Treatment: Degreasing, cleaning, phosphating, electrostatic spraying
Color: RAL9005, RAL7035

Are you a national high-tech enterprise?

In 2016, our company has been rated as a national high-tech enterprise. In recent years, we have been awarded a series of honors, such as Wangjiang Collaborative Multiplier Enterprise and Dongguan Multiplier Enterprise. It is because of this soft strength that we can grant to buy land in the city and build our own industrial park.


Why COBTEL is trusted by so many big brands in the structured cabling industry?

Cobtel has nearly 3 decades of experience in manufacturing keystone jacks, RJ45 connectors, Ethernet Cables, etc. Our production capacity of modular plugs is 5 million/day, the biggest in the world.

COBTEL is ODM and OEM for big brands. Benefiting from our professional team, modern equipment, and advanced inspection instruments, our domestic and oversea customers speak highly of our efficiency and quality.

Our products are UL, CE, CSA, SGS, and 3C certified, so customers are worry-free to import from us.

We have a self-owned industrial park in Dongguan, which is close to Hong Kong and Shenzhen China. It is very convenient for you to visit us during our further cooperation.

What does your company do?

We have a strong R&D team and strong manufacturing capability.

We are specialized in the production of network crystal head connectors, integrated wiring products(copper wire, module, distribution frame, light jumper, cabinet), and smart home products(fuses, rail inserts, panels). We can meet some new requirements of your company. We have all types of crystal heads that can not be found in the market. Our product line is the most abundant.


Do you have high-voltage products?

Yes, COBTEL QS is our subsidiary factory, we are in the same industrial park. They focus on smart homes and high-voltage product lines such as universal travel adaptors, smart switches, etc.


Are all COBTEL structured cabling products well matched?

Sure. From the very beginning, COBTEL R&D is dedicated to developing the best user experience for our series of products. You can get keystone jack face plates and keystone jack, patch cords, RJ45 Connectors, patch panels, and cabinets from us at one stop. They are matched best.

name.en: C Small-scale Intelligent Micro Modular Data Center.
name.zh: C Small-scale Intelligent Micro Modular Data Center.

brief.en: Compliant with ANS/EARS-310-D, IEC297-2, DN41491, PART1, DIN41494, PART7, GB/9520.16-2015 standards, compatible with ETS standard protection levels.
brief.zh: Compliant with ANS/EARS-310-D, IEC297-2, DN41491, PART1, DIN41494, PART7, GB/9520.16-2015 standards, compatible with ETS standard protection levels.

description.en:
Description

Product Description

Designed and developed to meet the requirements of modern data centers for green energy, emission reduction, modularity, and intelligent monitoring, this product is widely used in various industries such as finance, government, telecommunications, energy, transportation, healthcare, education, and manufacturing for the construction, renovation, and expansion of data centers. It effectively improves energy efficiency, achieving energy savings of up to 30%. The product features top strong and weak power cable trays, enclosed track opening with remote control, card swipe, password, and sensor activation, fire skylights, fire linkage (sound and light alarm, smoke detection, temperature, and humidity sensing), integrated indoor and outdoor constant temperature and humidity air conditioning, UPS, rack-mounted precision power distribution cabinets, data center dedicated cabinets including cabinet components, enclosed cold aisles, environmental monitoring systems, and KVM.
 

Product Features

1.Integrated cold and electrical control pre-installed in one cabinet, simple cabinet integration during on-site installation, with a construction time of only 4 hours.
2.Remote monitoring enables centralized monitoring of multiple modules through a unified network management system, achieving unmanned operation.
3.Rack-mounted air conditioning saves at least one cabinet installation space.
4.DC variable frequency refrigeration, with the option of cold and hot aisles, achieving a low PUE of 1.37.
5.Can handle light dehumidification for 10% load in the data center, avoiding condensation risks.
6.Real-time monitoring of battery voltage, internal resistance, and temperature, with intelligent shutdown in case of overheating to prevent fires.

1. Technical Specifications Product Features Cabinets:

3 sets of standard 600120042U cabinets, providing 108U of self-installation space
5 sets of standard 600120042U cabinets, providing 182U of self-installation space

2. Precision Air Conditioning:

1 set of 8kW precision air conditioning
1 set of 15kW precision air conditioning
UPS:
1 set of 10KVA rack-mounted UPS

3. Battery Pack:

1 set with a backup time of 30 minutes

4. PDU (Power Distribution Unit):

3 sets of single-phase, 12-channel 10A, and 4-channel 16A outputs
5 sets of single-phase, 12-channel 10A, and 4-channel 16A outputs

5. Distribution Module:

1 set of rack-mounted modular distribution units with a built-in intelligent power meter, MODBUS protocol, and UPS bypass interlock function

6. Monitoring Module:

1 set including monitoring unit, fire unit, smoke sensor, temperature and humidity sensor, and water leakage detector

7. Alarm Form:

Sound and light alarm and SMS alert

8. Dimension Specifications:

1800×1200x2000mm
3000×1200X2000mm

The product features include top strong and weak power cable trays, enclosed track doors (remote control, card swipe, password, induction), fire skylights, fire interlocking systems (audiovisual alarm, smoke detection, temperature, and humidity detection), integrated indoor/outdoor temperature and humidity-controlled air conditioning, UPS, rack-mounted precision power distribution cabinets, dedicated data center cabinets including cabinet assembly components, enclosed cold aisles, environmental monitoring systems, and KVM.

 

Product Features

Modular installation, where the entire system is prefabricated in the modular form at the factory for convenient on-site installation.
Superior heat dissipation compared to single cabinet cooling efficiency, increasing the installation density of cabinet equipment and saving space in the data center.
The top cover opens under the force of gravity to provide gas fire protection in the cold aisle area, ensuring safety and reliability.
Separation of cold and hot air, preventing airflow disturbance and short circuits, resulting in high cooling efficiency and energy cost savings.
Comprehensive room management, dynamic management, energy efficiency analysis, robust security management, standard network management interface, precise battery management, and convenient maintenance and administration.

 

Technical Specifications

Product Characteristics
Channel Specifications (Width x Depth x Height) mm:
Single row: Lx(2200~2400)x(2000~2200)
(Excluding the height of the skylight when flipped) L<15m (including air conditioning)
Cabinet depth supports 1000mm, 1100mm, and 1200mm; cabinet height supports 2000mm and 2200mm.
Double row: Lx(3200~3600)x(2000~2200)
(Excluding the height of the skylight when flipped) L<15m (including air conditioning)
Cabinet depth supports 1000mm, 1100mm, and 1200mm; cabinet height supports 2000mm and 2200mm.
Enclosed aisle width supports 1200mm and 1800mm.
A number of single module cabinets: Single row: 324; Double row: 640.
Installation method:
Raised floor installation, can also be directly installed on a cement floor.
Reliability level: Tier II or above.
Power supply standard: 380/400/415Vac, 50/60Hz, 3Ph+N+PE.
System protection level: IP20.

 

Power Distribution System

UPS Input Voltage: 380/400/415Vac, 50/60Hz, 3Ph+N+PE
UPS Rated Capacity: 20~250kVA
UPS Configuration: N, N+1, 2N
UPS Input Power Factor: Integrated Modular UPS: ≥0.9, Rack-mounted Modular UPS: 1
UPS Overall Efficiency: ≥95%
Maintenance Method: Online hot-swappable maintenance
Battery Arrangement: Built-in or external
PDU Installation Method: Front/rear vertical installation in the cabinet
Power Supply Method for IT Cabinets: Mains power/diesel generator + mains power/diesel generator; UPS + UPS; UPS + mains power/diesel generator
Other: Class C lightning protection, 10-inch display screen, branch power distribution parameter monitoring
Certification: CCC

 

Cooling System

Air Conditioning Selection: Row-level air-cooling/chilled water, Room-level air-cooling/chilled water
Cooling Method: Air-cooling, chilled water
Power Supply Method for Air Conditioner Indoor and Outdoor Units: Separate power supply
Air Conditioning Installation Method: Indoor unit suspended overhead floor installation, outdoor unit installed on the flat cement ground
Compressor Type: Row-level: variable frequency compressor, Room-level: fixed frequency compressor
Fan Type: EC fan
Air Supply Method: Row-level: horizontal air supply, Room-level: downward air supply
Air Conditioning Indoor Unit Dimensions (Width x Depth x Height) mm: Air conditioning: 300×1200×2000, 600×1200×2000
Certification: CQC energy-saving

 

Monitoring and Management System

Functional Modules: Centralized management, access control management, video surveillance, asset management, battery monitoring
Access Methods: Web access via operation and maintenance platform, local 10-inch touchscreen, mobile app (optional)
Alarm Methods: WeChat alarm, local sound, and light alarm, SMS alarm, email alarm, telephone alarm
Certification: Software copyright, software testing report

 

Cabinet System

Dimension Specifications (Width x Depth x Height) mm: (600/800) x (1000/1100/1200) x (2000/2200)
Usable Space: 42U/47U
Certification: Seismic report, load-bearing report

description.en:
Description

Product Description:

Designed and developed to meet the requirements of modern data centers for green energy, emission reduction, modularity, and intelligent monitoring, it is widely used in various new construction, expansion, and renovation projects of data centers in industries such as finance, government, telecommunications, energy, transportation, healthcare, education, and manufacturing. It effectively improves energy efficiency and achieves a 30% energy saving. The top cable management tray for power and data cables, closed pathway with dual doors (remote control, card swipe, password, induction), fire-resistant skylight, fire-fighting linkage (sound and light alarm, smoke detection, temperature, and humidity detection), integrated indoor/outdoor air-conditioning system, UPS, rack-mounted precision distribution cabinet, dedicated data center cabinets including enclosure components, enclosed cold aisles, environmental monitoring system, and KVM.

Product Features:

Modular installation, the entire system is manufactured and processed into modular components for convenient on-site installation.
Excellent heat dissipation, significantly improving the cooling efficiency compared to individual cabinets, increasing the installation density of cabinet equipment, and saving space in the data center.
The top cover opens under the force of gravity to provide gas fire suppression for the cold aisle area, ensuring safety and reliability.
Separation of cold and hot air, no mixing or short-circuiting, high cooling efficiency, and reduced energy consumption costs.
Comprehensive room management, dynamic management, energy efficiency analysis, robust security management, standard network management interfaces, accurate battery management, and convenient maintenance.

 

Product Characteristics:

Passageway Specifications (Width x Depth x Height) mm:
Single row: Lx(2200~2400) x (2000~2200), (excluding skylight flip height), H < 15m (including air conditioning)
Cabinet depth supports 1000mm, 1100mm, and 1200mm.
Cabinet height supports 2000mm and 2200mm.
Double row: Lx(3200~3600) x (2000~2200), (excluding skylight flip height), L < 15m (including air conditioning)
Cabinet depth supports 1000mm, 1100mm, and 1200mm.
Cabinet height supports 2000mm and 2200mm.
Enclosed aisle width supports 1200mm and 1800mm.
The number of single-module cabinets:
Single row: 3~24; Double row: 6~40.
Installation methods:
Raised floor installation, can also be directly installed on cement ground.
Reliability level: Tier II or above Tier III.
Power supply system:
UPS input voltage: 380/400/415Vac, 50/60Hz, 3Ph+N+PE.
UPS rated capacity: 20~250kVA.
UPS configuration: N, N+1, 2N.
UPS input power factor: Integrated modular UPS: ≥0.9, rack-mounted modular UPS: 1.
UPS overall efficiency: ≥95%.
Maintenance method: Online hot-swappable maintenance.
Battery arrangement: Built-in or external.
PDU installation method: Front/rear vertical installation in cabinets.
IT cabinet power supply: Utility power/diesel generator + utility power/diesel generator; UPS + UPS; UPS + utility power/diesel generator.
Others: Class C lightning protection, 10-inch display screen, branch circuit parameter monitoring.
Certification: CCC.

Cooling System:

Air conditioning selection: Row-level air-cooled/chilled water, room-level air-cooled/chilled water.
Cooling method: Air-cooling, chilled water.
Indoor and outdoor unit power supply: Separate power supply.
Air conditioning installation method: Indoor unit rack-mounted raised floor installation, outdoor unit flat cement ground installation.
Compressor type: Row-level: variable frequency compressor, room-level: fixed frequency compressor.
Fan type: EC fan.
Air supply mode: Row-level: horizontal air supply, room-level: downward air supply.
Indoor unit dimensions (Width x Depth x Height) mm: Row-level air conditioning: 300×1200×2000, 600×1200×2000. For room-level air conditioning, please refer to the selection table.
Certification: CQC energy-saving.
