description.zh:
Description

Product Description:

Designed and developed to meet the requirements of modern data centers for green energy, emission reduction, modularity, and intelligent monitoring, it is widely used in various new construction, expansion, and renovation projects of data centers in industries such as finance, government, telecommunications, energy, transportation, healthcare, education, and manufacturing. It effectively improves energy efficiency and achieves a 30% energy saving. The top cable management tray for power and data cables, closed pathway with dual doors (remote control, card swipe, password, induction), fire-resistant skylight, fire-fighting linkage (sound and light alarm, smoke detection, temperature, and humidity detection), integrated indoor/outdoor air-conditioning system, UPS, rack-mounted precision distribution cabinet, dedicated data center cabinets including enclosure components, enclosed cold aisles, environmental monitoring system, and KVM.

Product Features:

Modular installation, the entire system is manufactured and processed into modular components for convenient on-site installation.
Excellent heat dissipation, significantly improving the cooling efficiency compared to individual cabinets, increasing the installation density of cabinet equipment, and saving space in the data center.
The top cover opens under the force of gravity to provide gas fire suppression for the cold aisle area, ensuring safety and reliability.
Separation of cold and hot air, no mixing or short-circuiting, high cooling efficiency, and reduced energy consumption costs.
Comprehensive room management, dynamic management, energy efficiency analysis, robust security management, standard network management interfaces, accurate battery management, and convenient maintenance.

 

Product Characteristics:

Passageway Specifications (Width x Depth x Height) mm:
Single row: Lx(2200~2400) x (2000~2200), (excluding skylight flip height), H < 15m (including air conditioning)
Cabinet depth supports 1000mm, 1100mm, and 1200mm.
Cabinet height supports 2000mm and 2200mm.
Double row: Lx(3200~3600) x (2000~2200), (excluding skylight flip height), L < 15m (including air conditioning)
Cabinet depth supports 1000mm, 1100mm, and 1200mm.
Cabinet height supports 2000mm and 2200mm.
Enclosed aisle width supports 1200mm and 1800mm.
The number of single-module cabinets:
Single row: 3~24; Double row: 6~40.
Installation methods:
Raised floor installation, can also be directly installed on cement ground.
Reliability level: Tier II or above Tier III.
Power supply system:
UPS input voltage: 380/400/415Vac, 50/60Hz, 3Ph+N+PE.
UPS rated capacity: 20~250kVA.
UPS configuration: N, N+1, 2N.
UPS input power factor: Integrated modular UPS: ≥0.9, rack-mounted modular UPS: 1.
UPS overall efficiency: ≥95%.
Maintenance method: Online hot-swappable maintenance.
Battery arrangement: Built-in or external.
PDU installation method: Front/rear vertical installation in cabinets.
IT cabinet power supply: Utility power/diesel generator + utility power/diesel generator; UPS + UPS; UPS + utility power/diesel generator.
Others: Class C lightning protection, 10-inch display screen, branch circuit parameter monitoring.
Certification: CCC.

Cooling System:

Air conditioning selection: Row-level air-cooled/chilled water, room-level air-cooled/chilled water.
Cooling method: Air-cooling, chilled water.
Indoor and outdoor unit power supply: Separate power supply.
Air conditioning installation method: Indoor unit rack-mounted raised floor installation, outdoor unit flat cement ground installation.
Compressor type: Row-level: variable frequency compressor, room-level: fixed frequency compressor.
Fan type: EC fan.
Air supply mode: Row-level: horizontal air supply, room-level: downward air supply.
Indoor unit dimensions (Width x Depth x Height) mm: Row-level air conditioning: 300×1200×2000, 600×1200×2000. For room-level air conditioning, please refer to the selection table.
Certification: CQC energy-saving.

Monitoring and Management System:

Functional modules: Centralized management, access control management, video surveillance, asset management, and battery monitoring.
Access methods: Remote web access, local 10-inch touchscreen, mobile app (optional).
Alarm methods: WeChat alarm, local sound, and light alarm, SMS alarm, email alarm, phone alarm.
Certification: Software copyright, software testing report.

Cabinet System:

Dimensions (Width x Depth x Height) mm: (600/800) x (1000/1100/1200) x (2000/2200).
Usable space: 42U/47U.
Certification: Seismic report, load-bearing report.

description.en:
Description

This structure is a simple type of cabinet, which is consistent with the structure of a network cabinet. It does not include front and rear doors or side doors. It is delivered in separate parts.

Configuration Parameters:

[Height]:  2-meter tall

[Cabinet Material]: SPCC Cold Rolled Steel Plate

[Plate Thickness]: 2.0mm for 4 Uprights, 1.2mm for all others

[Surface Treatment]: Electrostatic Spraying

[Cabinet Accessories]:

Frame: 2 sets

Uprights: 4 pieces

Side-mounted beams: 6 pieces

Top cover: 1 piece

Base: 1 piece

Layer board: 1 piece

Screws and nuts: 40 sets

Support feet: 4 pieces

Casters: 4 pieces (2 with brakes)

Packaging: Neutral cardboard box packaging, can be delivered in separate parts or pre-assembled.

Compliant with industry standards: ANSI/EIARS-310-D, IEC297-2, DIN41491 PART1, DIN41491 PART7, ETSI

Protection Level: IP20

Load-bearing capacity: Static load of 800-1000KG

Color: RAL9004 Black Fine Sand Texture / RAL7035 Computer Gray

Product Specifications and Performance

Standards: Complies with ANSI/EIA RS-310-D, IEC 297-2, DIN 41491; PART1, DIN 41494; PART7, GB/T 3047.2-92 standards.
